name: Jackson County Republican Party
subject: New Chair Introduction
body:
Introduction Letter
<https://app.dvcomms.net/api/Communication/View?prm=MbIJ7QHiWuivoqqogirwlpBkeUQ4ZWfIn0GDIdO_iG3HxHcEFpM6GDPJGjKrEqhgifh5i5UxI2Za-zMEO27AYm3V41qc1w3wtnRgVul0o0EuPXXyGWIDc5eYEbklE_B2d8TkKGhf_qRV54UfUY5gfRl4in5PrbX58ZT2jTU5arNqMnSng33wRJjDrJzIvMNYtOaQoHIe6122t9URUXibMZ55KDFpUkYmj4si46jlWI81>
View this email in a browser

Hello, Fellow Southern Oregonians,

I would like to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Joyce Michelangelo, and I am the new Chair of the Jackson County Republican Party. I am a mother, grandmother, wife, U.S. Army veteran and a lifelong Republican. For most of my career I worked in electronics, in support of the Defense Industry. Providing great equipment to help keep our country safe was an honor. I step into this role with great excitement for the future. My primary goal is to support President Trump’s “Return to Common Sense Policy”. Common sense policies are Republican policies. We have hard working Oregonians that understand common sense in their work and in the raising of their families. However, I cannot achieve this goal without your support. Together, we can work towards this and other objectives that align with the Republican Party Platform for 2025 and beyond.

I believe we share many values and beliefs that unite us in our cause. To help achieve these goals, I kindly ask that you consider setting up a recurring monthly donation of $20 for the next 12 months. My aim is to have 1,000 individuals and companies set up this recurring donation. Please click on the donation link below or scan the QR code provided.

I would like to leave you with the first paragraph of the 2025 Republican Party Platform:

**A Return to Common Sense**
Our nation's history is filled with stories of brave men and women who gave everything to build America into the greatest nation in the history of the world. Generations of American patriots have summoned the American spirit of strength, determination, and love of country to overcome seemingly insurmountable challenges. The American people have proven time and again that we can overcome any obstacle and any force pitted against us.

Thank you for your support. . Please click on the donation link below or scan the QR code provided.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
#

Team —
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
In 2020, hundreds of thousands of people signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022.
It meant the world to us, and to Mark.
Now, he needs our help again. He’s got a new mission: _Holding the Trump Administration accountable, combatting Elon Musk’s illegal actions, and getting the next generation of leaders elected to the United States Senate._
**And today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he’s got a big team backing him up.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-aug25-endorse/?source=em25084-1-600&akid=6142%2E6688874%2EvVZ94G)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-aug25-endorse/?source=em25084-1-600&akid=6142%2E6688874%2EvVZ94G)**
With so much happening now this might seem like an insignificant action. But in times like these, everything we do matters.
When you join the thousands of others who have endorsed Mark it helps us put together a team from coast to coast that can do incredible things. It’s bigger than any one of us, and it sends an important message.
Actions like this are how we’ll get through this — how we’ll turn the tide.
Together.
[**So, please, hit this link and personally endorse Mark.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-aug25-endorse/?source=em25084-1-600&akid=6142%2E6688874%2EvVZ94G)
Thank you!
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-aug25-endorse/?source=em25084-1-600&akid=6142%2E6688874%2EvVZ94G)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6142%2E6688874%2EvVZ94G).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

---

Hey folks,

Just wrapped an incredible conversation with Pennsylvania's Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis, and trust me--this one's essential. We dug into everything from Trump's gerrymandering playbook to what it really means to govern with purpose in 2025. If you care about the future of Democratic leadership (or just want to feel something other than despair), this is a must-watch.
- 02:07 -- Austin Davis lays out the gerrymandering crisis in Texas and the courageous Democratic response

- 07:14 -- A no-BS take on what it means to "fight fire with fire" in blue states--and whether we should

- 12:01 -- How Pennsylvania is delivering real wins: safer streets, more jobs, and record investments in education

- 21:02 -- Why "you can't gaslight people into thinking the economy is strong"--and how we should talk about it instead

- 25:50 -- A call to action that hits hard: why the next generation of leadership _starts with us_
**If you 're ready for government that doesn't just talk about values but actually lives them--if you want to be part of a politics that's more about power for the people than power for the powerful--then I hope you'll become a paid subscriber. We're building something here. Don't miss it.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Tchess0Xlm9XBZoVRRhyATmzKaVGxubKqBv7MutF6fA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170125367)
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Powered by People
subject: Greg Abbott just threatened to remove elected Democrats from office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Yesterday, Governor Greg Abbott threatened to remove Texas House Democrats from office.
Why? **Because more than 50 Democratic lawmakers left the state to break quorum and block a Republican redistricting scheme designed to flip five Democratic-held U.S. House seats.**
The GOP’s goal is clear: to lock in a permanent majority by manipulating district lines and silencing voters—particularly communities of color. Democrats, in response, have taken a courageous stand against this power grab.
Now, Abbott is retaliating. He said that any Democratic House member who remains out of state past 3 p.m. today could face _legal removal from office_. He’s also floated felony charges for those receiving help to cover the daily $500 fines they face if they don’t return.1
This is authoritarianism in real time. And unless we act now, they could get away with it.
**These lawmakers are risking everything—their seats, their safety, their futures—to protect free and fair elections in Texas.** And we need to have their backs.
[**Will you chip in $3 to Powered by People and support these Democrats in their fight to protect democracy? Your contribution helps fight back against Abbott’s threats and stop this undemocratic redistricting plan.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250804-3.NI5UtV&refcode=ema20250804-240277&t=2&akid=240277%2E444211%2EJOjKbp)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250804-3.NI5UtV&refcode=ema20250804-240277&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240277%2E444211%2EJOjKbp)**
This isn’t just about Texas—it’s about whether partisan lawmakers can silence voters and redraw the rules whenever they’re losing.
The Republicans are betting they can outlast us. Let’s prove them wrong.
Powered by People

1 — [Texas Tribune](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65796?t=22&akid=240277%2E444211%2EJOjKbp)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025-07-support-house-dems-em?refcode=em20250804-240277-footer&t=23&refcode2=240277_444211_JOjKbp&akid=240277%2E444211%2EJOjKbp)**

subject: Greg Abbott and Trump are declaring war on democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Texas Gov. Greg Abbott just said the quiet part out loud: he’s threatening to remove Democratic lawmakers from office because they dared to leave the state to stop Donald Trump’s gerrymander.
Yes, you read that right.
Here’s what’s happening:
🔴 Abbott claims Democrats who fled to Illinois and New York have “forfeited their seats.”
🔴 He’s even suggesting they’ve committed felonies — with zero evidence.
🔴 All of this is about one thing: Trump’s demand for 5 new GOP seats in Texas before the 2026 midterms.
This isn’t law. It’s political strong-arming. And if Abbott and Trump get away with this in Texas, it will spread — fast.
🚨 DEMOCRACY ON THE LINE 🚨
GOP POWER GRAB IN TEXASRepublicans are threatening to erase democracy by removing lawmakers who blocked their gerrymander.
If they get away with this in Texas, they’ll try it everywhere.
FIGHT BACK NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]They’re betting on silence. Prove them wrong.
Chip in $10 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]
But Democrats aren’t backing down. They’ve made it clear: “We’re in this for the long haul.” Now it’s up to us to show them we’ve got their backs.
🚨 Chip in $10 to fight Trump’s gerrymander [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin] 🚨

This is bigger than Texas. It’s about whether Trump can rewrite the rules of democracy in his image — or whether we’ll stop him cold.
If you’re tired of their power grabs, now is the moment to act.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112745107/561497824/1833512440?refcode=250804_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNjYzMyMy05NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7v5l7SBs50wJFpkk0l07hN6e3p1kq-bs0Y9D_8zgSQ=) Folks, I’ll make this quick: [**I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 to my Speak Up PAC and Seth Moulton.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112745108/561497825/1833512440?refcode=250804_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNjYzMyMy05NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7v5l7SBs50wJFpkk0l07hN6e3p1kq-bs0Y9D_8zgSQ=) I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. [**So please folks, will you please split a $3 donation to power Speak Up PAC and Seth Moulton's grassroots efforts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112745109/561497826/1833512440?refcode=250804_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNjYzMyMy05NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7v5l7SBs50wJFpkk0l07hN6e3p1kq-bs0Y9D_8zgSQ=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112745110/561497827/-1446296926?refcode=250804_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNjYzMyMy05NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7v5l7SBs50wJFpkk0l07hN6e3p1kq-bs0Y9D_8zgSQ=) Sincere thanks, Stacey

Power —or “La Fuerza”— is exactly what it will take to unseat Trump puppet David Schweikert and flip the House blue in 2026. It’s going to require every single one of us to give a little bit more than we are used to.
After working 20 years as a broadcast journalist, I never thought I would run for public office. But when I saw how quickly our political landscape here in America was changing, I knew I had to do something different, too.
Now, I’m running to defeat one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress. But I can’t win alone — I need the grassroots power of this team behind me, which is why **[_I’m asking you to become a monthly donor today:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112745136/561500532/-1081150194?amount=3&recurring=yes&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.04_Recurring_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDk1YmRhZmYtOTQ3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xCzstrXAy5X7JKfZTZmTa9deUy0Jpgr1-UFXHMbnOcI=)**

Working together, building this grassroots movement, and leading with la fuerza within is exactly what it’s going to take to defeat Schweikert and take back the House.

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/carolinegleich/p/gerrymandering-is-hurting-all-of?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Gerrymandering doesn't just rig elections. It hurts people. It breaks trust. It confuses voters. And it makes government worse for everyone.
When politicians manipulate the maps to lock in their power, it becomes nearly impossible for communities to choose leaders who actually represent them.
Caroline Gleich ⛰️ is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RUVO_J1xnMtuMdnafpA3rnBvs-1fYRz9Msd2bGymrtk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170137192)
And when representation breaks down, so does everything else.
You see it in the failures to act on climate, housing, healthcare, and basic infrastructure. You feel it in the gridlock, the blame games, and the way no one seems accountable for anything.
And you feel it in your own disconnection.
Because there's another layer people don't talk about enough:
**Gerrymandering is confusing is hell.**
Districts gets sliced, shuffled, and scrambled. Neighborhoods get split or cracked in ways that make no sense. People don't even know who represents them, or which district they're in from one year to the next.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c7bdd44-4685-4bbd-b21d-17f26d1fc6d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That confusion is strategic, because the more confused and disempowered voters feel, the less likely they are to engage, not out of apathy, but out of exhaustion.
Gerrymandering suppresses turnout, not just through direct voter suppression, but through **cynicism, burnout, and disillusionment.**
It sends the message: "We've already decided the outcome. Your vote won't change anything."
And sadly, over time, that message sticks.
Turnout drops. Participation shrinks. And the system becomes even more insulated, dysfunctional, and extreme.
> And I'll be honest, it's **deeply depressing to live in Utah under a gerrymandered system.**
> Our state legislature doesn't reflect our people. The majority of voters in several counties are regularly ignored. Maps are drawn to silence us, not represent us. We pay taxes to a government that doesn't represent our views.
> **That 's taxation without representation.**
> It's the same injustice this country was supposedly founded to fight against.
Now, we're watching it unfold again with Trump pushing Texas to redraw maps mid-cycle to secure more GOP seats, and California threatening to do the same. The whole thing feels like a zero-sum war.
Maybe Democrats have to fight back just to stay competitive. But if both sides feel forced to cheat just to survive, what kind of democracy do we have?
That's why it's important to recognize the Texas Democrats who are **fighting back the right way** by refusing to cheat the system.
They're showing that we can stand up to authoritarian power grabs without sacrificing our principles. It's harder, and it takes longer, but it's the only way to truly restore trust in democracy.
Still, organizing alone isn't enough. We need structural reform.
We need the **For the People Act** to ban partisan gerrymandering nationwide.
We need independent redistricting commissions.
We need a system where voters choose their leaders, not the other way around.
Because until we fix the maps, we can't fix anything else. And we'll keep living in a democracy that only exists on paper, while the people it's supposed to serve are left confused, voiceless, and shut out.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8f5d8a63-c5c9-48cc-bb2e-90d8907a8ff4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Sen. Jon Ossoff
subject: Sorry to be so direct
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking:
[**Can you split a $5 donation between my re-election campaign and Ruben Gallego's today?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em250804-1-160&t=1&akid=3933%2E734936%2ENqS35w)
Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.
And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won.
That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.
There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.
So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us.
[**If you’re able, please split a contribution of any amount between my campaign and Ruben's today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em250804-1-160&t=2&akid=3933%2E734936%2ENqS35w)
The campaign will be brutal.
But this team wins the hardest battles.
We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.
Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.
And we will win again — with your help.
**Please:**[**split a $5 donation between my re-election campaign and Ruben Gallego's today.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em250804-1-160&t=3&akid=3933%2E734936%2ENqS35w)**

With gratitude,
Senator Jon Ossoff

friend,

The Democrats and the Deep State have me caught in their snare.

**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**

---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being **JAILED** for the rest of my life, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the _ONE_ _THING_ that can save me: **_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU_**.

---
This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies.
---
_But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth._

These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill...

_...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also _REFUSE_ to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. _
---
They entered my mugshot under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.

_At this final hour, can I count on you?_

[**Please help me reach this life-saving (_truly_!) by adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI” by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help DROP ALL CHARGES against me.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being JAILED for the rest of my life, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the ONE THING that can save me: the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. Or so I thought... Never did I imagine that I would be the centerpiece of one of the Democrats’ most vindictive plots in history. This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies. But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth. These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill... ...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also REFUSE to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. They entered my mugshot under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. At this final hour, can I count on you?_ Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Naomi at Grijalva HQ
subject: 🎒Back to School, Back to Canvassing!🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
We are back! We only have 50 days left until our Election in September! Join us!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8a7c02b1b2ff/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308779?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=4e421b192c&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | | | |
# LET’S HIT THE STREETS!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| Hi Peter,
We’re back—and ready to keep the momentum going strong! This weekend, we’re launching our **Back to School Canvass** and we want YOU to be part of it!
Bring the whole crew—your family, your little ones, your cousins—everyone is welcome, and everyone is needed! 📚✊ We crushed the first half of this race, and now with only **7 weekends left** until **General Election Day** , it’s time to double down.
Thanks to your commitment, we’ve proven that people-powered, grassroots organizing WORKS—and we’re just getting started. Because of you, we’ve advanced to the **Special General Election on September 23rd** —and we’re on track to **make history** by electing **Adelita Grijalva** as **Arizona’s first Latina in Congress**! 🌵✨
Join us this **Saturday, August 9th, 2025** , for our **Back to School Canvass for Adelita**! The bell is ringing, and it’s time to show up for our future. 🛎️🎒
Let’s knock doors, talk to voters, and build the momentum we need to win. Whether you're a seasoned canvasser or it's your first time canvassing, we’ve got your back—just bring your energy and your drive to make change.
Adelita has always stood up for working families—fighting for fair wages, safe schools, and dignity for all. Now it’s our turn to stand with her.
Let’s show up, speak out, and organize like never before.
---
| **Here’s what’s happening this week:****TOMORROW** is Election Day in the City of Tucson, Wards 3, 5, & 6! If you still have your ballot, [click here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=dd9f68fe98&e=f7c3700ccb) to find your nearest location to vote!!
**Canvassing Door to Door!** Help us go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face. We have canvases this week in **Tucson and Nogales!****SAVE THE DATE : Saturday August 23rd, 2025 we will be having La Gran Marcha! 🤩**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=16f8bedccd&e=f7c3700ccb)
| **Saturday Canvass in Tucson** Saturday, August 9th @ 8:30 AM2720 E Broadway Blvd. Tucson, AZ
---
| [RSVP to Tucson Canvasses!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=2a467387e5&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=143e5805f4&e=f7c3700ccb)
| **CARPOOL CANVASS IN NOGALES****JOIN US** Sunday, August 10th @ 3:00PM
---
| [RSVP to Nogales Canvass!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=3ab499fe8f&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| For a smoother experience, please**download MiniVAN ahead of your canvass**. [Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=5459aa7009&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=4cd4b74185&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=dead60569b&e=f7c3700ccb).
---
| Will you be joining us to canvass this weekend? 🤩
Let’s keep up the momentum, keep showing up for each other, and make history — together.**If you have any questions, please reach out to us, at** : **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
**Hasta la victoria,****Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**
---
| [Donate](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=1d3ee9e954&e=f7c3700ccb)

subject: This is urgent, Friend.

body:
Will you renew your House GOP Membership right away?

Hi Friend,
It's Speaker Mike Johnson.
I'm contacting you directly about your House Majority Membership.
🚨As of today, your membership is up for renewal. 🚨
[I need you on the team this year, Friend. We've got a lot of work to get done to save this country and none of it is possible without your help](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcr07kea580k1gr66ilqr04enp7qk3h95pfqgub0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36c5h2bs). [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Why are students begging for this hat?
body:
What it represents is more powerful than you realize

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlq7dipcu268nt3a5uehqdlafnvc0sd28knqs1hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I'll cut straight to the point... I want to send you a FREE limited-edition "47" hat...The same hat college students have literally begged for during our campus tour stops.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdi6ftpa7e15r13jqield5ouv8h3n484uiais2i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36clh2bs)
---
But this isn't just any hat... It's a symbol.A symbol of what's happening right now across college campuses in America. _Students are waking up... Chanting "USA!"... Waving flags... and standing up for faith, family, and freedom._Everywhere Turning Point USA goes, we're seeing record crowds -- thousands of students -- fired up to defend this country and reject the Left's lies.And guess what?**They 're PROUD to be American.** This isn't just a moment... It's not a mere "shift"... This is a generational REVOLUTION!**And Friend, I want YOU to be part of it.**_All I ask?_**Make a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA reach even more young people ...**...and I'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat as my thank-you.
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**Claim Your "47" Hat**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9u8g5dd1gitcc2aruffkglojc4clofb8cs081l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36clh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't a gimmick... It's not another piece of "merch"... This hat means something.To every student who wears one -- it's a statement: _" I'm not afraid to stand up for this country."_ To every patriot like you who fuels this mission -- it's a reminder:_ "I helped wake up a generation. I helped build a movement."_
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvr1olivpjjan3k5g00ut7sf9u3lu5oq5n6m4ejo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36clh2bs)
---
**The "47" hat is a badge of honor for people who are saving this country.****So please -- make your first gift now to help Turning Point USA push this movement even further...**🔥 More campuses
🔥 More students
🔥 More hearts and minds changed _And I 'll send you your "47" hat as a symbol of the mission you've joined._
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**Claim Your "47" Hat**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbs97nersluh5o395e2bavd9rffsifjo7uq6nfs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36clh2bs)
---
Let's win the American Culture War. Let's make Gen Z the MOST PATRIOTIC generation in our nation's history.Let's take this thing all the way.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziv4qsd96ael8s4kp41ut23rmabpr3g1ua3nsbn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36clh2bs)
---
**P.S.** The Left never thought this could happen. But it is... right now, in real time.And patriots like YOU are the reason why. **[Make your most generous gift to Turning Point USA, and I will send you a limited edition"47" Hat as my personal thank you for joining the fight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn52g9l1qu91570h1vp554gha2jdn1hqpp5kotm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpge1o36clh2bs)**

Hi Friend,

body:

| | |
# **Death Spiral 2025**
---
# How This Potential Debt-Crisis Could Financially Cripple Retirees
---
| | |
---
Sean Hannity here, listen up. If you don't understand how this works, your retirement savings may be at more risk than it needs to be. So here's the big picture:** ** 2008 vaporized $2.4 trillion in retirement savings. We watched good people lose decades of work in weeks. Today the same red lights are flashing - and nobody's paying attention:
---
* 2 million+ jobs on the line...
* Stocks poised for a 25% nose-dive...
* IRAs and 401(k)s vulnerable to 25% losses, or worse.

---
You can't stop a recession from happening.** ** But you CAN refuse to be its next victim... >>> And millions of Americans have no idea [_**this option is available.**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C2D5KCK6X9FzvS-STxjkdw~~/AARclBA~/XlbXdW8HRjQxcRttlvH7U3AgteGBl7bM9XLNTBhD9JMtMUiwTLzN-p3bjI-9KoWxOUTeurb0bGiq4pk4RoOQd2ibpVNutbT4Inn9Nrva0gPRpnmO1Js4Orp8d6e-TqoVfaW1a7mcZ1fPf3RvoAzvqA6tUL2K6G9AnFgFtspdyvyAzg2ysuIX35ma5Bk-lVqQd_SVWwIeHx57WCWJwEuPrZZrtZ0pUyKM8fBQ_iPGd7SYuAHKZ9xQgFOZlbGEoHxWILakS_TU5Wvl7HIxGJ3ff9aPAIhdOB4F2JwfoPk8ogmTVKWl2uS_pSlb6GYweKm3km_JOmxUT8QuzUFUCumu-dP8gwIgN2AdwcATPQK-cS-4XLfk3WHpWZ_cqXgG5S4S) If you're an American citizen, this is available to you now. You don't have to be rich to use it. And whether you got $50k or $500k in retirement savings, you can elect this option before your next tax filing date. But it may be wise to act sooner. More millionaires are taking steps to avoid a possible 2025 Death Spiral. Billionaires are taking these steps too. In fact, even central banks around the world are taking these very steps to help protect their trillions of dollars from a global crisis. So before the possible Death Spiral**** comes our way, help protect your money any way you can. This may be our best hope.

# Tuesday, August 5, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1957, Dick Clark's _American Bandstand_ made its national debut on ABC-TV as a showcase for teens dancing to Top 40 songs. The show would run for 32 more years, but only one episode from the 1950s still exists. [You can see it here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFqwzAQBNCvkW8x0kq21IMOhZJDIb2WnsTGWtlqlCg4Gxv364v7C73OwGOYz1M4YS75Nn7glTynGm60Pgox0xxG_EHGC9WF5qGWQiOlWvmMASR0B-kOsgsRc9mCaaJPREC6Ia9sZ7Rz0Ltm8gMlIucGY1WfZAKpEPqok4UXp1WCJvtdk052SkoDtnU6RmuUdL02Gk0njKSYuc7td803niiVbZ_UDvXaFD8x3x9Cvwo4Cjiu69pu9cnPM-39niAPk9DHRei3LVzw6_2geBqb2cf7mkvJj94KI8cr5vJH8r9-WDz8BgAA___QAnCj) Today, we bring you the story of a 92-year-old Ohio man who [quietly logged every book he read](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ynSAURp8Gu-0gP8opKNLY3bQpna1shVyEM8C9jnn6jHmF9N-sb8369bF8YIghHT_xJNv2vCS6aqTWqCwH_sGGn5S_qWw5Rjpoz7mtuAguNHADXC8OQ7wX1Tm7EwmSHdlh0koaI0bTect3IbbV6XUdBBrcNrkLxWkyzo3avGQX7EPjhuuBcyWm3kjnJjVwM0olUWmmOLnQcul_55Capz3ej1K_5bOL1rf2rkz-YGJmYr6uq89vSttXbF-Fng0T8_PAxMwNEzPCiQkKoQOpXy9Yc_6s8ABh5HATlgqYHKR8gQ8VdjxDvMFjheqxkIPmCSi1UAhiqA1yiiFR79sZu2Ld-woxhjpOTPHjxBD_ibb_qvttxd8AAAD__0dqjrk)--3,599 in all--over six decades. Do you keep a record of what you read? Or do the books disappear behind you like footprints in the sand? Reply to this email to let us know. We are sponsored today by [Mode Mobile](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdCDjP0zhItLVdjdtSmvAY5jExgi8u9o8fcQmygvcdr6jOUffj0__CZRoW75DRldj8Rs-z4S14uEX-A0VfmF54DGXlHDBWEqdwAsudMtty7UPQOnlVRNcRBQoG3T9oJW0VhjbrG4KGoyIMZo4KYHDyBUIPQZloRdjMA256xu3XPecKzF0VoYwqJ5bI5UEpZniGKiWo_tZaKsrxvS6JnVzyU1ya637yeQ3Jm5M3Gh74Fm7XALmMlHCK3UhebvX7M9yP2Zk8gMzUGLCXMeMge6ZyY8dKLQ7HHXD41xp_8dnyDvQsr0T_2FveSu19H819IbLURkprGkOF_YnpUSnGZjiy1X1Hlu_ZPjhxJ8AAAD__9XMjvQ), offering a pre-IPO investment opportunity to _The Flyover_ readers.

## Netanyahu Orders Full Takeover of Gaza
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu approved a [full military occupation of the Gaza Strip](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFu7CAQRb8Gd6wwYJtXULzG3aZNaU3MYJNgg2B2V87XR-QX0kwzV0f3nvf7cocQw7m9wYGWfFpOfNWIRFiWDb6B4AvTE8uaYsQNfUr0AYsUcuDCcDEsDkK8Ft056xElqg5tPw1aGSNH0-1WGiVX5wUIB15roYwa3T8NKBWMveu7YBtNGDH0Qmg53YxybtK9MKPSCvTAtEAXKJXbZwon7ejj1Srd1nR00e5EuTL1n8mZyfm8cqrUXkzODczkLEw7msn5lUp0vE1sUSQ4L9gfHHIu6YmV5wgnp8T9I8aLp3V95Is3DbxSCZn7VFbkOxxQW6xgRKjI91QJNmzQrliXXyHGUMeJabEdEOJvU_qT3qeVPwEAAP__pZyPVA) on Monday, aiming to force Hamas to release roughly 50 remaining hostages. The move follows the release of disturbing Hamas videos showing emaciated hostages, including 24-year-old Evyatar David, sparking [national outrage and fear for their lives](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GOqP1D9gpXKS57tKmRBu8Buf2MAJziDx9RF4h_Whmvu_z3t8xcZrHD3ySLzH3Mx0bUym09iP-YMEH5RetQ2amkWLO5Qt7BaoV4AS0fcDEZ2_q4CORIl2Tl7Y12jnVuXryZIHAmS4Y3VoySmpQbzpIaaICxKFO_moDB60EMMo2TodgjQTXaaPRtJUBCqnktfnOaS4TRT6vS82QnzX7qZRlq_R7pW6Vuh3H0VwIB9HjClTqlrYViUXcmU-Rh2FfTnGhia2saREzFZxPnHaRY0wDCSXBWQ316sNyJOa0dbYyMD4x8d9m-Zeol1e_AQAA___wYnyT). Netanyahu [bypassed top military leadership](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1ytDAMQE9jOjNe_2Bv4eJr6PZrUzJaLIMTg3bALENOn3GukEaNNG-e3sdjeEDKaZ3-w4K-RBpWPPeMpeA2TPANBb6Q3riNlDNOGInKEwYppOHCcWGGAClfg26Cj4gSVYP-Zo1WzsnONbO_A8q7QSeeKLQFsMZ1UqGNT60MGtckX2nCCXMTQkvbOhWC1TfhOqUVaMO0wJAKbe0npbXMGPNVldqRlib7uZTXztQ_Jnsm-_M8Wzw2qm_UAyb7imeyF64OzWS_YoH1gvngO1w7DzimPdHKFwjII208HjlzGsfjBaUuKPLaotl8eJ0p57R3lmkxLZDyr0X5U7q3lz8BAAD__15kgiU) to push the plan forward, despite warnings it could endanger hostages and worsen Gaza’s humanitarian crisis. Former Israeli security chiefs denounced the move as a political gamble and called for a negotiated end to the 21-month war.
## DOJ Launches Russiagate Grand Jury Probe
Attorney General Pam Bondi has [greenlit a grand jury investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb9GMyxEVDog2MSsN93Qei0PfL00WIDtOF8_Zf_CxPfWrXPPv_t8B_IU3F94oS42zgGP7LEUTLODbyjwH-Mb0xK9R4c2xvKAWXDRM64Y72cD5M9Z1kZbRIFdjbode9kpJQZVr1qI_ibGFkENg7A3ZaUdLNhOjhwfRkBN-lrjivct51KMjeqMGWXL1dDJDmRfSY6GSkzNM1IoK1p_XkjNEl-112spW666P5WYKjEdx9HY-HW9uPJKTFv0VGjJlZhMfDIPe1hWCo65BMGw555ORuGNuZCDQjGwtOdM4KAgW2LIGyVYTgaXgE8hsxz3tGCdtNkO8p7yMFaSuxeQ_1CVX6l8a_ETAAD__102jEo) into allegations that top Obama-era intelligence officials conspired to falsely link President Trump to Russia in the 2016 presidential election. The probe follows a criminal referral from Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, who recently declassified intelligence documents she says were suppressed by deep state actors. The investigation could target [former officials like James Comey, John Brennan, and James Clapper,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGynDAMRb_GdNoxxoBf4SIN3UubkhFYBm8MZmyxG_L1GfYX0qiQZo7Ovb--x28MMezLT9zIsk_jTu8SiZnyuOBfZPxN6UV5TjHSQj4lnnBUUrUgDch2dBjiNerKWU-kqKnI1n2rG2NUZ6rVTtQ5N9FXL9F4_9Vj7bA1s2qRSLpOVsHeNGlkW0upVf8wjXO9rqXpGt2gboWW5AKn_HimsPNKPl630mNOWxXtynwU0fwQahBq2K8jFb5PQg03WKhBmntooYazwJ1PqIH-QJpwQ0jehzlgLOBxJvDkKGOEJePu4HnmC46cJoKwc4L3SrxSBl7ps98SkwOPsRBwPrcD8llKQOBA95cqW3e8Q4yhdL3QctkwxI83_1fZL6v-BQAA__-8R5VJ) though no charges have been filed.
## Actress Loni Anderson Dies at 79
Loni Anderson, [the blonde bombshell](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGStCAQhJ8GMy0cQUgI_oRs__RCi5XRnVuELZxby3v6K-8VLumoq_ur7-M23QIlyuv_sKHjpUwZjz0hM9ZpDd-BwxPLG-tcUsIVl1L4HiaQoFtpW6mnGCidk2qiWxABhwZdb7QarIXRNg83Kh2VQbwvWsW77ZUyMvbaWI3LMsLckLvWpJW6l1KB6ewQo1G9tOOghqC0UBIjcandZ6HMD1zSeSF1c9ma5B7Mr10M_wR4Af44ju5rD1xiOK-CAL9zqacAj5mxcqC8YWYBnt8C_PUtwEt7xSDAp5KpDTli3UtuI4bYHs_6aim3M-WZcg5MArzVWgL0o5RGgG-qi6-DUqJ9NELJdQuUfgH5T1bfDn4CAAD__8pciOk) best known for playing Jennifer Marlowe on _WKRP in Cincinnati_ , died Sunday in Los Angeles at age 79 after a prolonged illness, her family confirmed. A Minnesota native, Anderson earned Emmy and Golden Globe nods for her sharp, savvy take on the iconic role, which helped redefine TV’s portrayal of women in the workplace. She later became a fixture in made-for-TV movies and remained a pop culture icon well into her later years. Anderson is survived by her husband, Bob Flick, two children, and four grandchildren. See [photos of Loni Anderson's life here. ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M-qozAYBfCniTsl5k-Niyw6ZSx0aGmhZZaSmk_NTEzEfNTb-_QX7yvc7Tlw-HH-ntuzcd6F4WIm0NjHNsCaPCDC0g7m06D5D_EFSxe9hwH6GPFpWkaZzKnKqWytcf7diszqHoABz0CXlRRcKbZT2ajLqqZ9Z5nqbC1LaTpa817UnFUSVEUhc3pbo4rKklLBqkJxaytRUrXjghshiaBgHcal-BddwBF6_95IRRenzOsRcU6E7wlrCGvWdS3W-cNtJWENBIQFjQsTBCSsSQAm2CckgEBYM48RY8p9DC43wcKS4hY_bvzP-fev--N0vF4Px9uen2770-VwF4Q12aLtvDrvXdpVRNBhMs5_W_BHB740-woAAP__mPWDjg)

The show would run for 32 more years, but only one episode from the 1950s still exists. Today, we bring you the story of a 92-year-old Ohio man who in all--over six decades. We are sponsored today by , offering a pre-IPO investment opportunity to The Flyover readers. | Netanyahu Orders Full Takeover of Gaza Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu approved a on Monday, aiming to force Hamas to release roughly 50 remaining hostages. The move follows the release of disturbing Hamas videos showing emaciated hostages, including 24-year-old Evyatar David, sparking . Netanyahu to push the plan forward, despite warnings it could endanger hostages and worsen Gaza’s humanitarian crisis. Former Israeli security chiefs denounced the move as a political gamble and called for a negotiated end to the 21-month war. DOJ Launches Russiagate Grand Jury Probe Attorney General Pam Bondi has into allegations that top Obama-era intelligence officials conspired to falsely link President Trump to Russia in the 2016 presidential election. The probe follows a criminal referral from Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, who recently declassified intelligence documents she says were suppressed by deep state actors. The investigation could target though no charges have been filed. Actress Loni Anderson Dies at 79 Loni Anderson, best known for playing Jennifer Marlowe on WKRP in Cincinnati , died Sunday in Los Angeles at age 79 after a prolonged illness, her family confirmed. A Minnesota native, Anderson earned Emmy and Golden Globe nods for her sharp, savvy take on the iconic role, which helped redefine TV’s portrayal of women in the workplace. She later became a fixture in made-for-TV movies and remained a pop culture icon well into her later years. Anderson is survived by her husband, Bob Flick, two children, and four grandchildren. name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: Chelation: There will be side effects, truly amazing ones...
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1933217/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdEh1WDd0Wk5NUQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDU/LbmNsa05CU3ZtOQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTUFTcmtxRlhwTVBscw/gaJHbvg/s3q5f8cd782)
Dear Friend, Artery plaque could have been a death sentence for John — and a catastrophe for his grieving family.

Cholesterol in his artery walls was clogging his circulatory system, restricting blood flow to vital organs, and setting the stage for a disaster.

Left alone, it had the power to turn John — a living, breathing human being — into a fading memory — another heart statistic.

Who knows? John might have been one of the fortunate ones. His plaque might just have triggered a mild heart or brain problem, leaving him diminished, but still alive.

Or, if he was really lucky, he might have escaped with a lifetime sentence of doctor visits and drugs that may cause skin rashes, insomnia, depression, kidney damage, and even rob him of his sexuality.

But now, this once-savage killer is as harmless as a teaspoon of sugar.

Because a few hours ago, John swallowed three, tiny capsules containing an amino acid so safe that the United States Food and Drug Administration has approved it as an additive to baby food.

It entered his bloodstream, seeking out the rogue calcium deposits that had glued plaque to his artery walls.

Then, in an act of supreme irony, the very blood that this plaque had once blocked swept it to his kidneys where it was unceremoniously evicted from John's body as a component of urine.

**There will be side effects.**
**Truly _amazing_ ones!**

This remarkable amino acid did not just help remove plaque from John's cardiac arteries, it also helped scrub every one of the 75,000 miles of arteries, veins, capillaries, and microscopic arterioles in his body.

Now, nutrient-rich, life-giving blood is coursing to places it hadn't reached in years.

And suddenly, cells throughout his body are being nourished including...

**> >** The brain cells that control learning, reasoning, coordination, and memory

**> >** Nerve endings and painful joints

**> >** Entire organs — from his eyes and ears... to his heart, lungs and liver... to his stomach, pancreas and intestines — and even his sexual organs

**> >** Extremities — arms and hands, legs and feet are now being warmed by supplies of life-giving blood...

**> >** Skin that was thinning and weakening with each passing year is regaining the smoothness, elasticity, and youthful glow it had 10, 20, even 30 years ago...

**> >** As his body rallies, even the fatigue that began plaguing him after age 50 is giving way; replaced by vibrant new energy.

**Four little letters are changing John's life.**
**They should be changing YOURS!**

So what is this miracle of nature? This 23-cent capsule that works such heart wonders?

Scientists call it "ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid." But please don't be put off by the hard to pronounce name. The rest of us refer to it with four little letters: "E–D–T–A."

EDTA, first synthesized in Germany in 1935, is a simple amino acid, very similar in composition to common household vinegar.

In medical studies, EDTA has been shown to be extremely safe. In fact, EDTA is so safe for humans, the American Heart Association recommends large direct intravenous injections as treatment for people who have been exposed to toxic levels of lead, mercury, aluminum, and cadmium.

More than 200,000 children in the U.S. have undergone chelation therapy as treatment for lead poisoning.

Both the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) approve it for use in foods that are enjoyed by everyone from our youngest babies to our oldest seniors.

EDTA is used every day to help stabilize fats, oils, and vitamins... to keep potato products from turning brown... to keep fish and shellfish looking fresh in the supermarket... to preserve the flavor and consistency of milk products... to preserve canned vegetables... to keep beer from exploding in your face when you open the can... to preserve the flavor of soft drinks... and much, much more.

When a doctor administers intravenous EDTA, the procedure is called "chelation therapy." The word "chelation" is taken from the Greek word for "claw" — the EDTA grabs and dispatches toxins in your body like an eagle's claw grabs its prey.

In 1955, research conducted at the Providence Hospital in Detroit, Michigan, found that EDTA can help claw away rogue calcium in your joints, kidneys, and the bones of your inner ear. And that which glues cholesterol deposits to the inner walls of your arteries.

In fact, scientific tests have shown that EDTA can eliminate calcium from plaque, help clogs to soften, let go, and be flushed away!

Put simply, chelation therapy is widely known to be a viable remedy for heart, joint, kidney, and even hearing problems!

U.S. medical associations — including the American College for Advancement in Medicine (ACAM) are dedicated to training doctors in the use of chelation therapy to improve hardening of the arteries and other chronic degenerative issues.

---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Our Founder, Guy Short, has a [huge announcement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskT9r6zAURz-NvCXIkiXbg4bHM96SwONBR3EjXScq-mNkOabfvrhNto5d77kcOPzeTvoEzrt4O0NAVaakLVpnoKDVEbfFYymY9RVNCggxbRGzZpSJA-0OVOi_47R6P6A9p3iZMS66rqyaEBnyClXdiob3tJayuivgEloB0oDoetrJtubU9L0RVogGESqndjPtqKgpl1Qcu75nzExmstADXC1pKFpXUj6-JxfLHSf_kR6YjyaFyqt7KfNC-B_CRsJGFx-4lB8-d8zHtQS9pDUbJHwYXtGEyR0EtG4NhA-XLaI9nNA6eCIDYQZ3i4QP47fzBVIsGAvhwz8Ei3l53gvm3fR_vAxMd7RhosrKzpvz3i2yJQ29BXD-q6H80gQPxT4DAAD__y7doFU) for you below. I hope you'll take a few minutes to find out how you can own _The Flyover_. -- Cole, _CEO_

And every morning, _The Flyover_ is there--delivering honest, fact-based news without spin or hidden agendas. But what if you could do more than just read the news you believe in? Yesterday, we launched an [opportunity for you to invest in it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskT9r6zAURz-NvCXIkiXbg4bHM96SwONBR3EjXScq-mNkOabfvrhNto5d77kcOPzeTvoEzrt4O0NAVaakLVpnoKDVEbfFYymY9RVNCggxbRGzZpSJA-0OVOi_47R6P6A9p3iZMS66rqyaEBnyClXdiob3tJayuivgEloB0oDoetrJtubU9L0RVogGESqndjPtqKgpl1Qcu75nzExmstADXC1pKFpXUj6-JxfLHSf_kR6YjyaFyqt7KfNC-B_CRsJGFx-4lB8-d8zHtQS9pDUbJHwYXtGEyR0EtG4NhA-XLaI9nNA6eCIDYQZ3i4QP47fzBVIsGAvhwz8Ei3l53gvm3fR_vAxMd7RhosrKzpvz3i2yJQ29BXD-q6H80gQPxT4DAAD__y7doFU). In the past, this kind of opportunity would have been reserved for venture capitalists on Wall Street. But we're opening it up to our 2.5 million loyal readers. More than 70 million readers are looking for more honest news. This is your chance to invest as we prepare to reach them. We've already shown we have what it takes. Our media platform is growing 611% year-over-year, driving industry-leading engagement, and proving that Americans are hungry for a new kind of news. Now, we're inviting you to take the next step in this journey with us. For the first time, you can own a piece of the news you trust. subject: Abbott Orders Arrests, Another Moon Mission, and Longhorns No. 1
body:
Fewer than 100 members of the Texas House were present—the number required for a quorum— when the chamber convened yesterday afternoon. Dozens of Democrats fled the state Sunday to block consideration of a congressional redistricting plan that favors Republicans in 30 of the state’s 38 districts.

## Abbott Orders Arrest of Absent Democrats
Fewer than 100 members of the Texas House were present—the number [required for a quorum](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEGvmzAQhH8N3DayjR2SA4dIFYdWr6dKPaIFL8GSwWh3X3jv31fkL_S20o5m5pu_H8MHppy2529cqdOvuQwbHZJJlXjAcSyqhSOxIDOJCm5FFxqccQHMDUwYIqb8Pfg6dqOJd1tTZ9vgm7ttXVsv3dW4Jt5pjp6u5urn2-i9p9i244xo77ZO3WlmbiZYa2wIlzmOpgmNC0hk5hgqbygmLXzRhZS-UOb8XV7El6msde4W1V2q5lG5vnL9cRyXVbbzV7meNviUyvUnVOX6veSkaTrPpXwKQaS1TIwqgEyAsBWQpRyAChOfUszAFJMop0nT9oRXUQIUeBcBUVQC5VJ2YoFnAZyVGHShMx4ZHg_788-vH23NXdyPlHOSa1t581wx5TeB_t_ur879CwAA___MnJuD)—when the chamber convened yesterday afternoon. Dozens of Democrats fled the state Sunday to block consideration of a congressional redistricting plan that favors Republicans in 30 of the state’s 38 districts. Speaker Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) said the absent Democratic members had "abandoned their posts and turned their backs on the constituents they swore to represent." He [added](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL8GZ4ygbcZ2QHCJs730QquB9hgJgwW9692_P3l-YeOSquq9fx_rB8YU8-svHmT5eytrpqslYqa6onOFudRAtWGt1LhhLrzTCgqMVJNUZg0Y0886dME6FWbdkdWjGfpZjzB2u9UKnA5ops2EpzPDrL0zGLTvtwlnhC7au0xNymittDGPLTjVmx4MEqktGDEoCpFLffBOTN_YtvRTvqg-fDm6ZHfms4n-j4BFwHJd1yM7f1PcuYDlLCly9E3AAgqekhJ5jiULWCqF2LhGzzG_pE_YdknNY0KmJt9bMtBRfEVusnm8tchK56dL0WOWe_lsJKvPCADTc-yqDecVU4rtOYpBvQ6M6f2Tf2f3y8L_AAAA___SuJLI) that "leaving the state does not stop this House from doing its work, it only delays it." Those present approved motions authorizing law enforcement to [compel the attendance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOqO1wYALF9fQ5dor0YKX2JLBkb0JydufyP8IfzfSSN_om3-3-YYhhuP-F3ey_N7SfNBZIjFTnnFZEnPKjnLBnKlwwSOxp1mB0gJGAXp2GOJn7mpnF3BG1mTloLvWyEENtbcGu3XsepBm0avZQEPf9q0hs0oaFlR1sBcMRtBSgtS62dwCrW6VRiLYnK46IBc45YY9Mb2xbPGTXpSbNe11tJ75Uar2T6WmSk3neTYf9CldbaWmS6dSE2YOa6QrfhHCp2chEUp5UhE_cuLEnPHgIpSEEcCAbDzvsc7WPc4QYyj9UHVw3zHE7zj_7rKXVf8DAAD__1RAgXo) of absent members. Shortly thereafter, Gov. Greg Abbott followed through on his promise to order the arrest of Democrats who fled the state. On Sunday, Abbott said he would also direct Attorney General Ken Paxton to initiate lawsuits to [vacate the seats](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngc7INjiEwsU1dLn2SmR718GSYZG9geTtT7l7hL8eaTTf_HksD5dy2p-_3YaW35GWHa-akRnL4rwnZiqApbpSsHJ1O_GKi5baCHkX0izgUv4sQwvWS5hUi1aNZugnNeqxXS2GYCa8e-29AgheQZjMLXgPMKGUvk32Wybv0igllTFdBC9702vjEGUE0wwSITGVjldkfLsa84dOLF2grc12ZT5q0_9q9Nzo-bquLtL7q_jmjZ4PyolTqI2e_4MErwUd415FwY1OFCu9KgrArYpYaBMUYwooIuVMV9qfAorbHKcgAA9X-FVQuJMSiJMY22LhuFLOqd7GZpDPzaX8bxz_7NLT6r8BAAD__wTCkd4) of absent members. He further suggested that Democrats who solicited or accepted donations to cover potential fines could be prosecuted for bribery.
## Kerr County Officials Discuss Tax Rate, Pay Raises
The Kerr County Commissioners Court [met yesterday morning](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpDAMRL_GZJ6yDT6YgOASsr30QkpgeXCtsShZuwx_f8X9wiYK1FX9uvvvx_wBKafy-gM7jvKONBc8a0YR5BmWhUSIA3IFZqxSoZBsODvjvDaDNn4OkPI1d00YFxOetsHR9r5rn7Z3fbONC5rFPhHXtQ2tgcH6HnuwLUaMQ-xik8bbzAzGW2us948YFtP61nlANDF41RkMSYgfsqHgG2rMF30jP1bamzxuIkdV7W_lJuWm8zwfnxXkFpWb7jbKTZlWyMpNN0q5yQz36ZSbDqYDWS4t8NYMgnqFvH5lkESlaqFDfyKzXumryKVX2vdUa6KCXO8ni4YXlgDa6p2KbBqiIOuYicJNbngMx5lyTvVXrzrz2iHl_8nlZ3t_j-5fAAAA__-RHZgc)—one month after flash floods killed at least 108 along the Guadalupe River—to discuss tax rates, budgets, and potential wage increases for the upcoming fiscal year. Commissioners are meeting again this morning. Tax Assessor-Collector Bob Reeves said adopting the same property tax rate as last year would result in an additional $155 in taxes for the average homeowner. He was previously authorized to calculate a tax rate 8% higher than last year’s due to the state disaster declaration. Meanwhile, Texas Equusearch founder Tim Miller [reflected on his time in Kerrville](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3yoyAUBfCn0Q4HUGIsKLaxy7ZbOnxcIrMI2ctVk7ffMa_w78_85pzz57E8TEwxP3-bDTS9Q1kynDUBEeBirC1EBT1gNYhQqZpcaIVFcqkYvzOuFm9i-ixD67XlfhItaDGqoZ_EKMd21Wpy3lo3Wsd7biwXRljvjBhUcErdpzbqC-N3roTgQqkueMt71UtlAHjwqhk4-EgFO1qB4G1qSJ9yAHaubG3SK9GrNv2vRs6NnM_z7EJ5y9ta9kolX6FGzteqRs4UN7bFlABZKHv2gMxHZF-Vwb99r2DQrQwhJHBUWcnAtpJpZTVmB8zDYSoZivnJQirFV_YXEI_LbFH71xlTivU2NgN_biamb0n62bWHlv8DAAD__4Nfk_U) following last month’s flooding, saying he "couldn’t believe the devastation." ## Texas Startup Awarded Another Moon Mission
Firefly Aerospace, the Cedar Park startup that became the first commercial company to achieve a successful lunar landing in March, has been awarded a [$176.7 million NASA contract](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOgzAUAE8DnZG_EBcutqHLtlsiEz_Dk4wd2U8h3H6VvcL2oxlpfu7L3WPCvH37Axy9Y1kynC0BEdTFr2shKjVAbb5WaNR8LrTDIrk0jN8YN0vwmK5F98GtPFjRgxOT0cqKSU797kY7WgCljbBRTQrCQ8tRWj7KyaoAoUf3kfEbN0JwYcwQw8qVUdJ4AB6D6TSHgFTqQDsQvH2L6SovqMOjHH1yO9Gzdeqrk3Mn5_M8h5guzNvhtw_RyTlihZguVuEB-ILGNO0s--bZUUpmB7aGJXdy7qsLzxNTwjZOnebb4TH9Zeh_c15O_gYAAP__zA56bw) to deliver a payload to the lunar south pole. Scheduled for 2029, the 12-day mission will be Firefly’s [fourth for NASA](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2uqzAUBODVmA7k3zgULl5Dl9feEh3wIbZkbGSfhGT3V8kWbjfSSN9I83ObbxBTzPf_sKOj11bmjGdLSIR1hmUpRKV6rA1qxUYNcqGAs-TS9PzaczN7iOk96867hftRdOiENVqNwkrbBWes0VpI3LREtYyA_mqVgnHxqK0Qvovug_ErN0JwYcyw-YUro6QBRL55wzRHH6nUgQISvqBt6V2eWIe17F1ygehoTP1jcmJyOs9zWEMt-dMyOa2PRI-KTE5QKa7pk75Iv5eS-z22FkvuMzToJbfjRdvLcISjq84fZ0wptotlmt93iOm7SH_76enkbwAAAP__BpR9iQ), which has enlisted the company to send its Blue Ghost lunar lander to the far side of the moon in 2026 and to the moon’s Gruithuisen Domes in 2028. Blue Ghost will [carry two rovers and other instruments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU9jOiPb4AUKF2noNm1KNOBhsWQYZE9guX1Eilwg9fvRe9_Xc3hCiGF7fcKKjt8zDRueOSIzpgHGkZgpeUwZUsLMGTbiBQejjJWqlcoOHkK8hrrwblS-0wU63di66nRjmmJxukX0YzO11iio21ZNte2M9QZQPcZJF8HdZapVVmulrS1nP6rKVsYCopq9FbVCH5hSyQsyviHP8aIDUznRWkS3MO9ZVB_C9ML053mWa4iBIV2AifIOE95OYfqFVhSmvx8K01tbqUfbNcL0c0g4x0v-BSST9BjDgUnO4UC5QQa5wxUJfL7VlWjLMtM3L3KniEVyfj9DjCE_GlGr1woh_i7k_3E9nPkJAAD__49xj8M) to analyze lunar dust and measure radiation, heat, and the distances to orbiting spacecraft. "_These investigations will produce critical knowledge required for long-term sustainability_ ," said a NASA representative. Firefly contracted with SpaceX to deploy its lunar lander during its first mission, but the company envisions using its own rockets in the future. Firefly has filed for an [initial public offering](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGuqzAQRVdjOtDYMHFSuPgNXX77SmTjcbBkMLJHIez-iWzhdUe60rnS-XlOTxtT3F7_7UqGPyFPGx01ETOVyTqXmXPxVKothSpXu2VeaFKgsIV7Czh5G9M5DY03DvxDNmSkxqF_SK10sxinAt762zAQBi3BE2oEhTbAI6DDvonmksEdUEqQiF3wDnrsFVoiCB7FAOQj59LxQkwfW0M685tKN-e1SWZh3qvo_wk1CjUex9HNm5uvUajxcgs1gr74LtQYYqGQztZSyXW3M7Vxz-2XuoXX1BTj9yOmFOtNiwFeq43p-8R_6_M26jcAAP__3yl4_w) that values the company at around $5.5 billion.

Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Abbott Orders Arrest of Absent Democrats Fewer than 100 members of the Texas House were present—the number —when the chamber convened yesterday afternoon. Dozens of Democrats fled the state Sunday to block consideration of a congressional redistricting plan that favors Republicans in 30 of the state’s 38 districts. Speaker Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) said the absent Democratic members had "abandoned their posts and turned their backs on the constituents they swore to represent." He that "leaving the state does not stop this House from doing its work, it only delays it." Those present approved motions authorizing law enforcement to of absent members. Shortly thereafter, Gov. Greg Abbott followed through on his promise to order the arrest of Democrats who fled the state. On Sunday, Abbott said he would also direct Attorney General Ken Paxton to initiate lawsuits to of absent members. He further suggested that Democrats who solicited or accepted donations to cover potential fines could be prosecuted for bribery. Kerr County Officials Discuss Tax Rate, Pay Raises The Kerr County Commissioners Court —one month after flash floods killed at least 108 along the Guadalupe River—to discuss tax rates, budgets, and potential wage increases for the upcoming fiscal year. Commissioners are meeting again this morning. Tax Assessor-Collector Bob Reeves said adopting the same property tax rate as last year would result in an additional $155 in taxes for the average homeowner. He was previously authorized to calculate a tax rate 8% higher than last year’s due to the state disaster declaration. Meanwhile, Texas Equusearch founder Tim Miller following last month’s flooding, saying he "couldn’t believe the devastation." News outlets have compiled and a timeline of prior to the flooding. Several analyses of why the flooding was have also been published. Texas Startup Awarded Another Moon Mission Firefly Aerospace, the Cedar Park startup that became the first commercial company to achieve a successful lunar landing in March, has been awarded a to deliver a payload to the lunar south pole. Scheduled for 2029, the 12-day mission will be Firefly’s , which has enlisted the company to send its Blue Ghost lunar lander to the far side of the moon in 2026 and to the moon’s Gruithuisen Domes in 2028. Blue Ghost will to analyze lunar dust and measure radiation, heat, and the distances to orbiting spacecraft. "These investigations will produce critical knowledge required for long-term sustainability ," said a NASA representative. Firefly contracted with SpaceX to deploy its lunar lander during its first mission, but the company envisions using its own rockets in the future. Firefly has filed for an that values the company at around $5.5 billion. | Flying together with our sponsor Your Life Story Shouldn’t Be On ChatGPT Ever searched your name on Google or asked ChatGPT about yourself? . body:

| Today, voters across Michigan are heading to the polls, reminding us again that it's more important than ever to protect the integrity of our elections.
That's why MICOVA (Michigan Citizens Only Voting Amendment) is working to amend the state constitution to require photo ID to vote and ensure **only U.S. citizens** can vote in Michigan elections, at every level.
We are currently collecting signatures to make this critical initiative a reality. **And today is a perfect day to take action (after you vote, of course).**
✅ Sign the Petition
✅ Volunteer to Gather Signatures
✅ Tell Friends and Neighbors
Your voice matters, and so does your action.
Whether you're voting today or just looking for a way to make a difference, you can help secure our elections so that every vote in Michigan belongs to a U.S. citizen. Visit www.MichCov.com to find out how to get involved and follow us on Facebook ([@citizensonlyMichigan](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=eccfe201ee&e=ecf60db114)) for updates from the campaign.
**Need Voting Info?**
\- Polls are open until 8 p.m.
\- You can register and vote at your local clerk's office, even today. Just bring proof of residency.
\- Visit [Michigan.gov/Vote](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=a4201ad7ed&e=ecf60db114) for details.
**Let's make sure Michigan elections stay citizen-only.**
**Thank you for standing with MICOV.**

---
|
---
| We are going to need our entire grassroots nation to get out and support this effort. Go to our website to sign up for updates, like and follow us on social media and help us spread the word. This issue will be critical to 2026 and we need you!

# The Heart of TFVC
---
| |
---
| Team TFVC has been making big strides through our Outreach Coordinator program! In just two years since launching our groundbreaking volunteer training initiative, we have **trained more than 80 dedicated advocates** across Texas. Our Outreach Coordinators (OCs) are among our organization’s greatest assets, and we invest in them wholeheartedly. When you commit to engaging with us regularly (3–6 hours per month), we commit to YOU by providing comprehensive training, ongoing support, and essential resources. Whether you’re a **seasoned advocate or brand new** , we have the tools to help you grow into the most impactful advocate you can be. Our current team averages **an incredible 60 outreach encounters every month**! From attending networking events and engaging in local government to hosting community gatherings, participating in election-focused activities, connecting with local businesses and healthcare offices, and assisting with internal organizational needs - **Team TFVC is truly a force to be reckoned with**. Words can’t express how grateful we are for our Outreach Coordinators; they are the **backbone of our mission**. If you’re looking for a meaningful way to make a real difference, consider joining us as an Outreach Coordinator. Experience what it’s like to be an integral part of the most successful state-level medical liberty organization in the country!

name: Chef Andrew Gruel
subject: A Chef’s Take: How we fix our food and our planet
body:
As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjsc5p1o6eiall6q2f3qusrq7o1judbrburffo70_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i60pb4c5h2bs)
Friend,

>From the kitchen to the coastline, I’ve seen the power of sustainability firsthand.

As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

Because when we protect our environment, we’re not just saving trees or oceans. We’re preserving access to clean air, clean water, and real food packed with nutrients.

At my restaurants, I’ve built everything around sustainability, sourcing traceable seafood, supporting responsible aquaculture, and working directly with ranchers and fishermen who care about long-term health over short-term gain.

But no chef, no restaurant, and no individual can do this alone.

We need a national movement to fight for clean water, regenerative agriculture, and responsible stewardship.

That’s where the American Conservation Coalition (ACC) comes in.

**ACC is leading the charge for a cleaner, more sustainable America — _without_ the heavy hand of government mandates.**

They’re building a movement of young, pro-environment conservatives who believe we can protect both our health and our freedoms.

I’m so passionate about their approach that I told the American Conservation Coalition I would help them raise $10,000 before the end of the month to support their mission.

[Please join me today in supporting ACC by donating any amount you can generously afford to support a healthier, more beautiful America! Even $10 makes a difference. >>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg5de25d1fo4s5p3hrrji3jr27n8kcjbq7k2tlr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i60pb4c5h2bs)

The American Conservation Coalition is building the conservative environmental movement. Their goals? To:

👩🏻🌾 **Restore regenerative farming practices** rooted in health and sustainability
🏞️ **Conserve America’s natural resources** for future generations
☣️ **Reduce toxins** in our food, water, and air
✅ **Promote real solutions** that create healthy communities and families

ACC empowers young conservatives to join the national discussion concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, regenerative agriculture, and more.

With over 80,000 members, ACC branches complete local clean-up projects, influence local, state, and national environmental policy, and drive change that embraces common-sense solutions to the health crises and environmental problems we face.

Friend, this isn’t about politics.

It’s about conserving the things that nourish us – our land, oceans, and our children’s future – _not through mandates or government overreach_ , but by protecting what makes this country beautiful.

**If you believe that thoughtful conservation can heal ecosystems and communities, then I urge you to support the American Conservation Coalition by donating today!**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Stop Noncitizen Voting—Starting in Your Neighborhood
body:
August is Only Citizens Vote Month—join the petition drive and take action where it counts most.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** ******** Our elections should be decided by **American citizens --and no one else.** But because of loopholes in the federal voter registration process, **noncitizens can register to vote in every state** --and states are **required by law to accept** those flawed federal forms. That's why we're organizing **national petition drives on August 9th and 15th**, and we need your help to make them a success. ** ** **The goal:** Gather as many signatures as possible demanding Congress pass the SAVE Act to close registration loopholes. Then on **September 10th** , we'll have a rally and then take every name collected and **hand-deliver the stack directly to Members of Congress** in Washington, D.C. Whether you gather signatures from a few friends or canvass your whole neighborhood, **you 'll be making a real difference. If you're ready to sign up to gather signatures, **[**use this form to let us know**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad098fdc/1edb9794acffb669)**.** Need help getting started? Join one of our on-demand webinars focused on **door-to-door petition gathering** (times listed in Eastern):
* **[Friday, August 8, 10:00 AM ET](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad098fdc/1edb9794acffb66b)**
* **[Monday, August 11, 6:00 PM ET](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad098fdc/1edb9794acffb66d)**
We also offer **on-demand training webinars for other activities** --like sign-waving, small gatherings, communication, and more. Whichever part you need help with, we've got you covered. **[Check those out here.](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad098fdc/1edb9794acffb66f "Check those out here.")** ** ** If you haven't yet signed the petition, you can [**sign it today**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad098fdc/1edb9794acffb671). We're delivering these petitions to Congress by hand--your name should be in that stack. Let's make it count. Thank you! Together we'll make sure that only American citizens vote in American elections! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin __**** ****

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| **** ******************** ********
__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---

name: Chef Andrew Gruel
subject: A Chef’s Take: How we fix our food and our planet
body:
As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjqk3reel23m0kabjbj0lcomok7knf6j6egnb370_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)
Friend,

>From the kitchen to the coastline, I’ve seen the power of sustainability firsthand.

As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

Because when we protect our environment, we’re not just saving trees or oceans. We’re preserving access to clean air, clean water, and real food packed with nutrients.

At my restaurants, I’ve built everything around sustainability, sourcing traceable seafood, supporting responsible aquaculture, and working directly with ranchers and fishermen who care about long-term health over short-term gain.

But no chef, no restaurant, and no individual can do this alone.

We need a national movement to fight for clean water, regenerative agriculture, and responsible stewardship.

That’s where the American Conservation Coalition (ACC) comes in.

**ACC is leading the charge for a cleaner, more sustainable America — _without_ the heavy hand of government mandates.**

They’re building a movement of young, pro-environment conservatives who believe we can protect both our health and our freedoms.

I’m so passionate about their approach that I told the American Conservation Coalition I would help them raise $10,000 before the end of the month to support their mission.

[Please join me today in supporting ACC by donating any amount you can generously afford to support a healthier, more beautiful America! Even $10 makes a difference. >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeuivkbng155l3oe7d4be24d8aspslbiav2qphm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zscdol5d97p07580ig3am7qem0e6rd75r2gj32to_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zafhk34r8dun4scg0r0p6e9btc370on2c8amtcvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zidadop8vjrg5ef8l9vf7cs0aen9b30mg2qctono_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4cqpessmh82q1u203j13jc9dajd5sa76ku8d9e8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1e9qa4fm53mteais2v79qlcu7crkknkljbv3f30_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd62ivggq9pf76i2t5g5iqgonae86ble8l2l428o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0m1u83iu4qkd7eofkhkhg8sgkri7e7hcmo49018_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)
The American Conservation Coalition is building the conservative environmental movement. Their goals? To:

👩🏻🌾 **Restore regenerative farming practices** rooted in health and sustainability
🏞️ **Conserve America’s natural resources** for future generations
☣️ **Reduce toxins** in our food, water, and air
✅ **Promote real solutions** that create healthy communities and families

ACC empowers young conservatives to join the national discussion concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, regenerative agriculture, and more.

With over 80,000 members, ACC branches complete local clean-up projects, influence local, state, and national environmental policy, and drive change that embraces common-sense solutions to the health crises and environmental problems we face.

Friend, this isn’t about politics.

It’s about conserving the things that nourish us – our land, oceans, and our children’s future – _not through mandates or government overreach_ , but by protecting what makes this country beautiful.

**If you believe that thoughtful conservation can heal ecosystems and communities, then I urge you to support the American Conservation Coalition by donating today!**
[Donate Now >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfulo4cku2e1fi8opcsha8jqeu9c2qo4p20rkuvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i68ob4cjh2bs)

Chef Andrew Gruel

subject: MRT (free): Arrest Warrants Issued for AWOL TX House Dems // Paxton Expresses Doubts about Prosecution Options? //…
body:

| |
---|---|---

* **TOP NEWS**

**" Arrest warrants issued for Texas House Democrats breaking quorum to block GOP redistricting vote," **Austin American-Statesman's**John C. Moritz** \-- "Republican House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** issued civil arrest warrants Monday for the more than 50 Democrats who fled Texas to block a vote on the controversial plan to boost the GOP's numbers in Congress by redistricting.

"They've left the state ... and turned their backs on the constituents they swore to represent," Burrows told the mostly Republican**** House members who did attend the floor session. "They've shirked their responsibilities under the direction of pressure of out of state politicians and activists who don't know the first thing about what's right for Texas."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/b48f3f56-a1d2-4788-830a-819553661ba1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Shortly after, Gov.**Greg Abbott** ordered Texas Department of Public Safety officers "to locate, arrest, and return to the House chamber any member who has abandoned their duty to Texans."

The warrants allow law enforcement officers to compel the return of absent members found to be in Texas, but they are not subject to criminal arrest for breaking quorum. They don't authorize officers to go out of state to bring back the dozens of Democrats who decamped to Illinois, New York and Massachusetts to deny the House the quorum it needs to conduct business.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/b48f3f56-a1d2-4788-830a-819553661ba1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Just six of the House's 62 Democratic members were present for the seven-minute floor session.

Burrows, R-Lubbock, told the chamber, and repeated during a brief news conference later, that the House will pass the redistricting plan sooner or later.

The new congressional map proposed by Texas Republicans would add five more winnable GOP seats by wiping out a Democratic-leaning district in Dallas, Austin and Houston, and adding additional Republican voters to two districts in South Texas currently held by Democrats **Henry Cuellar** and**Vicente Gonzalez**.

"Leaving the state does not stop this House from doing its work, it only delays it," the first-term speaker said. "And every day this chamber is unable to act, the cost grows."

The "cost" likely refers to the $500 per day fine that comes with breaking quorum, and which was triggered with the warrants Burrows signed. Under House rules, absent members are required to pay the fines with their own money, which means funds raised for their political accounts may not be tapped.

While Democrats cast their decision to leave the state halfway through the special legislative session called by Abbott as a principled move to protect mostly voters of color from being denied representation in Congress, Burrows noted that the fate of other matters, particularly relief for the Central Texas residents whose lives were upended by last month's deadly flooding, was being jeopardized by their actions.

"You understand that the issue before us, disaster recovery, fighting for the families who lost loved ones in the floods, human trafficking and more, are not abstract policy debates," Burrows said as if he were speaking to the absent Democrats. "They are real world problems demanding immediate solutions."

Democratic state Rep. **Terry Canales** of Edinburg said he stayed in Texas both as an acknowledgement the outcome of redistricting is inevitable and "to have a seat at the table" in case Republicans were in the mood to compromise.

The other Democrats who stayed in Texas were **Richard Raymond** of Laredo, **Amando Martinez** of Weslaco, **Joe Moody** of El Paso, **Oscar Longoria** of Mission, and**Sergio Munoz** also of Mission.

"Nobody could explain to me what the end game was," Canales said in a short interview. "I know how this ends. I can count to 76."

Even if House Democrats block a quorum for until the special session ends on Aug. 19, nothing is stopping Abbott from calling another.

When House Democrats broke quorum in 2021, then-Speaker**Dade Phelan** also issued warrants to bring them back. But Democrats finally returned to Austin voluntarily."
