Peter - We've just uncovered **DISTURBING** evidence: The CIA actively covered up the truth about the origins of COVID, all to serve a political agenda and undermine President Trump. _**_[THIS IS WRONG >>](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/qzU1h4yVoqt4z66LehPpUQqDPv3WeRLDZ6cVCvHerSi-m69UaUfg9dazuahQj07gsrmf6dAhFvT9T4A_FiKg-R20D3RVP3T8kH_9LVYlXH3ts_dTJ3c1SECb9ApsV77ixSU2FXIzNqy7-0eg1AqLixGBbhfxQGvR2JGL5WlhMkkJf3cu6E2OESN8vC1Pegn2uGw91m-xS0FpDdzxqts0Mh1DgO45SHOxBIk_Eea4koO7lL7_GymMfaQok-XwjEY-YF7A-Azr2pcscVAWHdQtqaD1lfNqE7jxr3qy98rY2W3XJGBmzJdDRhWceeXZr86gkh1CqzeNH01a2hdQQacIE_Oqlg76EctG2ysYLkqws56CeKn0lpjWL1DJhAXAI_ZC7l6cB6DVBwjkDnjC7V-KoV1HYtmhnFWu7GjDcabjerlzmn27oe1Gp17QtEvAGmPehMLZ0SaSykVakjwI39fEDJa6HOjCEzhdv27PpR9mXbwIuzkw4l9vTqBjk2tZB8mUkWCu69_w2fyvnYpskEUQqMH0UhVz4QRkdYc-YctoA56h2RFADEnNEtYgFvDlMvcyCGnCWk3rrLDv80DhyCILMiLY2ibyg9Mn4supsUkZFem-y-8okcUWvgS2AHhRfPQTxCk4xPiUkEcIVheJLb8Xsrqn5aMJeZHSCuKaKZwYEXQJr1nIIjhAbp1-H8-kFnO832EBgfUBrDXN/KRZK1xmTiKwh5syYbvcMgyQ9qC6F9LBj/11)_**_

Government analysts at the CIA concluded that COVID likely came from a lab in China. Instead of reporting the facts, their superiors overruled them because the findings aligned with Trump's position that the pandemic resulted from a lab leak.

According to the CIA's own inspector general, anything that was even "too pro-Trump" was silenced. They wanted to avoid anything that could support the president's message, so they buried the facts.

---
[ **STOP THE DEEP STATE** ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/UBUR_59hutaj08SyERTld9vepvdGQ1a8-vXQkP57c0PGd__O-JDkZKOIA_brIOQrEcbsyiFF1QfLD6-oW0gnBUiF-mm3xY4ub9XAK11zOjwEZe3KG9bBK6xjZvkG-8qTrMgJXIe7MNFb0hiortDcswrUZjfFzi0KH1HxdIAX5zq8N22biE0qBX5QLF1wOYBG56frtvLSMPrdH0AtUCVmPzJbE5OruP1T-2GhJVh-YDwgi3UcuNpW4TRbjsvlXUa8ekc59P7zh4694Bj6HT86Cq0ZzelSV_G54Z77zNw4MXw1ABigj0im0C5poCr-1xgg4Mr6yA4zQ47o7P03VopL7tZ31O_SDJ8NfmztjqylsnqHW9GmPL4GzyH53af1Y9VR1s61E0poTBD_YZYgMc3vR8exraeWnRSa-jBxbzs_kSWBDZ6DmKAlvHednlyojdS-ucrHeMdoI0OekFywG11t20MVR_3ouyTRw1TEL3gGg5nYzXvv0Z6WzagAuXJCajamOO3DxXNHg14zQMWe5p0CPkxDWcM0Fc7HtKfuiSFZ2HOH40bkZcZ193wb-STzCCNVxEGY5ZNAhtPOaOUzsqqlYHrsznMhZyNC62A4kqcTZh-yvbqTY9m7YEQtOHVaBusHzeEZMaBsqFdDpEmqVGKUqiMLRrH9JWonAUnSq4EakwG2QWEkQGkXLQUtcOR6YjVTwQXk-HFotBOz/L4gMKbuKTm-eFeZeCiLiKgeecKkP8jwE/11)

Let that sink in: Our own intelligence agencies suppressed the truth, and prioritized politics over the American people's right to know how the pandemic began.

This is beyond unacceptable. _**It 's dangerous.**_

It proves that the Deep State will do ANYTHING to control the narrative--even at the expense of our safety and freedom.

That's why I'm fighting back. I refuse to let the truth be swept under the rug, and I need you in this fight with me.

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Peter - We've just uncovered DISTURBING evidence: The CIA actively covered up the truth about the origins of COVID, all to serve a political agenda and undermine President Trump. Government analysts at the CIA concluded that COVID likely came from a lab in China. Instead of reporting the facts, their superiors overruled them because the findings aligned with Trump's position that the pandemic resulted from a lab leak. According to the CIA's own inspector general, anything that was even "too pro-Trump" was silenced. They wanted to avoid anything that could support the president's message, so they buried the facts. Let that sink in: Our own intelligence agencies suppressed the truth, and prioritized politics over the American people's right to know how the pandemic began. This is beyond unacceptable. It 's dangerous. It proves that the Deep State will do ANYTHING to control the narrative--even at the expense of our safety and freedom. That's why I'm fighting back. subject: PBS was gutted so Trump could upgrade his jet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112774004/561577585/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU2ZjNlMS0wODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Krq63m2vkKTru6bxlA0t62NxVKjFa_W54-D4VYtrzuw=&emci=2a56f3e1-0872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3256f3e1-0872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894) **Republicans in Washington voted to cut $1.1 billion in funding for public media—only to spend as much as $1.1 billion to upgrade the luxury jet the Qatar government gifted Donald Trump.** Derek, this is corruption, plain and simple. While Trump claims that funding for public media is a “waste” of federal dollars, he has no problem spending billions to retrofit a jet for use as Air Force One—and eventually, to use as his own personal plane when he leaves office. Meanwhile, millions of Americans could lose access to the public broadcasting stations they rely on for news, education, and information. _All while footing the bill for Trump’s plane._ Americans are fed up with this corruption—and it has no place in the White House. Chris Deluzio knows that to restore the American Dream, we must first put an end to this taxpayer funded grift. That’s why he’s fighting back every chance he gets to put Western Pennsylvanians first and stop Trump from using our tax dollars for his own personal benefit. clean_body: Republicans in Washington voted to cut $1.1 billion in funding for public media—only to spend as much as $1.1 billion to upgrade the luxury jet the Qatar government gifted Donald Trump. Derek, this is corruption, plain and simple. While Trump claims that funding for public media is a “waste” of federal dollars, he has no problem spending billions to retrofit a jet for use as Air Force One—and eventually, to use as his own personal plane when he leaves office. Meanwhile, millions of Americans could lose access to the public broadcasting stations they rely on for news, education, and information. All while footing the bill for Trump’s plane. Americans are fed up with this corruption—and it has no place in the White House. Chris Deluzio knows that to restore the American Dream, we must first put an end to this taxpayer funded grift. That’s why he’s fighting back every chance he gets to put Western Pennsylvanians first and stop Trump from using our tax dollars for his own personal benefit. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Team Deluzio | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. When do you need to talk to your kids about drugs and alcohol? Sooner than many parents realize! Elle Constantine witnessed
the devastating effects of drugs in her own family and has made it her mission to educate kids and prepare them to say no to drugs
and alcohol.

Author of several children's books that share positive messages through engaging stories, Elle is helping families have hard
conversations. She is the founder of Educate Before Eight, a national prevention movement rooted in early childhood education,
neuroscience, and story-based learning. Like, subscribe and share.

Useful Tips for Protecting Your Children

Our children face attacks on their health in body, mind, and spirit. We cannot shield them from every threat forever; that was
never meant to be our role as parents. But it is our job to protect our children and nurture them as they grow so they can develop
into the people God made them to be.

Read on for tips on meeting the unique challenges of our culture and raising strong, patriotic children!

clean_body: When is the right time to discuss difficult subjects with your kids? How do you protect them from the serious dangers they face in our culture? That and more in this week's newsletter! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] August 5, 2025 • Newsletter When to Talk to Kids about Drugs Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] When do you need to talk to your kids about drugs and alcohol? Sooner than many parents realize! Elle Constantine witnessed the devastating effects of drugs in her own family and has made it her mission to educate kids and prepare them to say no to drugs and alcohol. Author of several children's books that share positive messages through engaging stories, Elle is helping families have hard conversations. She is the founder of Educate Before Eight, a national prevention movement rooted in early childhood education, neuroscience, and story-based learning. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Useful Tips for Protecting Your Children Our children face attacks on their health in body, mind, and spirit. We cannot shield them from every threat forever; that was never meant to be our role as parents. But it is our job to protect our children and nurture them as they grow so they can develop into the people God made them to be. Read on for tips on meeting the unique challenges of our culture and raising strong, patriotic children! Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. name: The Democratic Party
subject: Our Senate roadmap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, To stop Trump’s agenda in its tracks, we _need_ to take back the Senate. Today, we’re going to ask you to [**make a contribution to the DNC to support that work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250805_4188_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4189_22930333_ZC3XKc&akid=4189%2E22930333%2EZC3XKc) But first, we’re going to share exactly what it will take to win a Senate majority: 🔵 We need to defend Jon Ossoff’s seat in Georgia, in what will undoubtedly be a very tight race. 🔵 We need to hold open Democratic-held seats in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire. 🔴 We need to win an open Republican-held seat in North Carolina — a state where nail-biter elections are the norm. 🔴 We need to flip at least three more Republican-held seats in states like Maine, Ohio, and Texas. **Winning all of these races will require strong statewide organizing programs. It will also require us putting in the work _now_ to reach voters and ensure they’re hearing Democrats’ message.** That’s exactly what we’re focused on. We recently launched our Organizing Summer program, which is working _right now_ to register voters, train volunteers, and make sure Americans are aware of the harm Trump is inflicting. We’re investing $1 million a month in Democratic state parties to ensure they’ve got the resources they need on the local and state level. We’ve held more than 130 town halls in all 50 states, listening to voters in every part of the country. [**But this is just the beginning. Derek, can we count on you to chip in $3 to the DNC today to help fund our long-term work? Your donation will help us build the infrastructure to flip the Senate and check Trump’s power:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?am=3&refcode=em_20250805_4188_fr&refcode2=4189_22930333_ZC3XKc&akid=4189%2E22930333%2EZC3XKc) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250805_4188_fr&refcode2=4189_22930333_ZC3XKc&akid=4189%2E22930333%2EZC3XKc)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: How far we’ve come
body:
Since being elected in November of 2022, we’ve come so far.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)
Hi Peter, it’s Wes Moore.
I am a combat veteran, a father, and the first Black governor of Maryland.
I’m writing to show you how far we’ve come since I was first elected in November of 2022. It’s been a long, tough journey, but we’ve accomplished so much for Maryland together.
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today so we can continue doing more to make this Maryland’s decade?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250805-1?refcode=em-20250805-1&refcode2=413_1086043_pe9fR1&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)**
We’ve made _real_ progress in building our vision for Maryland:
* Record public school funding,
* Supporting federal workers,
* Passing bipartisan public safety reforms,
* _And more._

Here’s the catch: **Maryland has only elected one other Democratic governor in the last 20 years.** With Trump targeting states like ours, we can’t take _anything_ for granted.
In case you were wondering, here’s what it looked like three years ago when Maryland had a Republican governor. He vetoed...
* An increased minimum wage,
* Landmark education reform and expansion of pre-K,
* Better sick leave and paid medical and family leave,
* _And background checks to prevent gun violence._

If we want to keep moving forward — and protect everything we’ve built — _we need to power this campaign with grassroots support._
That starts with you, Peter.
**[Every grassroots donation helps us kick off August strong and keep building programs that serve Maryland's communities. Can I count on you to chip in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250805-1?refcode=em-20250805-1&refcode2=413_1086043_pe9fR1&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250805-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250805-1&refcode2=413_1086043_pe9fR1&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)**
Thank you.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250805-1?refcode=em-20250805-1&refcode2=413_1086043_pe9fR1&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250805-1&t=2&refcode2=413_1086043_pe9fR1&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=413%2E1086043%2Epe9fR1)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

subject: They cut my mic. Big mistake. HUGE.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
The terrified Republicans at the Texas Capitol literally refused to let me speak at last weekend’s hearing. 😂
Guess we’ve gotten under their skin.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They Want Me Silent—But I’m Fighting for Trump’s America. Will You Stand With Me?
body:
The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don’t care who’s in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that’s eating away at our country. And what I’ve found in recent weeks? It’s enough to make your blood boil.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2548hut1bnnoa5ft2h4m751pju6k1uccev6sdfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvnra012utde8o3e1arp9rhs7rs7u1l5surtfjog_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

My name is Laura Loomer, and I'm not your typical journalist. I don't sit in a cushy newsroom parroting talking points for the elite. I'm out there, in the trenches, exposing the corruption, betrayal, and deep-state sabotage that threatens everything President Trump has fought for--and everything we believe in. I'm a fighter, a patriot, and a relentless truth-teller. But right now, I'm writing to you [**because I can 't keep this fight alive without your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqj8lv9co4vo3hqvc5gq4j5ibc6u856djjcjbt2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs).

Let me tell you why I do this. I've seen the lies, the cover-ups, and the cowardice firsthand. The mainstream media won't touch the stories I uncover--they're too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don't care who's in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that's eating away at our country. And what I've found in recent weeks? **It 's enough to make your blood boil.**

**The Stories They Don 't Want You to Hear**

* **Summits of the Americas Turned Into a Woke Disaster**
Picture this: a gathering meant to strengthen America's position in the world, hijacked by Biden holdovers like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings. These traitors are turning the Summits of the Americas into a pro-China, woke circus. I went down there myself, tracked their moves, and uncovered how they're undermining Trump's America First policies to cozy up to Communist China. They thought they could get away with it--but I'm making sure the world knows their names and their shame.

* **An Obama Loyalist Sabotaging Trump 's Iran Strategy**
Then there's Nathanael Swanson. This guy's an Obama-era relic, still slinking around the State Department's Iran negotiation team like a snake in the grass. Trump took a hard line against Iran--sanctions, strength, no compromise. But Swanson? He's working behind the scenes to unravel it all, putting our national security on the line. I've spent sleepless nights piecing together the paper trail of all Biden holdovers who remain inside the Trump admin, and I'm not stopping until they are all out of there for good.

* **Dan Goldman and the Democrat Cover-Up Machine**
Ever heard of Rep. Dan Goldman? He's a slick operator shielding violent Democrats like LaMonica McIver while orchestrating lawfare against Trump. I caught wind of this when I started digging into McIver's trail of chaos--Goldman's been running interference, protecting his own while the Democrats try to bury Trump under legal attacks. I've got the receipts, and I'm exposing their game one bombshell at a time.

* **Democrats Ignoring Pro-Hamas Violence**
Two Israeli diplomats were murdered in D.C. by a pro-Hamas terrorist. Two lives snuffed out, and what did Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib do? Nothing. Not a word of condemnation. They're silent because they're complicit, enabling Jew hatred and Islamic terrorism while pretending to care about justice. I've been on the ground, talking to sources, documenting every disgusting detail. They can't hide from me--and I won't let them.

* **A DEI Judge Blocking Trump 's Vision**
And then there's Judge Myong J. Joun, a Biden appointee whose family rakes in cash from DEI consulting. This guy had the nerve to block Trump's order to dismantle the Department of Education--a move that would've freed our kids from woke indoctrination. I dug into his family's financial ties, and it's clear: this isn't justice, it's a paycheck. I'm fighting to get that story out there, because our children deserve better.

**Why I Need You**

These aren't just stories--they're battles. Every day, I'm taking on the deep state, the media, and the woke mob. They hate me for it. They've tried to censor me, smear me, shut me down. But I don't flinch. I don't back off. Because this isn't about me--**it 's about you, your family, and the future of America**. It's about protecting Trump's America First agenda from the cowards and traitors trying to tear it apart.

Here's the raw truth: I don't have corporate sponsors or billionaire sugar daddies bankrolling me. I'm funded by people like you--patriots who see what's at stake and refuse to let the swamp win. [**Every dollar you donate keeps me in the fight**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfj7v8d4g4mebdb28vmmneo7kp3podh1um6k8jc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs). It pays for my plane tickets to chase leads, my late-night research, the equipment I need to break these stories. [**Without you, I 'm grounded. Without you, the truth gets buried.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaaujogj59j0877qaulrvjp0805dp740rqmfv1n8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs)

**Stand With Me --Right Now**

[**I 'm asking you to join me.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk6gqa04jcd2e81e9pt6v0q1n356a1brmo36ddt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs) Your donation isn't just money--it's fuel for the fire I'm lighting under these corrupt elites. It's a fist in the air against the liars and sellouts. It's a promise that we won't let them silence us. **[**Donate now**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmg44e2s1tvbf41afo86eeq6mnf6090rt2mqrfq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs)**[**and let 's hit them where it hurts--right in the open, with the truth.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7gu63osjom2v70c67bpst9mojsjg6puakvhqcuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs)

I'm not giving up. I've got more leads, more stories, more battles ahead. [**But I can 't do it alone**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za6t0ddrcl7jqf08m4ko5cgkt5fjpchvnijrqeso_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs). With you by my side, we can expose every single one of these rats and defend the America we love. [**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8ccv19ssl9pskmjmki0dtnaivrnkbfmdi285m2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs)

With Vigilance,
Laura Loomer

---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztfmdr3taasuv563gu9te4med27mi8q04vtoqav0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob7c3i66pj24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z770s5mdbl81p0a2fg0b968gllki510n94arcn80_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5i69pb2chh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za23sd5m5slqoul4varhk9u6hcouept7ssfrtvlo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5c5gm8p75c9i649fg)

name: Forward Party
subject: Our Districts Should Be Our Own!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here's what's happening in the Forward world...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=1)
---
Tuesday, August 05, 2025 | Peter -- Right now, in Texas, partisan redistricting efforts are once again making [headlines](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OYwQHK8vZebazzfM9fzuW57W47qUHS0cALUW34QMtNXavUqd8_hu2uB4ggRsDbSZQ6WajIVP9YUpDu4FVA-Aza9pwSD0AbkW47oQ_Qi0eMcMQlnB43t6XRMlEbITuq3-&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=2) and fueling further division in the state and nationally. If successful, these efforts in Texas have huge national implications and will impact you no matter where you live. Republican lawmakers, pushed by the White House, are attempting to change district lines to help Republicans hold their majority in the U.S. House of Representatives in 2026 mid-term elections. Democrats in states like California, Illinois and New York are threatening to retaliate with their own redistricting efforts - creating a political arms race with voters ultimately losing the most. Our Executive Chair, Lt. Governor Kerry Healey dives deep on the terrible effects of Gerrymandering and why we should _all_ be against it - regardless of party. Click the image below to watch her 3 minute video! [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfYFzKpiTmVMknz4i-He_MQR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=3)
**[Lindsey Drath on Expanding the Two-Party Political System](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_BNtuvNT9V_JqWn2w6nllybg76_jEKRlGk5D0uhEsPoUHtRANk0xm9UUwpfFM1Bi&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=4)** | **MSNBC** Forward Party CEO Lindsey Williams Drath joins MSNBC discussing a wide range of topics - in this clip, Lindsey details the corruption in our government. Americans are tired of it and it's time for something new. It's time to move Forward. **[Christine Todd Whitman, Forward Co-Founder, Joins Marcia Kramer on CBS](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZ0nlrCgTtaW7-3kuOoZ51o&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=5)** | **CBS** Former EPA Administrator and New Jersey Governor Christine Todd Whitman, co-founder of the Forward Party, joins CBS's The Point with Marcia Kramer to discuss the state of the Forward Party.
**August 6 | ¡Adelante Juntos! Shaping the Future of the FWD Party Hispanic & Latino Committee
** Acompáñanos en la primera reunión del Comité Hispano y Latino del Partido Forward mientras nos unimos para dar forma a nuestra visión colectiva. Join us for the very first meeting of the Forward Party’s Hispanic & Latino Committee as we come together to shape our collective vision. This conversation is centered on listening to your ideas, your concerns, and your hopes for how this committee can support, elevate, and engage our community. Whether you're new to the Forward movement or already deeply involved, your voice matters. Help us lay the foundation for a committee that reflects and represents the full diversity of the Hispanic and Latino experience. Let’s build it together. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/_adelante_juntos_shaping_the_future_of_the_fwd_hispanic_latino_committee?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=6)** **August 7 | Pitch and Messaging Training | Politics: LIVE
** Training #3 of the Young Forwardists’ _Politics: LIVE_ Training Series. Please check our Events Calendar to attend our other Trainings! Any effort is only as good as its public perception. What you say, how you say it, and who you say it to are crucial in cultivating a positive public image. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/pitchandmessagingtraining_20250807?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=7)** **August 8 | Ignite: Building Political Power from the Ground Up
** Hosted by the Forward Party’s Black Voters Committee and Forward NJ, **Forward Ignite** is a call to action for both emerging and seasoned leaders—a dynamic space to mobilize communities, strategize for change, and engage in impactful political action. We’re honored to welcome **Larry Weathers** —Co-Chair of the Forward Black Voters Committee and Pastor at Vibes Church in San Diego—as our keynote speaker. Pastor Weathers will speak to the moral urgency to organize our local communities with both faith and action. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/12578/ignite_building_political_power_from_the_ground_up?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=8)** **August 9 | Ignite: Building Political Power from the Ground Up
** We’re excited to announce that the Forward Party now has official chapters at UNLV, NC State, UNC Wilmington, and Brown University. If you want to join or start a chapter at your high school or university, sign up and attend the Young Forwardists national chapter meeting! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/chaptercreationtraining_20250809?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=9)** **August 12 | NYC Forward Party Monthly Happy Hour
** The Forward Party believes that everyday Americans should be able to decide what’s best for them and their communities. That’s why we're building a party to put power back in the hands of the American voter. We believe in election reforms like Ranked Choice Voting and Open Primaries to help us reach our goal of making government more responsive and representative. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/shanemoynihan/nyc_forward_party_monthly_happy_hour_20250812?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=10)** **August 13 | The Path to RCV in New Jersey
** Bringing Ranked Choice Voting to New Jersey won't happen on its own—it will take a strategic, sustained movement across communities, coalitions, and candidates. Join the Forward Party of New Jersey for a candid discussion on we can bring Ranked Choice Voting to New Jersey! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/12578/the_path_to_rcv_in_new_jersey?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=11)** **August 13 | MA FWD Boston Meet Up
** Welcome Forwardists! Join us at Grafton Street Pub & Grill for happy hour on the 13th of August. Meet fellow Forwardists, learn about the movement in the state, get more deeply involved, and share a drink with new friends! Parties are built in person, no matter how convenient zoom is. We can't wait to see you there. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_massachusetts_august_2025_boston_meet_up?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_74&n=12)**

clean_body: Here's what's happening in the Forward world... | | Tuesday, August 05, 2025 | Peter -- Right now, in Texas, partisan redistricting efforts are once again making and fueling further division in the state and nationally. If successful, these efforts in Texas have huge national implications and will impact you no matter where you live. Republican lawmakers, pushed by the White House, are attempting to change district lines to help Republicans hold their majority in the U.S. House of Representatives in 2026 mid-term elections. Democrats in states like California, Illinois and New York are threatening to retaliate with their own redistricting efforts - creating a political arms race with voters ultimately losing the most. Our Executive Chair, Lt. Governor Kerry Healey dives deep on the terrible effects of Gerrymandering and why we should all be against it - regardless of party. Click the image below to watch her 3 minute video! | MSNBC Forward Party CEO Lindsey Williams Drath joins MSNBC discussing a wide range of topics - in this clip, Lindsey details the corruption in our government. Americans are tired of it and it's time for something new. It's time to move Forward. | CBS Former EPA Administrator and New Jersey Governor Christine Todd Whitman, co-founder of the Forward Party, joins CBS's The Point with Marcia Kramer to discuss the state of the Forward Party. August 6 | ¡Adelante Juntos! Shaping the Future of the FWD Party Hispanic & Latino Committee Acompáñanos en la primera reunión del Comité Hispano y Latino del Partido Forward mientras nos unimos para dar forma a nuestra visión colectiva. Join us for the very first meeting of the Forward Party’s Hispanic & Latino Committee as we come together to shape our collective vision. This conversation is centered on listening to your ideas, your concerns, and your hopes for how this committee can support, elevate, and engage our community. Whether you're new to the Forward movement or already deeply involved, your voice matters. Help us lay the foundation for a committee that reflects and represents the full diversity of the Hispanic and Latino experience. Let’s build it together. August 7 | Pitch and Messaging Training | Politics: LIVE Training #3 of the Young Forwardists’ Politics: LIVE Training Series. Please check our Events Calendar to attend our other Trainings! Any effort is only as good as its public perception. What you say, how you say it, and who you say it to are crucial in cultivating a positive public image. August 8 | Ignite: Building Political Power from the Ground Up Hosted by the Forward Party’s Black Voters Committee and Forward NJ, Forward Ignite is a call to action for both emerging and seasoned leaders—a dynamic space to mobilize communities, strategize for change, and engage in impactful political action. We’re honored to welcome Larry Weathers —Co-Chair of the Forward Black Voters Committee and Pastor at Vibes Church in San Diego—as our keynote speaker. Pastor Weathers will speak to the moral urgency to organize our local communities with both faith and action. August 9 | Ignite: Building Political Power from the Ground Up We’re excited to announce that the Forward Party now has official chapters at UNLV, NC State, UNC Wilmington, and Brown University. If you want to join or start a chapter at your high school or university, sign up and attend the Young Forwardists national chapter meeting! August 12 | NYC Forward Party Monthly Happy Hour The Forward Party believes that everyday Americans should be able to decide what’s best for them and their communities. That’s why we're building a party to put power back in the hands of the American voter. We believe in election reforms like Ranked Choice Voting and Open Primaries to help us reach our goal of making government more responsive and representative. August 13 | The Path to RCV in New Jersey Bringing Ranked Choice Voting to New Jersey won't happen on its own—it will take a strategic, sustained movement across communities, coalitions, and candidates. Join the Forward Party of New Jersey for a candid discussion on we can bring Ranked Choice Voting to New Jersey! August 13 | MA FWD Boston Meet Up Welcome Forwardists! Join us at Grafton Street Pub & Grill for happy hour on the 13th of August. Meet fellow Forwardists, learn about the movement in the state, get more deeply involved, and share a drink with new friends! Parties are built in person, no matter how convenient zoom is. We can't wait to see you there. | C-SPAN | NPR Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

**THE DEMOCRAT LIES AND SMEARS ARE FLYING IN!**

Peter, this is Rep. Mike Collins.
** **

**Democrat Jon Ossoff just blasted out an email to thousands of his leftist supporters, including YOUR neighbors, straight up lying about my record and disparaging my name.**

Democrat Jon Ossoff just blasted out an email to thousands of his leftist supporters, including YOUR neighbors, straight up lying about my record and disparaging my name. . .**** But here's the God-honest truth: I don't care about the name-calling. I don't care about being called a "MAGA extremist". And I certainly don't care if Jon Ossoff hates the fact that I want illegal aliens kicked off medicaid and DEPORTED from our country. But what I do care about is the MILLIONS of dollars he 's raking in by firing out defamatory texts, emails, and campaign letters just like this.**** . . It's a hard pill to swallow, Peter, but Republicans like you and me are being outraised and outspent right now. And it 's not hard to see why. The Democrats are swelling their campaign coffers off Trump Derangement Syndrome, and they're counting on you to be ASLEEP at the beach while they build a war chest big enough to buy this election. Frankly, they 're saying Ossoff has "unstoppable" momentum. And they know that if you WAIT until next summer to fight back, they'll have a lead so big that even Kirby Smart and the Georgia Bulldogs couldn't mount a comeback. A LOSS in this race could very well mean the Senate falls back to Democrat hands. I don't need to explain to you what comes next: . -> Wide open borders and b**lanket amnesty for illegal aliens ** . -> Massive t**ax hikes on small buseiness and working-class Americans ** . -> **ICE agents and police officers defunded, demonized, and punished ** . ->**Insane transgender ideologies forced on our kids and grandkids ** . -> **Big Tech Censors controlling our elections and silencing your voice . My campaign can 't run on fumes when we get down to the final stretch. And as you can see, this race is already proving to be one of the most expensive and highest-stakes in the country. Without your support today, Peter, Republicans like you and me are asking for a repeat of 2020 and 2022. . This is battleground Georgia we 're talking about! It's time to fuel up and hammer down. Will you rush over $10 or more to my campaign? Yes, $10. That 's all I'm asking. . . . I don't need a million-dollar check to win this thing. To kick my campaign into overdrive and steamroll Democrat Jon Ossoff, all I need is the support of red-blooded Americans like you. Now 's not the time to sit back and act like we've won it all. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: While Republicans cut your healthcare, Musk did this → with Trump’s permission and blessing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Sign my petition to demand accountability for DOGE's careless cuts.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112776737/561584433/623074613?refcode=jtk1413-fr-nd&code=jtk1413-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM1NWJlZGMtMGM3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XQsuGxdiD2ADOIfF1cHNr6nHYIa9Hi6a85vBzxHOQP0=&emci=c5dc939b-7171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9c55bedc-0c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend, fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice, shame on us all.
Donald Trump promised that the so-called Department of Government Efficiency – or better known as DOGE – would root out waste and save money for essential services like healthcare, food assistance, and disaster relief. But that was an outright lie. And we have the proof.
My investigation as Ranking Member of the Senate Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations has uncovered a staggering $21.7 billion in taxpayer dollars wasted by DOGE – all under the leadership of Elon Musk and Donald Trump.

That's your money, friend. And it was recklessly squandered in more ways than one:
* **$14.8 billion** for paying approximately 200,000 employees _not_ to work for up to eight months.

* **$263 million **in lost interest and fee income at the Department of Energy due to dozens of loan freezes meant to finance key utility projects supporting energy affordability and grid resilience.

* **$110 million** on food aid and medical supplies left to rot wastefully in warehouses, set to be destroyed at a further cost to taxpayers.

* **Even $66 million** by underutilizing thousands of professional staff to perform entry-level duties for weeks on end, including over $138,000 for paying scientists to check guests in at national parks.

And this doesn't even scratch the surface of all the waste that has taken place under Donald Trump and DOGE's watch. These numbers are a searing indictment of DOGE’s false claims – and at the very same time that the Trump administration is touting big savings, the $21.7 billion that they wasted could have actually gone to helping American citizens:
* **5.3 million** families losing an average of $146 in monthly food assistance under Republicans’ budget bill could have found relief.

* **5 million** Americans expected to lose Medicaid coverage in 2026 under Republicans’ budget bill could have kept their coverage.

* And an additional **28.6 million **children – over 98% of all K-12 students – could have access to reliable meals with free and reduced school lunches.

This just goes to show that DOGE was never about helping taxpayers. It was about consolidating power and rewarding cronies.

**I'm demanding accountability – because the American people deserve better. And I hope you'll join me in speaking out alongside 10,000 others before midnight tonight.[Add your name to my petition now to demand Congress recover these wasted funds and put an end to the Republican scheme to siphon away your hard-earned money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112776747/561584442/-744239263?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blumenthal-email-2025&refcode=jtk1413-fr-nd&code=jtk1413-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM1NWJlZGMtMGM3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XQsuGxdiD2ADOIfF1cHNr6nHYIa9Hi6a85vBzxHOQP0=&emci=c5dc939b-7171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9c55bedc-0c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9329426)**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112776759/561584453/-744239263?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blumenthal-email-2025&refcode=jtk1413-fr-nd&code=jtk1413-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM1NWJlZGMtMGM3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XQsuGxdiD2ADOIfF1cHNr6nHYIa9Hi6a85vBzxHOQP0=&emci=c5dc939b-7171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9c55bedc-0c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9329426)
---
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Dick

Friends, **What 's happening in Texas right now should scare the hell out of anyone who cares about democracy.** Trump's allies in Texas are forcing through a brutal, corrupt redistricting plan that would hand them almost every congressional seat in the state, even in districts where they _**lose**_ elections. They're not even pretending to play fair. This isn't about representation. It's about raw power. It's about silencing millions of voters by slicing up their districts until their votes don't count. **_And because Democrats don 't have the votes to stop it, they made the only move they had left: they walked out. Left the Capitol. Denied the GOP the quorum it needs to force this through._** **Now, those lawmakers are under active threat from Governor Greg Abbott, who 's made it clear he's willing to punish them for standing up. He's already threatened to treat their absence as a forfeiture of elected office.**

clean_body: | | Friends, Did you see our email about Texas? Well, there's an update... This is no longer a drill. The Texas GOP has officially issued arrest warrants for the Democratic lawmakers who walked out to stop their corrupt redistricting plan. These lawmakers are risking everything -- their freedom, their safety, their careers -- to block a Trump-backed power grab that would silence voters across Texas. And now, Republicans are using the power of the state to try to crush them into submission. | This is authoritarian behavior. Plain and simple. No Dem Left Behind is officially shifting focus -- we are going all in to help in Texas. We're standing with these brave Democrats. We're organizing in the rural communities that the GOP thinks they've already locked down. And we're not letting this stand. They're trying to arrest our democracy in real time. We cannot afford to be quiet. Standing together, No Dem Left Behind | \--FORWARDED EMAIL-- Friends, What 's happening in Texas right now should scare the hell out of anyone who cares about democracy. Trump's allies in Texas are forcing through a brutal, corrupt redistricting plan that would hand them almost every congressional seat in the state, even in districts where they lose elections. They're not even pretending to play fair. This isn't about representation. It's about raw power. It's about silencing millions of voters by slicing up their districts until their votes don't count. And because Democrats don 't have the votes to stop it, they made the only move they had left: they walked out. Left the Capitol. Denied the GOP the quorum it needs to force this through. Now, those lawmakers are under active threat from Governor Greg Abbott, who 's made it clear he's willing to punish them for standing up. He's already threatened to treat their absence as a forfeiture of elected office. | All for trying to protect your voice -- and your vote. This is a Trump-backed scheme to rewrite the rules and take control, not just of Texas, but of Congress. If they get away with it in one state, they'll do it everywhere. This isn't left vs. right. It's democracy vs. corruption. And there's no one else coming to save us. In the fight, The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Voter Action Project
subject: Not an impossible fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
There are times this fight for a popular vote system feels impossible. But friend, we can assure you it's not.
There are a number of ways it can be done. A constitutional amendment, the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC), and more.
What we really need is the will to do it -- and that will is growing nationwide. 17 states plus Washington, DC have joined the NPVIC. Those states would likely also pass the amendment to the Constitution.
Momentum is growing as more and more Americans see the need for a popular vote to elect the president. 63% of Americans think the way we elect a president needs to be changed -- a number that's grown over the last decade and is likely higher now than when polled last summer.
Please, help advance the mission to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=080525_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=080525_1&amount=35]
Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go.
It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win, including gaming this antiquated system. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=080525_1&amount=25]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080525_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080525_1&amount=20]

Fellow American,

name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: A Special Announcement
body:
Our team is working on a big event next week and we wanted to invite you all!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4f2008146958/a-special-announcement?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# A Special Announcement!
---
|
---
| I would like to first start by letting everyone know about a special event I will be doing next week with WIBC’s own Guy Relford aka the Gun Guy. This is an open and free event with plenty of food and fun for your family. We look forward to seeing you all there but if you are interested, the RSVP is below!
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | On top of a fun announcement coming, I could not forget to include another great year of my hometown of Mooresville’s Old Settlers Fest and parade. This was an amazing weekend where energy was high and thankfully the temperature wasn’t.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Stay tuned because I think many people will like what we have to **announce next week** and I look forward to sharing that soon but in the meantime make sure to check out our social media!
---

subject: AOC, Mamdani “rake in cash”

Friend,

Far Left Democrats – _including a straight-up Communist_ – are the new face of the Democrat Party.

_**AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash as Democrats Remain Divided**_
**“Far left’s prolific fundraising shows appeal to party’s base”**

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Plus you can complete the entire certification process online...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21743/6374453/17bd456a8566d472e0aaac567ae0ffb9ba0c24b4/0d2f6a63f5bacf0eaec2fb2e34d84e65e629a0f1)

| | |
---
_August 5th, 2025 at 07:30 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21743/6374453/82cad384b3ff601419beebdca4aa8677cbe2eb0d/0d2f6a63f5bacf0eaec2fb2e34d84e65e629a0f1). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21743/6374453/82cad384b3ff601419beebdca4aa8677cbe2eb0d/0d2f6a63f5bacf0eaec2fb2e34d84e65e629a0f1).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21743/6374453/82cad384b3ff601419beebdca4aa8677cbe2eb0d/0d2f6a63f5bacf0eaec2fb2e34d84e65e629a0f1)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---

body:

**“Trump to blame for high cost of living, Americans say in new poll”**
\- _The Guardian_ **[CHIP IN TO HELP UNITE THE COUNTRY FIGHT BACK TODAY>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112779633/561593421/-593197506?refcode=em_UTC_FR_TrumpPricing_080525&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmZWYxNDBjLTExNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BbB-hkx4WGBqxn4Ryx1qILQzkvqTwWjgrR4uMBtidog=)**
* * *
Peter, A brand new poll just confirmed what most of us already know: **Donald Trump is making life more expensive for everyday Americans — _and people across the country are fed up._** Here’s what the numbers show: ❌ 63% say Trump has made grocery prices worse.

Here’s what the numbers show: ❌ 63% say Trump has made grocery prices worse. ❌ 61% say he’s made the cost of living worse. ❌ Nearly 8 in 10 Americans — including 70% of Republicans! — fear that Trump’s reckless tariffs will keep raising prices on everything from food to clothing to electronics. Trump promised to lower costs “on Day One.” Instead, he’s spent his second term handing billionaires and corporations everything they want, slashing programs that help families make ends meet, and hiking costs with a trade war no one asked for. During his 2024 campaign, Trump promised to revolutionize healthcare, but his policies have been nothing short of a catastrophic betrayal, especially for Americans with disabilities. As millions stand to lose their healthcare, many more will drop essential coverage due to skyrocketing costs. _People will die._ And it will worsen the medical debt crisis—already the leading cause of bankruptcy. With minimal consumer protections left standing, the fallout will be devastating. **But there’s hope! clean_body: | | | ** **** During his 2024 campaign, Trump promised to revolutionize healthcare, but his policies have been nothing short of a catastrophic betrayal, especially for Americans with disabilities. As millions stand to lose their healthcare, many more will drop essential coverage due to skyrocketing costs. People will die. And it will worsen the medical debt crisis—already the leading cause of bankruptcy. With minimal consumer protections left standing, the fallout will be devastating. But there’s hope! Able Dems is on the front lines, working year-round to elect Democrats with disabilities and their allies who are committed to genuine healthcare reform. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. * * *
Signalgate, loyalty purges, and an apparent whiskey problem appear to have Defense Secretary Whiskey Pete Hegseth looking for a way out of his failing gig at the Pentagon. Is this his escape plan or could it be a forced outing? A gubernatorial run in Tennessee would require him to RESIGN from his current job. **Good grief, ya’ll! The only way we can defend this seat and our Republican Majority is with the support of grassroots donors like you. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: I’m just trying to do my job, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
I want to make one thing clear. |
---
I want to make one thing clear, Peter: members of Congress are literally responsible for oversight, especially on facilities in our own communities. I recently followed scheduling procedures to visit the ICE facility located in Eloy to ensure the law and due process are followed.**But 24 hours before our scheduled meetings with constituents, they were cancelled with no explanation.** This planned, _scheduled_ visit came after our office received a surge of concerns from families who are scared their loved ones are being subjected to inhumane treatment, including inadequate medical care. Donald Trump, Kristi Noem, and this right-wing authoritarian administration are waging a racist and xenophobic war that is destroying our democracy and hurting our communities. **[I refuse to sit by and let this administration throw due process out the window and dehumanize detainees. If you’re standing with me, will you pitch in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112780916/561596388/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250805_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjZjMDM2OS0xMzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTC4esuJCuVzWhtpA_cZrQBjAkXgrJqAjd7QlafmL84=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112780920/561596391/1302243248?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250805_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjZjMDM2OS0xMzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTC4esuJCuVzWhtpA_cZrQBjAkXgrJqAjd7QlafmL84=)

clean_body: I want to make one thing clear. | I want to make one thing clear, Peter: members of Congress are literally responsible for oversight, especially on facilities in our own communities. I recently followed scheduling procedures to visit the ICE facility located in Eloy to ensure the law and due process are followed.But 24 hours before our scheduled meetings with constituents, they were cancelled with no explanation. This planned, scheduled visit came after our office received a surge of concerns from families who are scared their loved ones are being subjected to inhumane treatment, including inadequate medical care. Donald Trump, Kristi Noem, and this right-wing authoritarian administration are waging a racist and xenophobic war that is destroying our democracy and hurting our communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This administration is dodging accountability left and right, and I refuse to let them sweep injustice under the rug. Thanks for your continued support, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: Who will teach the truth about socialism?
body:
I’ve devoted my life to advancing the ideas of liberty. Today, that mission is more urgent than ever.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zat9vifvgsuc2j26ufqvn7cm8au10c91ddtqp438_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs) Friend,

I’ve devoted my life to advancing the ideas of liberty. Today, that mission is more urgent than ever.

Millions of American students are being immersed in Marxist ideology — on campuses funded by you and me.

At a recent conference titled _Socialism 2025_ , a University of Chicago professor declared:

_“We don’t have power... but I work at one of the biggest employers in Chicago... a place with thousands of people I could potentially organize... This is where I need to build power.”_
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z63438p6ifh43n7ruftug9q1124fuchlq93ir9co_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs) She called her own university _“evil”_ — a _“colonial landlord.”_

Radical views like these — boasted without shame and often funded by American taxpayers — are a symptom of the intellectual decay that has taken root in higher education.

I’ve spent decades countering the lies of socialism — as a writer, speaker, educator, and as former president of the **Foundation for Economic Education (FEE)** , a nonprofit devoted to educating the rising generation in the principles of a free society.

To support FEE in the cause for liberty, [I’m giving away my eBook, _The XYZ’s of Socialism_ , to anyone who donates to FEE today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoiq4kin4cp2bsboculbdg187dgj4rkgai2hg8p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zooohhrt34mve9laj6f989hcim81ie27aqn531dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs) This anthology takes you beyond the surface appeal of socialism’s message so you can understand both its underlying motivations and its practical results.

[Get Your eBook](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmvulab8ilojc44i7ud51uit4usbcvctb48fe6k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)
When a socialist says he wants to give you “the ABC’s of socialism,” you can be sure that’s as far into the alphabet as he’ll want to go. Happy talk, vague promises, political programs, perhaps an angry, envy-soaked tirade or two against the rich — but not much at all about where all that leads.

_**That part always gets a little embarrassing...**_

If we want to end socialist indoctrination, we need to present young people with a different worldview.

**That’s why the Foundation for Economic Education exists!**

We teach the truth about socialism: that it is not a dream, but a delusion.
A velvet glove that conceals an iron fist.
A promise of equality that ends in uniform misery.

If America continues down the treacherous path of socialism, we risk not only our prosperity — but our freedom.

This is precisely why FEE was founded nearly 80 years ago: to stem the tide of socialism and rekindle the principles of liberty in the next generation.
[Support FEE and Get Your Free eBook >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn9319rmp94nj9v28smok9u2cp53gfrlp595r2g0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)
FEE exists to counter the destructive myths of collectivism and coercion — and to illuminate the path of human flourishing that only freedom and voluntary exchange can offer.

Through online media, classroom programs, teacher training, student seminars, and in-person events, FEE educates and inspires young people with the timeless principles of liberty, personal responsibility, and free markets.

[Will you help fight socialist indoctrination and educate the rising generation? Click here to donate and receive your free eBook >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdnf6hbm0vfld74vnh98fmunc7locbujg2oalbbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqrg2rhrbnf3q8midgdk3a6cf1ocsv141sic1f80_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

[Donate $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8b8f4kp96gfn5efdloit2dndk2k6q8v7ogq6ii8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6av89vt27r0cjgmim7svvn2toq434drus479om8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm3b6pgd9lb6sn2bcvrmchbbesqkehncieuaf2a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfot3tp5aq93okc7d8h8knat3349qn1840kovnt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp87qdac05b8mgmcniq9bed88oto22snjkduv46g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

[Donate $1000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z96dhe129cc31171mrg8vhfoqq4v063a2l4v7sv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9d0krea7mca50bbm5308hjssdgophovtuksvr58_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs) In liberty,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus
Humphreys Family Senior Fellow
Ron Manners Global Ambassador for Liberty
P.S. It takes education — _the right kind_ — to win the hearts and minds of the next generation.

For many students, FEE is their first encounter with the fundamental principles of freedom.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv6llhte2l09psdtr3ldnd9go3vs8rpv08crjfvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs) But we need your help to scale our reach and deepen our impact. Your **tax-deductible gift** funds student programs, classroom resources, and digital content that teach young people why liberty, not government control, is the key to a prosperous future.
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdgo6g6iso9kcffknot3vij1bfonhl88v6nc7hto_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6cp36cdh2bs)

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

subject: OBBB Saves Rural Hospitals
body:
Sen. Cris Dush | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Sen. Cris Dush: Saving our rural hospitals and more — why I support the One Big Beautiful Bill**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8060d5c8ab&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| ''With [six of the seven counties](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=17915c4202&e=b7b3eddce2) I serve being declared a “[maternity care desert](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9c89c573aa&e=b7b3eddce2),” preserving and expanding rural healthcare access is of paramount importance to me. As budget negotiations continue, the governor and the majority of PA House and Senate **Democrats are intentionally misclassifying** the 1.4 million illegals and those who are able, but unwilling to work, being kicked off Medicaid due to the [One Big Beautiful Bill](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9d3ecbbb96&e=b7b3eddce2) (OBBB) as the elderly and disabled..."
---
| [Read Article Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ddf309f484&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")

|

body:
Americans are demanding answers about Jeffrey Epstein’s crimes and the powerful network of individuals connected to him.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112781236/561597638/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU5NGQxNC0xNTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NDkjxA8P-J8JqKDscNWBZfRDgIGgdKrrQAGb6KjiUQQ=&emci=52da4339-0672-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9be94d14-1572-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)

| | The Epstein case has dominated headlines across the country, and for good reason. Americans are demanding answers about Jeffrey Epstein's crimes and the powerful network of individuals connected to him — _a network that includes Donald Trump_. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112781237/561597639/1198212874?contactdata=QlCireEUWQA6ZDIssaboBkT0rYK6Ab0rH2EC8XPoSjjY4g09PIxg9FfQANXsCrXLK0D2OWvQX6Vby2JBWkuB9cY2gHkokAKOhyqvhqvsP3COtvYyyC6YsaD/JZZIpZx1s8GNRf/u/Sy4THIt1o0CxA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU5NGQxNC0xNTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NDkjxA8P-J8JqKDscNWBZfRDgIGgdKrrQAGb6KjiUQQ=&emci=52da4339-0672-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9be94d14-1572-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215) **We need to end the secrecy and stonewalling and deliver justice** , not just for the victims, but for a country that should refuse to let the powerful operate above the law. I introduced the **Epstein Files Transparency Act** , alongside Senator Ben Ray Luján, to direct the U.S. Department of Justice to publicly release all files related to the investigation of Jeffrey Epstein and his associates. No more protecting predators. But Senate Republicans blocked it. They didn't just turn their backs on survivors. They sided with secrecy, privilege, and power. **For far too long, wealthy and well-connected individuals have used their influence to escape accountability and silence victims.** Survivors of Epstein's abuse deserve justice. The public deserves answers. And the powerful must no longer be shielded from the consequences of their actions. [**Add your name to say you stand with me in calling for full transparency and accountability for those connected to Jeffrey Epstein.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112781238/561597640/1198212874?contactdata=QlCireEUWQA6ZDIssaboBkT0rYK6Ab0rH2EC8XPoSjjY4g09PIxg9FfQANXsCrXLK0D2OWvQX6Vby2JBWkuB9cY2gHkokAKOhyqvhqvsP3COtvYyyC6YsaD/JZZIpZx1s8GNRf/u/Sy4THIt1o0CxA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU5NGQxNC0xNTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NDkjxA8P-J8JqKDscNWBZfRDgIGgdKrrQAGb6KjiUQQ=&emci=52da4339-0672-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9be94d14-1572-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112781239/561597641/1198212874?contactdata=QlCireEUWQA6ZDIssaboBkT0rYK6Ab0rH2EC8XPoSjjY4g09PIxg9FfQANXsCrXLK0D2OWvQX6Vby2JBWkuB9cY2gHkokAKOhyqvhqvsP3COtvYyyC6YsaD/JZZIpZx1s8GNRf/u/Sy4THIt1o0CxA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU5NGQxNC0xNTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NDkjxA8P-J8JqKDscNWBZfRDgIGgdKrrQAGb6KjiUQQ=&emci=52da4339-0672-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9be94d14-1572-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215) We have a government of 'We the People,' not 'We the Powerful.' If we're serious about restoring the public's trust, the American people deserve the full truth about Jeffrey Epstein and everyone connected to him. clean_body: Americans are demanding answers about Jeffrey Epstein’s crimes and the powerful network of individuals connected to him. | | | | The Epstein case has dominated headlines across the country, and for good reason. Americans are demanding answers about Jeffrey Epstein's crimes and the powerful network of individuals connected to him — a network that includes Donald Trump. We need to end the secrecy and stonewalling and deliver justice , not just for the victims, but for a country that should refuse to let the powerful operate above the law. I introduced the Epstein Files Transparency Act , alongside Senator Ben Ray Luján, to direct the U.S. Department of Justice to publicly release all files related to the investigation of Jeffrey Epstein and his associates. No more protecting predators. But Senate Republicans blocked it. They didn't just turn their backs on survivors. They sided with secrecy, privilege, and power. For far too long, wealthy and well-connected individuals have used their influence to escape accountability and silence victims. Survivors of Epstein's abuse deserve justice. The public deserves answers. And the powerful must no longer be shielded from the consequences of their actions. We have a government of 'We the People,' not 'We the Powerful.' If we're serious about restoring the public's trust, the American people deserve the full truth about Jeffrey Epstein and everyone connected to him. Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered to turn over
212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered
Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for
withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in
response to a Judicial Watch lawsuit for communications with Special
Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee.

clean_body: Background on investigation into Special Counsel Jack Smtih [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Ex-Trump prosecutor Jack Smith under investigation by Office of Special Counsel after claims of playing politics [] Source: New York Post [] The Office of Special Counsel has launched a formal investigation into Jack Smith, the justice department lawyer who oversaw two criminal investigations into President Donald Trump during the Biden administration. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] March 13, 2025 Fani Willis Ordered to Turn Over Anti-Trump Collusion Records to Court [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered to turn over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in response to a Judicial Watch lawsuit for communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] March 27, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for Information on Misconduct by Special Counsel Jack Smith’s Staff [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Special Counsel Jack Smith. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] June 26, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for Collusion Documents of Arizona Democratic Attorney General and Jack Smith [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit against Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes for her communications with former Special Counsel Jack Smith. **I’ve seen firsthand how vital this protection is.**
A few years ago,**our office successfully utilized this exact provision to reach a settlement that guaranteed in-person assistance at the polling place for all Minnesota voters.**
We helped protect the right to vote for Minnesotans who needed support at the ballot box. Under this new ruling, that lawsuit would not have been allowed to move forward.
This is deeply disturbing. And it’s part of a broader, coordinated effort to chip away at the Voting Rights Act piece by piece.
**[We have to fight back, and I need your help. Government analysts at the CIA concluded that COVID likely came from a lab in China. Instead of reporting the facts, their superiors overruled them because the findings aligned with Trump’s position that the pandemic resulted from a lab leak.

According to the CIA’s own inspector general, anything that was even “too pro-Trump” was silenced. They wanted to avoid anything that could support the president’s message, so they buried the facts.

This is beyond unacceptable. _**It’s dangerous.**_

It proves that the Deep State will do ANYTHING to control the narrative—even at the expense of our safety and freedom.

That’s why I’m fighting back. I refuse to let the truth be swept under the rug, and I need you in this fight with me.

If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. ---|---|---
## Rebranding so-called "experts"
For years, the mainstream has been obsessed "experts".
Scientific "experts" like Dr. Fauci, economic "experts" like Jerome Powell... they've been in the cultural spotlight, giving opinions and advice to Americans.
That's all well and good if their expertise translated into fulfilled predictions.
But they seem to be more interested in pushing agendas than actually analyzing and assessing their subjects.
Their failures are annoying, albeit predictable, when it comes to prediction.
But in the case of things like public health (Covid panic, anyone?), their missteps can cause real problems.
That's why I think we need to reevaluate how we look at the "experts".
Let's break it down. ...

subject: at the height of wildfire season?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Donald Trump’s draconian cuts to the U.S. Forest Service are only putting more homes, more businesses, and even our very lives at risk.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112785599/561611649/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2U3ZjkxYy0xYTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9fMNH2W2KCyIXaS5ADoTZs8dbOjDmjiI49dXym0Sn4=) Team, it’s August, Oregon’s wildfire season is in full swing, _and we have bad news:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112785600/561611650/1393317466?refcode=email_080525_usfs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2U3ZjkxYy0xYTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9fMNH2W2KCyIXaS5ADoTZs8dbOjDmjiI49dXym0Sn4=&emci=06594249-0c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47e7f91c-1a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047) **At a time when climate change is accelerating the pace of wildfire damage each year, Donald Trump’s reckless, draconian cuts to the U.S. Forest Service are only putting more homes, more businesses, and even _our very lives_ at risk.** Wildfires burned almost 2 MILLION acres of Oregon land in 2024 alone — _we can’t afford to let Trump play games with the agency tasked with protecting Americans from these deadly blazes._ That’s why Andrea Salinas is proud to have led her colleagues in the House in calling out Trump’s dangerous cuts to the federal forest service, and demanding that critical funding and staff be reinstated to protect Oregon’s people and infrastructure from wildfire damage. **And now we’re calling on this entire grassroots team to help amplify her message:** **[If you’re with us, please sign our petition demanding the Trump administration reverse these catastrophic cuts NOW and reinstate ALL of the critical Forest Service staff who work to keep wildfires at bay. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112785601/561611651/1393317466?refcode=email_080525_usfs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2U3ZjkxYy0xYTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9fMNH2W2KCyIXaS5ADoTZs8dbOjDmjiI49dXym0Sn4=&emci=06594249-0c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47e7f91c-1a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)** →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112785602/561611652/1393317466?refcode=email_080525_usfs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2U3ZjkxYy0xYTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9fMNH2W2KCyIXaS5ADoTZs8dbOjDmjiI49dXym0Sn4=&emci=06594249-0c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47e7f91c-1a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)**
