clean_body: Donald Trump’s draconian cuts to the U.S. Forest Service are only putting more homes, more businesses, and even our very lives at risk. = Team, it’s August, Oregon’s wildfire season is in full swing, and we have bad news: At a time when climate change is accelerating the pace of wildfire damage each year, Donald Trump’s reckless, draconian cuts to the U.S. Forest Service are only putting more homes, more businesses, and even our very lives at risk. Wildfires burned almost 2 MILLION acres of Oregon land in 2024 alone — we can’t afford to let Trump play games with the agency tasked with protecting Americans from these deadly blazes. That’s why Andrea Salinas is proud to have led her colleagues in the House in calling out Trump’s dangerous cuts to the federal forest service, and demanding that critical funding and staff be reinstated to protect Oregon’s people and infrastructure from wildfire damage. And now we’re calling on this entire grassroots team to help amplify her message: | | Thank you for standing with us, Andrea Salinas HQ | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: They’re rigging the game to keep Trump in power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

If you’ve been hoping for a moment to step up and help save this country,
this is it.

Right now, Republicans in Texas are trying to rig the maps to steal five
congressional seats currently held by Democrats—seats that will determine
whether or not Donald Trump holds the majority in the U.S. House of
Representatives.

This is the most important fight in the country.

And the only thing standing in the way of Trump’s power grab? The
courageous Texas Democrats who have broken quorum to block this attack on
our democracy.

Greg Abbott has threatened to remove them from office and charge them with
felonies. Ken Paxton says they should be hunted down. And with Trump
desperate to hold on to power, who knows what else they’ll face.

They’re risking everything. The least we can do is have their backs.

If we fail to hold these seats—and fail to win a majority in the
House—there will be no check on Trump’s lawlessness, chaos, cruelty, and
corruption. It means a corrupt, complicit Republican Congress will roll
out the red carpet for a third Trump term.

This is the moment to support these courageous Texas Democrats.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250805-1.DPPsGw&refcode=ema20250805-240278&t=1002&akid=240278%2E444211%2Ef_aTHT ]Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to
support Texas Democrats in this urgent fight? If we don’t show up now, we
may not get another chance to stop this blatant power grab.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250805-1.DPPsGw&refcode=ema20250805-240278&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=240278%2E444211%2Ef_aTHT ]DONATE $3

Let’s rally behind those putting everything on the line for us—and show
Trump that we are not backing down.

Beto O’Rourke

But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.** And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders. They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for. | | **Be One of the First 200 to Own the _All-New_ Commando Fixed Blade**
Hey there,
We’re launching our **brand-new Steel River Commando Fixed Blade Knife** , and here’s the deal: the first **200 people** can claim it for FREE—just cover the shipping cost.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21744/6374453/f6902abe7ee4feea24123d7fcc14fcd62438e79f/b9551b14d2a4a914c3e03c913701f65064a2d1a1)
---
What makes this blade a must-have?
* **6.5-inch 5CR15MOV steel blade** – Razor-sharp and ready for action.
* **Soft-touch TPE handle** – Designed for maximum comfort and control.
* **Full-tang durability** – Built to withstand anything you throw at it.

With its **11.5-inch total length** , this knife isn’t just for show—it’s your new go-to for camping, survival, and everyday tasks. And we want you to be one of the first to put it to the test.

Stay sharp!

We need your voice now...

| Hi team,

**We wanted to follow up because the GOP's efforts to weaken Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent.**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security.

But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — **slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned.**

This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. _That’s why we need your voice now._

**[Will you stand with us and sign the petition to defend Social Security before our deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112786848/561615640/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250805_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmM3YzVlOC0xYzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWqW_r1MDiNv-YnWxvMGnn7C9MCStj4M91XaXK-k1m0=&emci=970dd2b2-0a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cbc7c5e8-1c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112786849/561615641/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250805_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmM3YzVlOC0xYzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWqW_r1MDiNv-YnWxvMGnn7C9MCStj4M91XaXK-k1m0=&emci=970dd2b2-0a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cbc7c5e8-1c72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

**Since elected, Trump’s administration has:**

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce
\- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors
\- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits

**This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security.**

_We need to fight back now_ – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security.

| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=7f3b7d3624&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| Dear Peter,**I want to take a moment to say something simple but important: Thank you.** Thank you for every door knocked, every conversation had, and every dollar donated. It all adds up. **Together, we’re building something bigger than a campaign.** We’re building a movement rooted in community, justice, and opportunity for everyone in our district. That’s only possible because of the support, time, and faith you’ve placed in the future. I don’t know if words can adequately describe how amazing it is to be part of this experience with you.**We are proving that candidates can run successful campaigns for office without being beholden to corporate PACs or wealthy special interests.** It’s powered by people like you who believe that CD‐32 deserves a representative who will fight for working families, stand up to corruption, and lead with integrity.**There’s a lot more work ahead** — but today, I just want to pause to let you know how grateful I am to have you in this fight.**In solidarity,****
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=1f80a3359d&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja**
**Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---

name: Americans for Responsible Innovation
subject: White House takes the reins on AI policy
body:
The latest on ARI's work on AI governance

| | | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b42ecea69c&e=a07d75591f)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | After a spring of high-stakes AI policy action on Capitol Hill, the White House stepped into the spotlight in July—putting its stamp on the future of AI with big moves on everything from energy infrastructure to chip exports. ARI is here to keep you up-to-date with the latest.
Over the past four weeks, we’ve seen the Administration announce its AI Action Plan and roll back H20 export restrictions. President Trump and OSTP’s Michael Kratsios have both taken the stage to roll out these announcements, and ARI has weighed in on the action.
---
|
### AI ACTION PLAN
As July came to a close, the Trump Administration announced its long-awaited AI Action Plan, following up on the President’s executive order earlier this year with a more detailed list of policy proposals for AI innovation and governance. The Action Plan includes nine of the proposals [shared by ARI](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=11673e7447&e=a07d75591f) with the Administration, including strengthening export controls, tightening biosecurity, protecting the public from synthetic media, accelerating workforce adaptation, creating federal capacity for AI incident response, and more.In response, ARI [released a cautiously optimistic statement](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=6035bcb77c&e=a07d75591f) commenting on the policy document, with ARI President Brad Carson calling the plan “an opportunity for us to better understand what’s happening inside the black box of AI and the big risks frontier models create for the public.” ([_Tech Policy Press_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=8e80f9451b&e=a07d75591f) / [_LawFare_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=cd0cc3aa58&e=a07d75591f) / [_Washington Examiner_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=06b7aa4a7f&e=a07d75591f))A day after the Action Plan’s release, ARI hosted a [virtual panel](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=de4cbf7009&e=a07d75591f) moderated by Carson and featuring AI experts including Elham Tabassi (Brookings), Samuel Hammond (FAI), and Stewart Baker (Former NSA / DHS). The four panelists took questions from a virtual audience of over 300 viewers on the Action Plan and what to watch as the Administration implements its new blueprint on AI policy.[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=082ed824fb&e=a07d75591f)Following up on our panel, ARI released a Policy Byte write-up highlighting [seven key features](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=0a2cf14a9d&e=a07d75591f) of Trump’s AI Plan. Authored by Senior Policy Director Brandie Nonnecke, the post dives into policies raised by the AI Action Plan on issues including interpretability and control, third party evaluations, permitting reform, AI exports, and more.
---
|
### H20 EXPORT CONTROL ROLLBACK
In mid-July, Nvidia surprised the industry and the policy community in D.C. when it announced that the Trump Administration would roll back export controls on advanced H20 chips, allowing the company to resume sales of the chip to China. ARI responded quickly, highlighting the advanced nature of H20 chips [on social media](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=7e3b953335&e=a07d75591f) and in materials distributed on the Hill ([_Axios_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=2778613255&e=a07d75591f)). In the days following the decision, ARI organized a coalition letter with 20 national security experts and former officials (bipartisan, but mostly Republicans) urging the Administration to restore export controls on H20s. The letter underscores the military threat posed by China’s development of advanced AI as well as the impact on American companies should the sale of chips to China further exacerbate an already strained global supply of advanced AI chips. ARI launched that letter in an exclusive with the [_Financial Times_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=0a5c5067f3&e=a07d75591f) last Monday as American and Chinese negotiators gathered in Stockholm for trade talks.[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b55169ae39&e=a07d75591f)Among the letter signers were a number of leading policy experts, including American Compass founder Oren Cass, as well as former national security officials, including Stewart Baker, Former Assistant Secretary of Homeland Security; Matt Pottinger, Former Deputy National Security Advisor; David Feith, Former National Security Council; and Lloyd Thrall, Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense.In addition to the exclusive in FT, the letter went on to get airtime on [Steve Bannon’s War Room](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=6711b8bb98&e=a07d75591f) and coverage in outlets including the [_Washington Post_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=e92c9edf95&e=a07d75591f) , [_Reuters_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=018a2f16c2&e=a07d75591f) , [_Punchbowl_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=133f1b2ebe&e=a07d75591f) , [_Politico_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=1a009448e6&e=a07d75591f) , and [_TechCrunch_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=026b39302a&e=a07d75591f).

---
|
### GENE SYNTHESIS SCREENING FRAMEWORK
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=72d619d0e1&e=a07d75591f)As the Trump Administration builds out its approach to strengthening biosecurity and preserving America's innovation advantage in biotechnology, ARI is offering OSTP guidance on developing a regulatory framework for gene synthesis screening. In a [new report](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b326384fc1&e=a07d75591f) shared with the Administration earlier this month, ARI maps out policy recommendations that include conformity assessment bodies to verify adherence to screening practices, narrowing the screening window for nucleotides, covering benchtop synthesizers, and improving non-homologous screening tools. In early May, the Trump Administration signed an executive order increasing federal oversight of dangerous research that can make microorganisms more pathogenic or transmissible. The EO tasked federal agencies with updating U.S. requirements for gene synthesis screening within 90 days. All eyes are now on OSTP for release of an updated framework for gene synthesis screening this August. We hope this will lead to a legislative proposal that we can help usher through Congress.
---
|
### TEAM UPDATE
ARI is continuing to grow its policy team this summer. Last week, we announced the start of [Megi Llubani](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=25b3c6b4c2&e=a07d75591f) as Policy Research Manager, and this week we’re announcing the start of [Annika Olson](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=852916da58&e=a07d75591f) as Director of Government Affairs.ARI is currently hiring for a Digital Director to lead the organization’s work on social media and online platforms. If you or someone you know might be right for the position, we’re [accepting applications here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=9393ca515c&e=a07d75591f).It will be a busy August recess, but we’re looking forward to the additional capacity for timely, forward-thinking analysis of AI policy as we head into the fall. To stay up-to-date with our new hires and all of our work, give us a[ follow on X](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=33c3a68a36&e=a07d75591f) and [LinkedIn](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=e9a78fa6e6&e=a07d75591f).Thank you as always for your support.

---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=5607324b47&e=a07d75591f)
---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b791e0cb39&e=a07d75591f)
---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=d3507b7210&e=a07d75591f)
---

name: Cole - Flyover CEO
subject: Help expand trusted news in Texas
body:
Texas deserves bias-free news. Own it now.
****

| | |
---
| | |
# TUESDAY, AUGUST 5, 2025
---|---
**Dear Texas Flyover Reader,** I'd like to introduce you to our Founder, Guy Short. Maybe some of you know him - he is a fellow Texan. That's probably why he insisted that Texas would be our very first state edition. I hope you'll take a few minutes to read his message below and learn more about our plans for the future of _The Texas Flyover_. -Cole, CEO
* * *
**Hello!** Our Texas readers have a unique opportunity today. You know how important honest, fact-based news is for our state. And if you've been following us, you know we're delivering it in a way that's easy-to-read, quick-to-digest, and free from the noise you find elsewhere. Now, you have an opportunity to [invest in it](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJys0c-K2zAQBvCnkW8J-mPZzkGHgvEtXSiF9iZkzzhWkWQjjZP07Yu3G9oH2Ov8Zj74mB9Xe3U--HT76iIaes6rBQQ_OUKwCR8lIBFmu2DY8Lm5BJT3QgiH-URoJZf6xLsT13aa_92KCszI4SIqNKLVdS2U7LpqMXBp5hpHKfmIF-BCiNEhb1vNZ8RGjpU3RyTvuBYt57o5dy3MoLtawKWeFDas5gie1nymBQmfrszh93rHfJ7WWAWzEG2FqS9MDkwOPt2x0PnX6hMt-N_mwWrYKdqy7nlCpvq3R0I4XRG8Y7I5KCL4PTLV969mHzC5uDl_S0z1w9_MF6yJMBFT_fef39AB5vIhhDm-j4e33nZcS11lA9vDh-BL07Ka36Lz4b0Ffe4v7kb-CQAA__96GKgC). In just two years, our readership has grown from zero to 2.5 million across all Flyover properties. But it's only the beginning. Demand for trusted news is growing faster than ever. We're inviting you to help bring even more of the same excellence that Texas can rely on, free from spin and hidden agendas. By [investing in _The Flyover_](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJys0c-K2zAQBvCnkW8J-mPZzkGHgvEtXSiF9iZkzzhWkWQjjZP07Yu3G9oH2Ov8Zj74mB9Xe3U--HT76iIaes6rBQQ_OUKwCR8lIBFmu2DY8Lm5BJT3QgiH-URoJZf6xLsT13aa_92KCszI4SIqNKLVdS2U7LpqMXBp5hpHKfmIF-BCiNEhb1vNZ8RGjpU3RyTvuBYt57o5dy3MoLtawKWeFDas5gie1nymBQmfrszh93rHfJ7WWAWzEG2FqS9MDkwOPt2x0PnX6hMt-N_mwWrYKdqy7nlCpvq3R0I4XRG8Y7I5KCL4PTLV969mHzC5uDl_S0z1w9_MF6yJMBFT_fef39AB5vIhhDm-j4e33nZcS11lA9vDh-BL07Ka36Lz4b0Ffe4v7kb-CQAA__96GKgC), you're helping deepen the coverage in Texas, and ensure your community has a reliable source of news for years to come. This is your chance to own a piece of the news you believe in--and to help shape a better future for Texas. Become a shareholder in _The Flyover_ while you can. [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJys0c-K2zAQBvCnkW8J-mPZzkGHgvEtXSiF9iZkzzhWkWQjjZP07Yu3G9oH2Ov8Zj74mB9Xe3U--HT76iIaes6rBQQ_OUKwCR8lIBFmu2DY8Lm5BJT3QgiH-URoJZf6xLsT13aa_92KCszI4SIqNKLVdS2U7LpqMXBp5hpHKfmIF-BCiNEhb1vNZ8RGjpU3RyTvuBYt57o5dy3MoLtawKWeFDas5gie1nymBQmfrszh93rHfJ7WWAWzEG2FqS9MDkwOPt2x0PnX6hMt-N_mwWrYKdqy7nlCpvq3R0I4XRG8Y7I5KCL4PTLV969mHzC5uDl_S0z1w9_MF6yJMBFT_fef39AB5vIhhDm-j4e33nZcS11lA9vDh-BL07Ka36Lz4b0Ffe4v7kb-CQAA__96GKgC) **Sincerely,
Guy Short
Founder, _The Flyover_**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They Want Me Silent—But I’m Fighting for Trump’s America. Will You Stand With Me?
body:
The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don’t care who’s in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that’s eating away at our country. And what I’ve found in recent weeks? It’s enough to make your blood boil.

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7p675ca7b769tp7k2fk5sqafcup6u3asr97jijg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjvh256kuqg56t21kr0uvdq2m6aevnld8kmffum0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

My name is Laura Loomer, and I'm not your typical journalist. I don't sit in a cushy newsroom parroting talking points for the elite. I'm out there, in the trenches, exposing the corruption, betrayal, and deep-state sabotage that threatens everything President Trump has fought for--and everything we believe in. I'm a fighter, a patriot, and a relentless truth-teller. But right now, I'm writing to you [**because I can 't keep this fight alive without your help**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo4qumbilphjhbdvtqpnmgdjic2nhot6u5k2eo4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs).

Let me tell you why I do this. I've seen the lies, the cover-ups, and the cowardice firsthand. The mainstream media won't touch the stories I uncover--they're too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don't care who's in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that's eating away at our country. And what I've found in recent weeks? **It 's enough to make your blood boil.**

**The Stories They Don 't Want You to Hear**

* **Summits of the Americas Turned Into a Woke Disaster**
Picture this: a gathering meant to strengthen America's position in the world, hijacked by Biden holdovers like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings. These traitors are turning the Summits of the Americas into a pro-China, woke circus. I went down there myself, tracked their moves, and uncovered how they're undermining Trump's America First policies to cozy up to Communist China. They thought they could get away with it--but I'm making sure the world knows their names and their shame.

* **An Obama Loyalist Sabotaging Trump 's Iran Strategy**
Then there's Nathanael Swanson. This guy's an Obama-era relic, still slinking around the State Department's Iran negotiation team like a snake in the grass. Trump took a hard line against Iran--sanctions, strength, no compromise. But Swanson? He's working behind the scenes to unravel it all, putting our national security on the line. I've spent sleepless nights piecing together the paper trail of all Biden holdovers who remain inside the Trump admin, and I'm not stopping until they are all out of there for good.

* **Dan Goldman and the Democrat Cover-Up Machine**
Ever heard of Rep. Dan Goldman? He's a slick operator shielding violent Democrats like LaMonica McIver while orchestrating lawfare against Trump. I caught wind of this when I started digging into McIver's trail of chaos--Goldman's been running interference, protecting his own while the Democrats try to bury Trump under legal attacks. I've got the receipts, and I'm exposing their game one bombshell at a time.

* **Democrats Ignoring Pro-Hamas Violence**
Two Israeli diplomats were murdered in D.C. by a pro-Hamas terrorist. Two lives snuffed out, and what did Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib do? Nothing. Not a word of condemnation. They're silent because they're complicit, enabling Jew hatred and Islamic terrorism while pretending to care about justice. I've been on the ground, talking to sources, documenting every disgusting detail. They can't hide from me--and I won't let them.

* **A DEI Judge Blocking Trump 's Vision**
And then there's Judge Myong J. Joun, a Biden appointee whose family rakes in cash from DEI consulting. This guy had the nerve to block Trump's order to dismantle the Department of Education--a move that would've freed our kids from woke indoctrination. I dug into his family's financial ties, and it's clear: this isn't justice, it's a paycheck. I'm fighting to get that story out there, because our children deserve better.

**Why I Need You**

These aren't just stories--they're battles. Every day, I'm taking on the deep state, the media, and the woke mob. They hate me for it. They've tried to censor me, smear me, shut me down. But I don't flinch. I don't back off. Because this isn't about me--**it 's about you, your family, and the future of America**. It's about protecting Trump's America First agenda from the cowards and traitors trying to tear it apart.

Here's the raw truth: I don't have corporate sponsors or billionaire sugar daddies bankrolling me. I'm funded by people like you--patriots who see what's at stake and refuse to let the swamp win. [**Every dollar you donate keeps me in the fight**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjt1pnoao5ra4dibqmqq0033nh5730p1c1ni5sfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs). It pays for my plane tickets to chase leads, my late-night research, the equipment I need to break these stories. [**Without you, I 'm grounded. Without you, the truth gets buried.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhu1ovrgpv79j6n3mouinop03vv8svmmi4iettk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs)

**Stand With Me --Right Now**

[**I 'm asking you to join me.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z57gjl40uqeqkk6s19cpecqjq9e6t1300jgb2ll0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs) Your donation isn't just money--it's fuel for the fire I'm lighting under these corrupt elites. It's a fist in the air against the liars and sellouts. It's a promise that we won't let them silence us. **[**Donate now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvms15ugtstp3ql4gvm8nlqc998tgnml0mrqt3tg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs)**[**and let 's hit them where it hurts--right in the open, with the truth.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0q18qgr877bnsfs23e22tss0h8mbdbtchfoqdno_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs)

I'm not giving up. I've got more leads, more stories, more battles ahead. [**But I can 't do it alone**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zle9bs1beekntj5nt8nnbhva335m26gvt4ji0usg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs). With you by my side, we can expose every single one of these rats and defend the America we love. [**Will you stand with me?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zru1afpdnlcg6drinniu4fbp5nc85og1vuophdv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5h6eor4c3h2bs)

With Vigilance,
Laura Loomer

Stand With Me --Right Now Your donation isn't just money--it's fuel for the fire I'm lighting under these corrupt elites. It's a fist in the air against the liars and sellouts. It's a promise that we won't let them silence us. I'm not giving up. I've got more leads, more stories, more battles ahead. . With you by my side, we can expose every single one of these rats and defend the America we love. With Vigilance, Laura Loomer Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: ☀️It’s the Dog Days of Summer🐶
body:
We can hardly believe that July is over and that August has begun. So much has happened this summer and there’s still so much work to be done!
| | |
---
| |
---
| ☀️It's the Dog Days of Summer🐶
---
| Did you know that "the dog days of summer" refers to the period of time when the constellation Sirius (the "Dog Star") rises and is visible just before sunrise? We love our canine companions, and the "Dog Days" of summer just so happen to be a time when we can take our pals out to the beach, hiking, and to enjoy all that Virginia has to offer.
Here are some of our team's beloved dogs:
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nglZUqIKXuSR_DiWUEv0aJRHmaHkzTjIFXGyUFrpz2RFVqcLNVH5jKlrLv9PRbIZIVtVX8FLO3QRPLxgAGGQP9gz41z99v1Y7tFSm6dhfBlXaq5M568ReNQIRaZKZgnWMl6ki09wcOUMwSVwefI2o8z524hOgDMWuRI3ep0rq6NPRk9ACiVxT0NdNK-IIrQBbHHiSZS7j55J_1tfwVNziejR2umoqNdTzd9LE2lz31zI_cf1XhNfFLkODOFcLLvIxaZkmufugmc6etVKKalnlJ5Sh1JqYqYfWjPxnF8kLv88hMlZZB_LWg==&c=DAARtskoVo8_1Sjv_ZoSupMOkLqPrFLIIvqQoHde6LLTFmvARSVdgg==&ch=7H4aezP3ZTbv9goRP2_ECEnIUUnVFOcn_pWWlpZRYXw7WU70JjIw9g==)
---
| As we start this new month, we ask for your support and contributions to help continue the work we are doing to create a fair and affordable economy in Virginia. In honor of our fluffy friends, who became domesticated some 30,000 years ago, we are asking for you to chip in between $1 and $30. [Chipping in even $1 today will make a huge impact in the fight for an affordable Virginia](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nglZUqIKXuSR_DiWUEv0aJRHmaHkzTjIFXGyUFrpz2RFVqcLNVH5jPWiVYNtdJsa2UaOkhXqS5Iml8LMPtdvqufa1Ry-E65XJjRB2L9h7yrsMFCZQEW7flHM_JvcJpVnMn58My1SDCVHr7W44uEiEco12YX0xdEozeD8YKnzlCMwuvERVZih-ACl-Ma-XhFaS_8hSdCWAEMDmqYlpsUReEDlPpniY-HN&c=DAARtskoVo8_1Sjv_ZoSupMOkLqPrFLIIvqQoHde6LLTFmvARSVdgg==&ch=7H4aezP3ZTbv9goRP2_ECEnIUUnVFOcn_pWWlpZRYXw7WU70JjIw9g==).
---
| [Contribute Today!](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nglZUqIKXuSR_DiWUEv0aJRHmaHkzTjIFXGyUFrpz2RFVqcLNVH5jPWiVYNtdJsa2UaOkhXqS5Iml8LMPtdvqufa1Ry-E65XJjRB2L9h7yrsMFCZQEW7flHM_JvcJpVnMn58My1SDCVHr7W44uEiEco12YX0xdEozeD8YKnzlCMwuvERVZih-ACl-Ma-XhFaS_8hSdCWAEMBvanTFdTPR65KBJS_XLOE&c=DAARtskoVo8_1Sjv_ZoSupMOkLqPrFLIIvqQoHde6LLTFmvARSVdgg==&ch=7H4aezP3ZTbv9goRP2_ECEnIUUnVFOcn_pWWlpZRYXw7WU70JjIw9g==)

Whether you support us by chipping in, joining us at an event, or spreading the word on socials, your contribution makes a difference. Check out our social media and [website](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nglZUqIKXuSR_DiWUEv0aJRHmaHkzTjIFXGyUFrpz2RFVqcLNVH5jPWiVYNtdJsauBHXdnkPUwxT7QBu86CYiMcmKDFLbVqEWNOk_IJhIdo5t1te7YKC5Hd58TEvuP3-vwpkgVWSwLOrV_gZyMkzJg==&c=DAARtskoVo8_1Sjv_ZoSupMOkLqPrFLIIvqQoHde6LLTFmvARSVdgg==&ch=7H4aezP3ZTbv9goRP2_ECEnIUUnVFOcn_pWWlpZRYXw7WU70JjIw9g==) to stay up to date on the work being done for affordability in our Commonwealth. So get out there with your puppy pals, enjoy the weather, and keep fighting for an affordable Virginia!

* State legislatures play a critical role in the redistricting process, drawing over 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative seats.
* Republican gerrymandering in the states is one of the biggest obstacles to Democrats’ progress in this country.
* With enough support and resources, **state Democrats can use their power to pursue redistricting mid-cycle in order to protect our democracy** and expand Democratic power to even the playing field.

We are not going to sit back and allow the GOP to continue cheating the system to keep themselves in power. The fight for our future starts in the states, and right now, it starts with redistricting. clean_body: We are not going to sit back and allow the GOP to continue cheating the system to keep themselves in power. The fight for our future starts in the states, and right now, it starts with redistricting. | | | | | ---|--- Did you see the DLCC in The New York Times? The New York Times, August 4, 2025. Team DLCC is getting national attention for calling state Democrats into action to fight back against Republican gerrymandering. Here’s what you need to know: State legislatures play a critical role in the redistricting process, drawing over 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative seats. Republican gerrymandering in the states is one of the biggest obstacles to Democrats’ progress in this country. With enough support and resources, state Democrats can use their power to pursue redistricting mid-cycle in order to protect our democracy and expand Democratic power to even the playing field. We are not going to sit back and allow the GOP to continue cheating the system to keep themselves in power. The fight for our future starts in the states, and right now, it starts with redistricting. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC ** | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Did you see my team's email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4906%2E35263%2E70HOIv)
Hi there, Peter, did you see my team's email? I'm fighting to make life more affordable for people like you, and my new affordability agenda is the first step to repairing Trump’s long line of broken promises. You can read more below, but **[if you’re with me, please sign on now:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/affordability-agenda/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4906%2E35263%2E70HOIv)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/affordability-agenda/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4906%2E35263%2E70HOIv)
---
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Baldwin
Date: Sunday, August 3, 2025
Subject: This is just the start_
Peter — Tammy just introduced a groundbreaking package of bills to make life more affordable in Wisconsin.
Tammy's affordability agenda will lower the cost of purchasing a home for first-time homebuyers, ensure families can find and afford high-quality child care, and crack down on big corporations’ price gouging.
President Trump promised to lower costs for Wisconsinites — instead, he’s kicking hundreds of thousands of Wisconsinites off their health insurance and making life more expensive for hard-working families to give tax breaks to his wealthy allies.
To fix what Trump has broken and secure a more affordable future for every Wisconsinite, Tammy needs our full support behind this.
**[Please, voice your support for Tammy’s affordability agenda by adding your name to our petition today:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/affordability-agenda/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4906%2E35263%2E70HOIv)**
| [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/affordability-agenda/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4906%2E35263%2E70HOIv)
---
Thank you,
Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]
Peter,
MAGA’s brazen attempt to sabotage the midterms and take permanent control of the US House must not go unanswered. What’s going on in Texas right now is just the beginning, and it’s time for Democrats to fight back with everything we’ve got.
That's why I'm calling on Colorado to fight back and introduce our own Congressional map before Republicans rig our elections. While it may not be easy, it is necessary leadership. We simply can’t sit back and let Republicans rig elections. Our democracy is at stake. Our future is at stake. And I will not stand by idly.
If you agree, donate today. It’s time to dig in. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]

subject: re: Corporation for Public Broadcasting SHUTS DOWN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Breaking >>>>
| **We are DEVASTATED!!!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92730?t=6&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44) Trump gutted $1.1 BILLION from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block for _years to come._

[**We will NEVER forgive Trump or his MAGA minions for destroying public media! So we’re sending PBS a letter to thank them for their decades of service — and to stand with them in this critical fight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92730?t=7&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92730?t=8&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44)
---
TO: PBS
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. To everyone at PBS,

**Thank you.** From Mr. Rogers to Sesame Street to PBS NewsHour and so much more, your freely available programming has meant so much to millions of Americans!

I am FURIOUS with Trump and the MAGA mob for wiping out your funding, but please know that I have your back in this fight.

**I also know that Trump’s attacks on the free press don’t end here — he wants to shut down MSNBC, CNN, and anyone else who holds him accountable.**

It’s not just upsetting, _it’s a dangerous step towards**outright authoritarianism!**_ That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to stop him.

[**I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who defend public media and our most essential freedoms »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92730?t=9&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92730?t=10&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20812%2E878179%2EiXgx44)

name: Team Mace
subject: Did You See The News? Nancy Mace is Running for Governor.
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/did-you-see-the-news-nancy-mace-is-running-for-governor?e=ddc57b5ede)

Did You See The News?
Nancy Mace Is Running for Governor.
It’s official.
And the state, and the country, took notice.

============================================================
** We Need Your Help (http://www.nancymace.org/donate)
She made waves. Here’s what happened:

TRENDING ON TWITTER
Nancy Mace’s launch lit up social media within hours—"Nancy Mace" was trending across South Carolina and beyond, with supporters, critics, and media all weighing in. Videos from her launch event were shared thousands of times. Her “Trump in heels” line alone generated hundreds of thousands of views in the first 12 hours.

Engagement was off the charts—grassroots energy, national attention, and viral clips EVERYWHERE.
________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

HEADLINING EVENING NEWS ACROSS THE STATE

>From Charleston to Columbia to Greenville, Nancy’s announcement dominated state broadcast coverage:
* WCSC Charleston: “Mace launches campaign for governor with bold message: 'Hold the line'”

* WIS Columbia: “Nancy Mace enters governor’s race, pledges to cut taxes and crack down on crime”

* WYFF Greenville: “Mace kicks off campaign with town hall tour, vows to ‘put South Carolina first’”

She wasn’t just mentioned—she was the lead. Her message set the tone for the day across every local station.
________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

MAKING HEADLINES NATIONALLY

The national media took notice immediately. Her polling lead and aggressive policy platform made front-page digital news:
* The Hill: “Rep. Nancy Mace leads GOP South Carolina gubernatorial race”
* Reuters: “U.S. Rep. Nancy Mace launches run for South Carolina governor”
* New York Post: “Nancy Mace goes after ‘sanctuary sheriffs’ in fiery governor launch”

The message was clear: She’s not only in the race—she’s setting the pace.
________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

And here’s the part that matters most:

Despite the media firestorm, the rallies, the tours, and the viral attention...

Our average grassroots donation is just $22.
That’s real support—from real people—not special interests.
** Click to Donate (http://www.nancymace.org/donate)
This isn’t noise.
This is momentum.
And it’s only just begun.

Join Us Tomorrow in Myrtle Beach
** GET TICKETS (https://events.humanitix.com/moat-myrtlebeach)

“This isn’t just a campaign - it’s a calling. A call for common sense. A call for courage. And a call to put South Carolina first,” said Rep. Mace.

“You and me. This is where our mission begins. God’s not done with South Carolina - and neither am I. I’m Nancy Mace. I’m running for Governor of South Carolina. I will hold the line - I will fight for you. I will put South Carolina first!”
** Click to Donate (http://www.nancymace.org/donate)

–Team Mace

campaign@nancymace.org
Copyright © 2025 Rep Nancy Mace for Congress, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you signed up on NancyMace.org.

Our mailing address is:
Rep Nancy Mace for Congress
295 Seven Farms Dr Ste C-186
Daniel Island, SC 29492-8001
USA

You can ** update your preferences (https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&e=ddc57b5ede&c=423372f82a)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&t=b&e=ddc57b5ede&c=423372f82a)

History has been made, and now it’s time for you to step in and ensure we can continue our work | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=675ae313cb794d66aea0a06acae3c845&_e=lizrGOWRmn-1gx9Jd6saEawP3WA8P8V2BlYy0VirKzi80YIM-ott2c24YQmp_t7QKaJzip6ReNuriOtjqF5U4ZL4DQ03CrQ07RaX4k6HI1-AegUyR2jqvroMMvupC-c8p6fFvzJcVpNLpROd5zR0vl_KNA_eMasc9bPGt8Usp0swNSYafShKEyGQqIe4MwWI-qByEc5Da0HND1xoxBsDxiyXkruEHJ9GKoPjegar9b69mCiEuPSRExr7xacLwKS_ODsFy9UEm8XzJ7DY9uLthzWGEV1MunW-7wN3AwO9BYF6r9cr_ueb1GokL93FKAqJfUj5l_2JOMJmw05ScA2N-vrOEn8HoGJfACn_XEuP_zdqHvR48YQxjO9Ecyxalf0JCFe-vYhpk6LpQKD0kQr4P8IPLBymFx3bUkVTSXenWd7OvdgpAFQB8kzkSca7EUt8boWO1S6RDdJPg6hoSKWQdj866YDmbJpb3VxCPZF_HmcZ3IVEwFDieCx5XR_NcJzUum3cx4Q0NOWo_t4hIXJwUVqGMJtuXcPRbcVZcI3dNt8ZMj11VhUB2pAAX-B5DL9VIY5BcNFYNw-5nHciHA420N8LHcAngu3tjSv6mnk8G_I8s6WyUnXRD3y9PDnL1oSpzWFA7EU7pUJMI709adlK1OkYUWKzlI93nLdZg5gx3DoTfpjo5CN5-xjARwwD4-II443sMB3h3ae6TPsh-0ETPcNfhNuBLorWPuH-xqanhNUlWLQ6JYMDsD7G7cA1ND7PFyvG00yx0h2CG39if5IfvGzSoLfpgv4QnIyC8ZxuzYas7eHdVWE5huIjT7qPyIaGanbO867hHxndkVRqZm9tWBH0nEoHmxZ7bEFNclb-MzmwpCOsM4FmP8TiRziiCpD6wlRcZ5ST0ba6WDtb6fY2GA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

clean_body: Undecided voters WILL determine the results of this race | = Peter, check this out: = Mikie Sherrill is leading by EIGHT points in New Jersey's governor race. But, Peter, 16% of voters are still undecided. That voting bloc WILL determine the winner of this race — and we need to reach them before it's too late. = | = New Jersey has traditionally been a Democratic-leaning state, but Trump only lost the state by five points in 2024 — the closest margin in recent history. And, on top of that, New Jersey had a Republican governor as recently as 2018. It could happen again, especially with 16% of voters still undecided just three months before Election Day. Mikie is a proven fighter and winner, and with your help, we know she has what it takes to keep the Garden State blue this cycle. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Hi Peter,

Thanks to you, we’re entering August with our momentum at an all-time high.

2026 will be here before we know it, and Peter, I’ll need you by my side every step of the way to help defend my seat, take back the House, and send Roy Cooper to the U.S. Senate.

Meeting every deadline along the way is how we succeed next November, so Peter, thank you. None of this would be possible without you, and for that, I cannot express my gratitude enough.

I’ve made a commitment to build a better future for our children, and a better life for our communities. I’m not slowing down, and neither will the progress we’re fighting for in NC-04.

Together, we are unstoppable. Thank you for supporting me every step of the way.

With gratitude,

Valerie

name: Adam Kopel
subject: Will you add your name and stand up to Trump?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Hi there,
Donald Trump has barely been in office again for 6 months, and the nonstop firehouse of nonsense and cruelty in his unconstitutional actions is heartbreaking and infuriating.
We can’t let that stop us from fighting back. Minnesota didn’t vote for this, and we must let Trump know we won’t stand by. Will you add your name to our pledge to resist Republican extremism, both in Washington and here in Minnesota? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EvPpSfeHKkGNYNJ2BHctfw2]
PLEDGE TO RESIST
I, A Concerned Minnesota DFLer, pledge to resist this tidal wave of extremism. I will do what I can to speak up for those who can't. I will stand up for our shared values, rights, and freedoms.
ADD YOUR NAME NOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EvPpSfeHKkGNYNJ2BHctfw2]
Across the country, we’ve seen reports of historic numbers of Americans speaking up and contacting their elected officials. I’m here to say: don’t stop! We must all keep speaking up.
If we don’t, they will keep coming after our jobs, our health care, and our basic human rights. We can’t let them get away with it.
Will you speak up today and take the pledge? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EvPpSfeHKkGNYNJ2BHctfw2]
ADD YOUR NAME NOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EvPpSfeHKkGNYNJ2BHctfw2]
Adam Kopel
Campaign Director
Minnesota House DFL
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080425_ENG_PledgetoResist_AK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080425_ENG_PledgetoResist_AK]
We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080425_ENG_PledgetoResist_AK]
The Political Contribution Refund is a Minnesota program that lets you donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. It’s a fantastic way to support the work of the House DFL. Can we count on you to make your refundable donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

[] PLEDGE TO RESIST I, A Concerned Minnesota DFLer, pledge to resist this tidal wave of extremism. I will do what I can to speak up for those who can't. I will stand up for our shared values, rights, and freedoms. ADD YOUR NAME NOW [] Across the country, we’ve seen reports of historic numbers of Americans speaking up and contacting their elected officials. I’m here to say: don’t stop! We must all keep speaking up. If we don’t, they will keep coming after our jobs, our health care, and our basic human rights. We can’t let them get away with it. Will you speak up today and take the pledge? [] ADD YOUR NAME NOW [] Adam Kopel Campaign Director Minnesota House DFL [] We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session. Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [] The Political Contribution Refund is a Minnesota program that lets you donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. It’s a fantastic way to support the work of the House DFL. Can we count on you to make your refundable donation today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $75 [] DONATE $150 [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] [] [] Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus 255 East Plato Blvd Saint Paul MN 55107

[That's why our team created an open letter to Donald Trump opposing his actions to defund PBS and NPR. We have limited room left for signers, so please add your name right now to defend our beloved programming!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b9131e5-890a-47a1-abbe-0eb1a7996921/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

It’s embarrassing that you would spend your time attacking NPR and PBS instead of working to help the American people. [That's why we are taking a stand against your dangerous actions and condemning your plans to cut NPR and PBS.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc90d710f-1885-4d4a-89c1-af960d997937/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Sincerely, Peter

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19a0d26c-c8b0-4265-9547-46658b75ab86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

They’ve tried to cancel me. **Censor me.** _**Threaten me.**_ I’ve never wanted the fancy D.C. cocktail parties, the limos, or the endless flattery. **Because when you’re the first girl to sit in the **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
---
| | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | They’ve tried to cancel me. Censor me. Threaten me. I’ve never wanted the fancy D.C. cocktail parties, the limos, or the endless flattery. Because when you’re the first girl to sit in the barber chair at The Citadel, you don’t care about not getting invited to the fancy D.C. parties. They HATE me because they HATE you. In Washington, I didn’t sit quietly or play along. I stood up, and made sure the career politicians and D.C. insiders got nothing. ❌ I pushed back against the reckless policies of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris every step of the way. ❌ I passed President Trump’s America First agenda. ❌ I fought for common sense. ❌ And when they tried to let biological men into women’s sports, I stood my ground and won. That’s why the insiders are terrified of what’s coming next: I’ve taken on the establishment in Washington. Now I’m bringing the fight home. South Carolina needs a bold, fearless governor who will back President Trump and deliver the America First agenda without apology. I KNOW how to defend our values and protect our communities. | | **2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle!**
---
| [ ](http://)
---
| Join us for a day of **movement, music, and miracles** as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking **in person** at Huntington Beach Central Park or **virtually** from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! [Click HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1411da9ffe&e=3a42edfdc4) to Register! **Date:** Saturday, September 6, 2025
**Location:** Huntington Beach Central Park West
18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
[_(See our website for parking and map)_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=764d934827&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=0170406517&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---

| **Autism Health Webinar: “Stem Cells Made Simple” **
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=dc3faae7cc&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| We recently hosted an enlightening and informative webinar titled **“Stem Cells Made Simple”** , where we explored the science, safety, and benefits of stem cells derived from cord blood in a way that was easy to understand. The webinar provided a clear breakdown of how stem cells work, where they come from, and how they may support regeneration, immune modulation, and improved quality of life. Whether you're new to the concept or looking to deepen your understanding, this session offered powerful insights into one of the most promising areas of integrative health. If you missed the live webinar, don’t worry, we posted the full recording for those who would like to learn more at their own pace. In the meantime, if you're interested in scheduling a one-on-one consultation to see if regenerative therapy might be right for you or a loved one, please feel free to reach out directly to **Tracy at tracy@purhealth.com**. We’re here to guide you through every step of the journey with compassion, knowledge, and integrity.
---
| [WATCH HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=06b438baf5&e=3a42edfdc4 "WATCH HERE")

|

|

| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=53f22b947f&e=3a42edfdc4). **Reserve your spot today and save 10%** at: [www.ahsconference.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=7206ac9431&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=468fd2278e&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.

Hey folks,
We went live with a bonus edition of _Endless Urgency_ that you absolutely need to watch. I was joined by Texas State Representative James Talarico, who is currently breaking quorum and speaking out from an unknown location Illinois to stop what he calls a brazen power grab by Republicans trying to rig congressional maps in Donald Trump and the Republican's favor.
**Here are five timestamps worth watching:**
▪ 00:01:26 -- Talarico explains the personal sacrifices Democrats are making to leave Texas and break quorum, including family separation and financial risk.
▪ 00:04:13 -- A damning analogy: Talarico compares Republicans changing district maps mid-decade to a football team changing the rules at halftime.
▪ 00:08:00 -- He recounts how 99% of public testimony opposed the redistricting maps, and yet Republicans passed them in a backroom deal anyway.
▪ 00:17:00 -- Talarico talks about going on Joe Rogan's podcast to reach voters who feel abandoned by both parties--and how Democrats need to do more of that.
▪ 00:36:25 -- He ends with a powerful reflection on how his Christian faith fuels his public service, even when it means facing arrest or political exile.
This is a must-watch for anyone who feels disillusioned with politics right now. It's an emotional and strategic deep dive into why our democracy is on the line--and how we fight back. If you're ready for bold truth and uncommon courage, this conversation delivers.
**If you believe in building a better democracy, supporting the next generation of Democratic leaders like Rep. Talarico, and want to support the work we're doing here, become a paid subscriber today. This community thrives because of people like you who step up when it counts. Don 't sit this one out:**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xuUltH-MGjtkzFdKY4BAJrHtFdVvJhsUlOobtcNVKcY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170189031)
With urgency,
--Mike

I'm sick and tired of D.C. Elites calling the shots, so it's **CRITICAL** we hear from the grassroots heroes like YOU who put their blood, sweat, and tears into supporting the MAGA movement.

This isn't a poll or survey you can ignore or move into your trash.

Did I read this right? What I'm about to show you is NOT for public distribution. CONFIDENTIAL PARTY DATA - INTERNAL USE ONLY: 🔵 Democrat Party favorability: 19% 🔵 Worst approval rating in 35 years 🔵 Leading Presidential 2028 Candidate: Pete Buttigieg This is MASSIVE! As the Democrats' approval rating PLUMMETS and their failing brand of socialism CRATERS, the RNC is preparing to deal the finishing blow. At our internal strategy session, your name came up as a trusted ally of the MAGA movement. That's why I'm privately inviting YOU to the RNC's exclusive to shape our party's future. I'm sick and tired of D.C. Elites calling the shots, so it's CRITICAL we hear from the grassroots heroes like YOU who put their blood, sweat, and tears into supporting the MAGA movement. This isn't a poll or survey you can ignore or move into your trash. The is our ONE CHANCE to build a bullet-proof strategy blueprint to crush the Left and build a RED WAVE in 2026. | | Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis here. For far too long, weak-kneed politicians have promised everything — and _delivered nothing_ — while our borders crumble, our freedoms erode, and the American dream fades. _**_I launched RON PAC to change that._**_ We're building an army of conservative warriors who won’t cave to the Left, who will fight to secure our border, stop the woke left’s insanity, and put hardworking Americans first. In 2024, we helped elect fighters like Tim Sheehy and Dave McCormick. **Now, we’re going even bigger for this election cycle**. For far too long, weak-kneed politicians have promised everything — and delivered nothing — while our borders crumble, our freedoms erode, and the American dream fades. I launched RON PAC to change that. We're building an army of conservative warriors who won’t cave to the Left, who will fight to secure our border, stop the woke left’s insanity, and put hardworking Americans first. In 2024, we helped elect fighters like Tim Sheehy and Dave McCormick. Now, we’re going even bigger for this election cycle. But to do that, I need your help. name: Juliana, United We Dream
subject: This would remove any hope of citizenship for millions
body:
Congress took the easy way out. Our communities deserve better. | | | Peter,**** In the midst of violent and unlawful attacks against immigrants, members of the U.S. House of Representatives reintroduced the so-called “Dignity Act.” This version of the _Dignity Act_ goes even further by denying millions of people a pathway to citizenship, while keeping tens of thousands of our community members and loved ones locked in private detention. **The vast majority of people around the country support a pathway to citizenship, and 80% of people understand that immigration is one of our country’s greatest strengths** — supporting our labor force, our classrooms and lecture halls, and diversifying our communities. Instead of delivering permanent protections for millions or drafting a bill that addressed mass militarized raids, unidentified police kidnappings, or the damaging reconciliation bill, Congress took the easy way out. _Our communities deserve better._ [**This bill may have the word “dignity” in its title, but its impact is the exact opposite. Will you make a donation right now to help us as we call on Congress to reject breadcrumb bills and pass tangible solutions for undocumented people?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeVBoX_--R5MdCLtghflf2M22ArL55RzJdVF3c3vuIYI2WJCCkUg4EuZpWZH7DsTRWFeACvmqr-YgOzzsAOzyL4tTxyriEVGxzf82FdFcuWpP85h5jL1u0S_nARTgiC9FCYOCfNaWu4uQvERAex8gpQ9qe-dLGwEUL8_ym9TrzTFczG_EHFsRUZVLnDJW1SQmHw5mVpVwhJQWM2EuyWlrkwE2MmnLCcLGnUZ6GMv6sTHRchG0ZpOTMjjCydpL3F0Uxu9lUxnNEfOL7w1qNUbAjdzaf3qwD9rzpQHI_NMlM932hS2Hbst7sRAQ-_0KEZhnTewabvBlP_0WDryblHU0baLK_Nlb_Kk14zwmE3jm0gFsSHJo5Eg-4Rd-wuzqz73qSoneji2PQWgktdxZpvWT12CXyro16LOWu8JyyITKSIpcxxEufPOGM4NemRxw93iLy/4is/Di_j3v_8QiGl89hqeEdSiQ/h0/h001.3x9cbEh5fJxdLpZACzvgC6A2c0uMFqnT9vvKGzG7RW0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeVBoX_--R5MdCLtghflf2M22ArL55RzJdVF3c3vuIYI2WJCCkUg4EuZpWZH7DsTRWFeACvmqr-YgOzzsAOzyL4oOxcjtqtyXE1LpoK5LlhOxJDaqS1FxZWQKKY1Kp4g5oLJdlDSY4M4XW2p-0A30QskVJpwT6e2c-1U9JCIClwIwzBNTucgBnocuNPKgXZn_7WQwMnUE3kgWS0X2PtcboikC2IRrFnwDSSUGGxhwxKQlyZWktRm-LCIYz9PfRD-lFWx35M-OwICDjZcobfEa-CyWTizs2pGM-tBrnAcxxh-ZmvNV4ePs7BimOCU8XfEFGZnlPLfJSZe2FzqkPF3xeHx-R-2xVgUkgrWtT8smkczqBlZh76za4qN0LBSuj2A5fec6K8o5PNIEqlEIQahV_MfKOKnqOIjYcd_vxQtiov2rOIdvgVKMH6_y3g56N-YE92c7pOLBZXAg_Q0j2ZyXRJQ/4is/Di_j3v_8QiGl89hqeEdSiQ/h1/h001.tBTR5z12cfWH3M3Lj1-CGbd4DD6bJC6VBoYmrPXUi2I)

clean_body: Congress took the easy way out. Our communities deserve better. | | | Peter,** In the midst of violent and unlawful attacks against immigrants, members of the U.S. House of Representatives reintroduced the so-called “Dignity Act.” This version of the Dignity Act goes even further by denying millions of people a pathway to citizenship, while keeping tens of thousands of our community members and loved ones locked in private detention. The vast majority of people around the country support a pathway to citizenship, and 80% of people understand that immigration is one of our country’s greatest strengths — supporting our labor force, our classrooms and lecture halls, and diversifying our communities. Instead of delivering permanent protections for millions or drafting a bill that addressed mass militarized raids, unidentified police kidnappings, or the damaging reconciliation bill, Congress took the easy way out. Our communities deserve better. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Working people are demanding that leaders deliver affordable healthcare, invest in education, stand up for life-saving food assistance programs, and create straightforward pathways to citizenship that respect the humanity of immigrants. Our leaders can and must offer bold solutions that unapologetically turn the tide to protect the lives and rights of all working people.** Thanks for your support, — Juliana, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Scott Presler, Early Vote Action
subject: Huge progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
We are making massive gains

| | | | |
---
Dear fellow patriot,
It’s Scott Presler, writing to you from the front lines of Pennsylvania and New Jersey, where my team at Early Vote Action is rewriting the political map.
Thanks to our voter registration staff, we’ve slashed Pennsylvania’s Democratic voter lead by over 300,000 since 2020, flipping counties like Bucks and Luzerne red for President Trump in 2024. In New Jersey, we’ve cut the Dems’ advantage from over 1 million to just 834,000 - and we’re not stopping there.
**_But here’s the deal: our voter registration staff - real patriots hitting gun shows, farmers’ markets, and VFW halls - are running on fumes._**
Democrats are fighting back, pouring money into their machine to hold their ground. To keep registering new Republicans for New Jersey’s 2025 gubernatorial race and Pennsylvania’s 2026 elections,**_[we need your help to fund our staff](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aV5w/?__vbtrk=MzA4MTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
**Can you sponsor a voter registration staffer today?**
Just $15 covers an hour of their work - knocking doors, signing up truckers, veterans, and hunters to secure a red wave. Every new voter we register is a step toward flipping these states for good.

[SPONSOR A VOTER REGISTRATION STAFFER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aV5w/?__vbtrk=MzA4MTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We’re not just talking about change - we’re making it happen.
In Pennsylvania, we flipped Bucks County from a 15,000-voter Democratic lead to a 2,000-voter Republican edge.
In New Jersey, we’ve added 145,611 new GOP voters since 2021.
Friend, your support keeps this momentum alive.
Let’s make Pennsylvania the next Ohio and turn New Jersey purple in 2025. **_[If we have enough staffers, and sponsors, we can change the electorate for a generation](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aV5w/?__vbtrk=MzA4MTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

I’d be honored to have your support,

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I introduced legislation to repeal parts of Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, I introduced legislation to repeal the health care provisions in Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill,” including their reprehensible cuts to Medicaid.
Medicaid was signed into law by LBJ 60 years ago, and helps more than 70 million people around the country afford life-saving health care. This program is wildly successful, and is relied on by so many Americans to stay healthy, catch illness early, and get the medical care they need.
Despite their promises to “make America healthy again,” Trump and the GOP are doing the exact opposite — kicking more than 15 million people off their health insurance and making it harder and more expensive to access care under the ACA.
That’s not leadership, and it’s definitely not “beautiful.”
If you support my legislation to repeal the GOP’s Medicaid cuts, please add your name today to let me know. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/HHpij3ioUkq-PWWDYdhaIA2]
SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/HHpij3ioUkq-PWWDYdhaIA2]
The fact is, we will ALL be better off if more people can access health insurance — so thanks for standing with me on this.
-Tim Kaine
