name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/5/2025
body:
Russia hoax was the strategy: Clinton greenlit Trump smear to deflect from her email scandal during 2016 run
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Governor Polis is facing [sharp backlash from rural communities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), where residents say they’ve been abandoned in favor of urban interests. Once-supportive ranchers now accuse Polis of pushing anti-agriculture policies and ignoring the livelihoods of Coloradans outside the Front Range. Meanwhile, [tourism continues to decline ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)across the state despite record-breaking ad spending, and a tense incident near Colorado Springs saw two criminal illegal immigrants allegedly [attempt to ram ICE agents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) before fleeing into the Black Forest.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** The USPS has now confirmed a whistleblower’s claim of [hauling nearly 288,000 completed ballots](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) into Pennsylvania before the 2020 election—ballots that mysteriously vanished. At the same time, a group linked to the Mexican consulate is [pressuring U.S. banks to issue loans to illegal immigrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) using tax ID numbers, raising legal and financial red flags. And just declassified documents reveal the Clinton campaign authorized the [false Russia smear against Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to distract from Hillary’s email scandal during the 2016 election.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Michael Hancock warns that while urgency is sometimes necessary, [Congress must never cede its role](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in checking executive power. And Dr. Brian Joondeph breaks down how American Eagle’s bold Sydney Sweeney campaign[]() [triumphed over woke backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—showing that humor, beauty, and patriotism still win in the marketplace.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, August 5, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Russia hoax was the strategy: Clinton greenlit Trump smear to deflect from her email scandal during 2016 run](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Newly declassified documents and insider testimony has started to change how people view the whole Trump–Russia narrative. At the heart of it all is a 2017 intelligence report that claimed Vladimir Putin meddled in the 2016 election to help Donald Trump win.
For years, it was treated as fact. But now, that conclusion is being questioned both by former officials and documents that never saw daylight until recently. Among the most telling pieces of evidence are internal emails suggesting Hillary Clinton signed off on a plan to push the Russia angle, not because it was true, but to take heat off her own email troubles.
That Intelligence Community Assessment, or ICA, released just two weeks before Trump’s inauguration, said Russia’s goal was to hurt Clinton and give Trump a boost. But not everyone inside the intelligence world agreed.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Governor Polis Gets an Earful from Rural Towns Tired of Being Ignored](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Rural Coloradans are pushing back hard against Governor Polis, accusing him of selling out their communities in favor of Denver elites and progressive donors.
* Longtime ranchers say Polis’ wolf reintroduction and top-down mandates are wreaking havoc on agriculture, with little concern for the families who feed the state.
* While Polis allies tried to spin his record as rural-friendly, even former USDA Secretary Tom Vilsack admitted his policies haven’t produced visible benefits for small farms—just more government spending.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Joondeph: Woke critics fumbled while American Eagle cashed in](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [AMERICAN THINKER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* American Eagle’s ad featuring Sydney Sweeney with the line “She has great jeans” drew outrage from woke critics, who accused it of white supremacy and eugenics—but the backlash failed, and the brand’s stock soared 20%.
* The campaign’s unapologetic, cheeky tone resonated with Gen Z conservatives, proving that humor, sex appeal, and Americana still drive sales better than woke posturing and identity politics.
* The article contrasts AE’s success with Jaguar’s disastrous woke rebrand, arguing that consumers are rejecting sanctimony and craving authenticity—and warning brands not to cave to performative outrage.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hancock: The beauty of balance between urgency, authority and the republic](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK****| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 4** _One of the most brilliant features of the U.S. Constitution is its recognition of human nature—not just in its vices, but in its limitations. The framers didn’t just aim to prevent tyranny; they aimed to build a system that could govern well even though no institution—or person—is omniscient or omnipotent. It’s a humility baked into the structure._
__

**[Devotional: The Shield of Faith—How to go on the offense with truth as your defense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 3** _Take a moment to realize just how much you trust without even realizing it. Right now, you’re relying on the chair supporting you, your eyes to read these words, and your brain to understand them... talk about an unintentional faith in furniture and physics!_
__

**[They built the budget bomb: Now Colorado Democrats say President Trump lit the fuse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | JULY 31** _They built the budget bomb. Now they say Trump lit the fuse. Colorado Democrats want you to believe they’re victims of the Big Bad Federal Budget Bill. That the state’s $1.2 billion shortfall just... happened. Like a pothole after a snowstorm. Nothing to do with how they’ve governed._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29)) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
**⏱️ DID YOU KNOW?** That tiny pocket on your jeans? It was originally made for **pocket watches.** Early denim designs featured just four pockets total—two in the front, one in the back, and that small one up front to keep your timepiece safe.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Socialists cry 'power to the people,' and raise the clenched fist as they say it. We all know what they really mean: power over people, power to the State." – Margaret Thatcher
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | American Eagle’s ad featuring Sydney Sweeney with the line “She has great jeans” drew outrage from woke critics, who accused it of white supremacy and eugenics—but the backlash failed, and the brand’s stock soared 20%. The campaign’s unapologetic, cheeky tone resonated with Gen Z conservatives, proving that humor, sex appeal, and Americana still drive sales better than woke posturing and identity politics. The article contrasts AE’s success with Jaguar’s disastrous woke rebrand, arguing that consumers are rejecting sanctimony and craving authenticity—and warning brands not to cave to performative outrage. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ MICHAEL HANCOCK| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 4 One of the most brilliant features of the U.S. Constitution is its recognition of human nature—not just in its vices, but in its limitations. The framers didn’t just aim to prevent tyranny; they aimed to build a system that could govern well even though no institution—or person—is omniscient or omnipotent. It’s a humility baked into the structure. DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 3 Take a moment to realize just how much you trust without even realizing it. Right now, you’re relying on the chair supporting you, your eyes to read these words, and your brain to understand them... talk about an unintentional faith in furniture and physics! RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | JULY 31 They built the budget bomb. Now they say Trump lit the fuse. Colorado Democrats want you to believe they’re victims of the Big Bad Federal Budget Bill. That the state’s $1.2 billion shortfall just... happened. Like a pothole after a snowstorm. Nothing to do with how they’ve governed. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29) or send us a message on social media to chat | | ⏱️ DID YOU KNOW? That tiny pocket on your jeans? It was originally made for pocket watches. Early denim designs featured just four pockets total—two in the front, one in the back, and that small one up front to keep your timepiece safe. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Socialists cry 'power to the people,' and raise the clenched fist as they say it. We all know what they really mean: power over people, power to the State." – Margaret Thatcher | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. Hey Peter, People often ask us why we send so many emails. It’s a fair question — because if your inbox looks anything like ours, then we know that it can feel like the sky is falling during big fundraising deadlines or news events. We won’t scam you with hair-raising, all-caps subject lines or outrageous claims about how the world will end if you don’t donate. But the truth is that taking on Trump’s extreme agenda, supporting Democrats across the country, and fighting to win back our Democratic Senate majority will be extremely expensive. The disastrous _Citizens United_ Supreme Court ruling has opened the floodgates for dark money groups and shady megadonors to pour millions of dollars into campaigns and influence our elections, so we’re depending on grassroots donations from people like you to compete with their outsized spending. **[Small-dollar donations are how we put ourselves on track to take our country back and create a future where working families, not billionaires, come first. Too often, I see politicians making a show of their allegiance to other nations while ignoring the people they swore to represent. | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=4113f82de8d64ac4b3179c033552db79&_e=4ei9GCSEYZi8AHzx09Gnq6EVFX-TSL9dAxfBF11sTyIDh7M3CmFs2cht5GpTG8Dd83krRiRcUG5Eqle23Y1JsvOpvG_8M0TicG6dXybKPrUeDpT9qFDfK0mSzfO3oOmibeszBgqasQFPtqH7gMZkT6sVLK2BCFOcNtyGOE1Bse2jmCYWWyLTiDk3KijSUWIu82-b779LJKNM3I6yyN8v3AHYNBZ4ZdxYRD700uaKKQ9XG46LQiUcwvCVJ28cMFL911NmmO8Jb7QEVJnPP7GBhohDx07hdeqkc-PcbzLZKq5Cj4Ct6Y_UwUpxEdCEmB_L8SP3j4MC4GbNvw3JJuvFC1hUOFVKEx724txXyAxzw1r7IRmeyNlvlvKOXsDR_way4vZDUlRD5SWbhDLbAB00-RcT0gjww_Wf00qXr-Gy0wGigK_KrvZBoDE5hAZ5lDAazyHza5pXMGJ15N1XtBCITJerbQ8cSeWOmJWlLY1DcAcg1YV452J2wX_jfwrjS_Y-w53DKoss05CFXTPOhKRFMjgI-Ne65bpaGCrb3EGnjoacN-RlyuPKEwG41xz5q8tkyNNt5LbKmrMt-rsYOg8vzfwZib2LKsS-PSslV8GSjsUxDioxNdU_aTAOYXDwxQVRtKunuS_F9O8GZmhqaoZc6v7shhrAXeVI41o6LbIVlm5c3U3wVdIihdh1VPrixpI_7QychJUiuxu7cBxH2VVWDvbNnJwwfK87VYpMeRXCcqqDjgeUfBrHHvHjoQPAPZZkUnG46pFeKPuxVQ7jPhdsBw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

I’ve been thinking a lot about what it means to serve this country.

**To me, it’s simple: if you’re in a position of leadership here, your loyalty should be to America — and _only_ America.**

No divided loyalties. No competing flags. No excuses.

Take Representative Delia Ramirez, for example. At a summit in Mexico City, she told the audience,_“I’m a proud Guatemalan before I’m an American.”_ If you’ve been elected by Americans in the USA, you should be proud to be American. Why serve if that’s not the case?

clean_body: Too often, I see politicians making a show of their allegiance to other nations while ignoring the people they swore to represent. | Friend, I’ve been thinking a lot about what it means to serve this country. To me, it’s simple: if you’re in a position of leadership here, your loyalty should be to America — and only America. No divided loyalties. No competing flags. No excuses. Take Representative Delia Ramirez, for example. At a summit in Mexico City, she told the audience,“I’m a proud Guatemalan before I’m an American.” If you’ve been elected by Americans in the USA, you should be proud to be American. Why serve if that’s not the case? Too often, I see politicians making a show of their allegiance to other nations while ignoring the people they swore to represent. That’s not leadership. That’s a betrayal of trust. This isn’t about politics-as-usual. It’s about protecting the soul of the country we love. America should never take a back seat to anyone, not in our government, not in our culture, not in the way we live our lives. I’m running because I believe in a future where our leaders are fiercely, unapologetically committed to the prosperity and security of the United States — and nothing else. I’ve spent my life creating music that inspires people to imagine and to fight for something bigger than themselves. Now the fight is real, and it’s for our country’s future. Let’s win this together. Marty O'Donnell | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. [**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=40af293abc7b4b35add226051b6f06da&_e=XY0LSD2fCBtYHeY4aHUg7hC1WqkOs830rn1JnRAXkxCJGDMgeEOUSb2CcHbF1CEoFh3yYRwJJphjsxuztcNc8NHCaPUeuEqK3mjkSS6m_SP4c8NYtOdR8I0Cdju7wNxWUP3_gFnYx5vE61hhINvDAkT21e7eB-2gXlai63xzZAgufuw4DxGh9v3t55sPxGpu-JW1f8sBWOHjbfpw_HTaarFVgyjMi9jf50PCLFQaFoWUm2L1LuE8-lYNMuQPjJOnqEL1gl9vCFo686I-VM_704VWj-5Et7--EiKcbLJOIsLzWFPaJ4IuPleM77YsaEGTERhjbL29XhkbpwAqK-qHEPOIBR_WyEu_0tlFYbOlCjVxyMNS4SvSvliOrMTbBnkPtY8kLn8kae1H65H4kgtGpnLH4vVCeU98cj8paH0Ksf_aXI1TTHF1lWn0GKUa9_SCE9WT0Z0_Vr7LGBN6xFCduKInM3IWk2zW2ZSzavBWovsiUNIeoyWr9qpJ4dgX841pNEU_rkrcpHL9l4wombKescZT4upcnaagHskn5TBcK54b0oNh6UqGyu632sRtTvEa2B2wQVpCnlxjRZ3cp4FeikRbK_yLgYWcJAIAnUJi42SDBSb8HBVJgsA32T54H5CLTqxtQkuhDmLlwhSPmhUVtHz247uCjRAoku3ApslXkN4wr35E-_JDoefOZTvzqnI2r_wF5PaiqLGx0a_bb8LoFLt9naZxcSVPjFIX62L6n-I%3D)
Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Texas Democrats just took a stand. Trump wants revenge.
body:
This is not a drill: Trump and Greg Abbott are trying to steal Texas — and they’re threatening to jail Democrats who stand in their way.
We need to show the country that we have their backs. Rush an emergency donation now to help stop this MAGA takeover before it’s too late >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=080525_2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=080525_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=080525_2]
They’re trying to steal Texas — and they're willing to throw Democrats in jail to do it.
Before you read any further, here’s what we need from you:
👉PLEASE rush an EMERGENCY DONATION to help fight back against Trump and Abbott's rigged redistricting scheme [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=080525_2]
Donald Trump has already shattered countless democratic norms on the national stage - now he’s setting his sights on Texas.
Trump is personally pressuring Texas Republicans to redraw congressional maps in his favor — wiping out Democratic gains and securing GOP control before voters ever cast a ballot.
But Democrats in Texas aren’t going down without a fight.
In a dramatic effort to stop this scheme, Democratic lawmakers fled the state to block a vote on Trump and Abbott’s redistricting plan.
And how did Governor Greg Abbott respond?
He threatened to ARREST them for defending democracy!!!!
This is what authoritarianism looks like. This is what we’re up against.
And we need your help - right now.
PLEASE - will you chip in whatever you can to stand with the Texas Democrats, fight back against Trump’s gerrymandering plot, and protect our democracy before it’s too late? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=080525_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_2&amount=5]

Friend,
---
The Democrats and the Deep State have me caught in their snare.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being **JAILED** for the rest of my life, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the _ONE_ _THING_ that can save me: **_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU_**.
---
[**Please help me reach my life-saving goal (truly!) by adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI” by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help DROP ALL CHARGES against me.** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3d7abf2ed87b44bd9d3c4a3d3dbbafc5&_e=A1ChCO9RCp2o8FMttwG3b3dykPuLJuLYwPrUj7_pzKmVfC3kf_gmOoyfgNuPRjqF5GeNgymBzLi5xQKhZD_mnU-6b0Upuid-NVLmgF3lndyDJgF0zr7Z82XmmJ_Sft7y55J-XAEAXree5nXHDKF5O-hR6QXxYaNvSC4NqBjAEQA39BfDJIg4I2AuKZESvgQZtpNWKMZSZyibyv9Uu6lh7-k2FpDqSQOZr6B3b2czB_PP8grl6hI1uMRLVgT_vIc5HkaGQ9GxoiVYW7NHmhaw41ldxWLEPfCIjY0guU-VrXLITV7lhYAPNTASfXM_yOHsukT3u05b853Ax4kBUb0aSYawl6coBf7v-cyMOPLIqBMMxZblUHNL8ZbHvWUpIt51BPNeu1K__ZTcxd5L_t9qwdMjULbmxTY2WNrYMkIlGRkUccE2pqJfDNwHolQXxLTq2y4QYveQ4OrI8CHHp_visnzAjGJjTbPI0uJKkRsvqbq04J0zAIRrR9WUHuK3D5nwEh4kkzRxjL3D3BkvGclx4S5ByVFLVnc3UbmcBzaFR3wd3Kt3m-zGhEV8GnsAnd79kYwFAViOQ5KT4bZfMMtp6ophzTlG_LA4OikaIM3oNvAw_KCDFXOZV9mh5moaOB0oegO2WJVnZN-EOqRwbMdjdg%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3d7abf2ed87b44bd9d3c4a3d3dbbafc5&_e=A1ChCO9RCp2o8FMttwG3b3dykPuLJuLYwPrUj7_pzKmVfC3kf_gmOoyfgNuPRjqF5GeNgymBzLi5xQKhZD_mnU-6b0Upuid-NVLmgF3lndyDJgF0zr7Z82XmmJ_Sft7y55J-XAEAXree5nXHDKF5O-hR6QXxYaNvSC4NqBjAEQA39BfDJIg4I2AuKZESvgQZtpNWKMZSZyibyv9Uu6lh74eQVghGZXAsUfLfgqqzYQKc5Ts-Q-gqkc9A38efxbphcT-kmu7-PmVwMZkUv7JbPwsZXaT9k9RME6-MH9PquuZkcEB-if4ZNLm6xNjagmt1kKgzKHFI9vr3TtWTVC0ZtlDW1Zr7YRUvwiBYNC27buIV5ETQzf1Bh4LuRWGB7FLO2Oax2gj3dfIm3zLwbDRRmrzQLdCRtc5_0CI-EVF-XeowFG85K4whDv6RA8xoNC4YR2PdhglWUjU5ZpbfY-kUKfBbf4Dv6nZZGQ4gyspE-TpIcoUBxbeyz3vHwNksHO5ki1ijvnUatRYqmURwovEJ7J5cAjbyNiRS-2pV9RF1_0CouDEvZXwsavtqu3bwMa7XmA6fn2Hj5vyvsSmGpNVVEwujahnVI1E2z-2ismDfwDJuMR_QhQoHL-gFwoO5oiKYkFcj0JzQwHJdVEn5jpwPTA%3D%3D)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3d7abf2ed87b44bd9d3c4a3d3dbbafc5&_e=A1ChCO9RCp2o8FMttwG3b3dykPuLJuLYwPrUj7_pzKmVfC3kf_gmOoyfgNuPRjqF5GeNgymBzLi5xQKhZD_mnU-6b0Upuid-NVLmgF3lndyDJgF0zr7Z82XmmJ_Sft7y55J-XAEAXree5nXHDKF5O-hR6QXxYaNvSC4NqBjAEQA39BfDJIg4I2AuKZESvgQZtpNWKMZSZyibyv9Uu6lh71sWdjuAFB6XLDcrgbRdm6Q-lcAVr0ze4ZrjxDn32_CzWqVKkRIs4eCQ7sHYyDgyIgNZycQ9Es4wUI71Pal2hOp7yWbF1iO3k2hvnVlutI_FszTsVhHEx1rGiGMzJfYspoS9KwNF9so8eCBWel03MpCHpc6IQynI4Xz8DVKcm7VDjzjIwBwtB6fNYLqRZ-fuSkyy2mJfV7aKmfk_jPunA6g73yaOQVY5fHYl0M-EYmWAX1sEHb9c1Sm4rRBQLz-u8ecjC5JTRhK4RRB8qKfqwn1QNcTFrQn1ssUquot-05xqEvZeIunnXSlECaQp7KP99PW-fMaAQLuFBDv88le7d5SmWAX6RQXAvdLQFpljZ-QvvmlUEQqCLKJCl8qMK2pjdowQNO1ixtoGtjEApg_tS4qKE-b6osYJHlZBT3zXqOTkbT6w6beQpgunaWNsvL9EHA%3D%3D)
---

I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. _Or so I thought..._
---
Never did I imagine that I would be the centerpiece of one of the Democrats’ most vindictive plots in history.
---
This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies.
---
_But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth._
---
These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill...
---
_...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also _REFUSE_ to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. _
---
They entered my mugshot under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3d7abf2ed87b44bd9d3c4a3d3dbbafc5&_e=A1ChCO9RCp2o8FMttwG3b3dykPuLJuLYwPrUj7_pzKmVfC3kf_gmOoyfgNuPRjqF5GeNgymBzLi5xQKhZD_mnU-6b0Upuid-NVLmgF3lndyDJgF0zr7Z82XmmJ_Sft7y55J-XAEAXree5nXHDKF5O-hR6QXxYaNvSC4NqBjAEQA39BfDJIg4I2AuKZESvgQZtpNWKMZSZyibyv9Uu6lh72-INNOqymVxKFemfku4A-jZnk4CHCjTVnyh0etP0jWqviAxkrCQuIQf26G-VDgtyoexRW8e7cnROGd8eCY5V4yjlzhDwq8fW-I0AZ5nmIds_cFYjDs7mSf492VnmrMCsu-4jUD8v_cCqcPCcdkzd8vY9ue0LH6cSsxcei275tVTec16hMc_DK_sIxtHTwJ2lsMRoZrxCMsaEBtBbiIaLE3ynDd26m-KyG0lSB05gkNiX3hhmVLoar-IJINiGBGXWV18KwoRF3IQM7pJDBDn9M19OhG8WSAGyyWtAO_SMNaoP9wc_5O-367V_FBpy2wMGy0BtDxnUdWOvp0aVxpdN8Ci-vDcpOnWlH1UI-vGXpQVb6mKXFVn8SuEbhxGNfyJazfvYwORGvzIOb1oZ6yqT-_ijxsaFZsALGWUn2i_xmLSpGl8WboViAPFpqrQNJmj_w%3D%3D)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
_At this final hour, can I count on you?_
---

TONIGHT to help DROP ALL CHARGES against me.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3d7abf2ed87b44bd9d3c4a3d3dbbafc5&_e=A1ChCO9RCp2o8FMttwG3b3dykPuLJuLYwPrUj7_pzKmVfC3kf_gmOoyfgNuPRjqF5GeNgymBzLi5xQKhZD_mnU-6b0Upuid-NVLmgF3lndyDJgF0zr7Z82XmmJ_Sft7y55J-XAEAXree5nXHDKF5O-hR6QXxYaNvSC4NqBjAEQA39BfDJIg4I2AuKZESvgQZtpNWKMZSZyibyv9Uu6lh70xEJqULCamFYjtxxtXxwwLYj8LKHqGMqTBjg9Nj7RfW65GW2bMrF5sKfmYYJubt--g8uie3k6eqzOkGxsJ2Nx6VzLZ2mnHNkaJSFm0yeQE1qICzvyC7U878O2Pd_XsV2R2ZA2lpzaEww8gd1YrR1Sgsgzlr4WoaqcKq8WMDorYxrM3_PklkaKn3m680adtiFL5I89I6lScZ_0tSW-b0An2oBOzt0OuioZL8g9cIQ63jNXYLCQs5ivxF52lBTUuQd9GE9jVc06QKWzOnz_G2ZvKKW157hus9EJ0vMC4BGm-8WI6Q0AUF3Fcw99jXBJ8k1eBnWe9hnB4SgqAbqfkdUuABt1i1zXbUG90bbWOuSyLZ1SfZQ-5WIbrHSmt-sug-4fdvyT2wjpgo0vYppS6uhaMIvJl5mX01GY19knohDijYB3vp2v9HQZQm3b2uIPCVtA%3D%3D)

clean_body: \------------------------------------------------------ | Friend, The Democrats and the Deep State have me caught in their snare. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being JAILED for the rest of my life, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the ONE THING that can save me: the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. Or so I thought... Never did I imagine that I would be the centerpiece of one of the Democrats’ most vindictive plots in history. This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies. But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth. These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill... ...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also REFUSE to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. They entered my mugshot under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. At this final hour, can I count on you? Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Republicans want to stack the deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Stand with me and oppose the GOP’s attempt to rig our elections.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1710%2E582294%2ENtcn80)
We just got word:
One of my Republican opponents, Dan Innis, wants to propose a redistricting scheme modeled after the Texas plan — the same one that’s been called out for disenfranchising voters and rigging elections in favor of the far right.
Let’s be clear: **This is a blatant attempt by Republicans across the country to rig the 2026 election.**
Innis says he wants to bring the Texas GOP’s redistricting scheme to New Hampshire — but we know this isn’t about serving Granite Staters. It’s about pleasing Donald Trump.
I’m sounding the alarm now: _**We must stop this power grab before it takes root._**
[**Will you stand with me right now and oppose the GOP’s blatant attempt to rig our elections? Pitch in $5 or anything that makes sense for you to help fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250805_1_nhredistricting?refcode=em20250805-1710&amount=5&refcode2=1710_582294_Ntcn80&akid=1710%2E582294%2ENtcn80)
This stunt may help Innis win points with Trump, but we see it for what it is: _a desperate attempt to cling to power in the face of the growing backlash to the Trump agenda._
The GOP is raising costs on families, hurting small businesses, and attacking Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security — all while billionaires and big corporations get tax breaks.
Now they want to change the rules to stay in power, _even if voters want to reject them._
While they try to rig the game, we’re focused on winning the future — we’re working to protect Medicare and Social Security, lower costs for families, and defend the right to vote.
But to fight back, we need to build the grassroots momentum that powers this campaign.
[**Can I count on you? Rush a $5 donation today to help us push back against this dangerous proposal and defend our democracy in 2026 and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250805_1_nhredistricting?refcode=em20250805-1710&amount=5&refcode2=1710_582294_Ntcn80&akid=1710%2E582294%2ENtcn80)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250805_1_nhredistricting?amount=5&refcode=em20250805-1710&refcode2=1710_582294_Ntcn80&akid=1710%2E582294%2ENtcn80)**
Thank you for standing with me — and for standing up for fair elections.
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

clean_body: Stand with me and oppose the GOP’s attempt to rig our elections. We just got word: One of my Republican opponents, Dan Innis, wants to propose a redistricting scheme modeled after the Texas plan — the same one that’s been called out for disenfranchising voters and rigging elections in favor of the far right. Let’s be clear: This is a blatant attempt by Republicans across the country to rig the 2026 election. Innis says he wants to bring the Texas GOP’s redistricting scheme to New Hampshire — but we know this isn’t about serving Granite Staters. It’s about pleasing Donald Trump. I’m sounding the alarm now: We must stop this power grab before it takes root. This stunt may help Innis win points with Trump, but we see it for what it is: a desperate attempt to cling to power in the face of the growing backlash to the Trump agenda. The GOP is raising costs on families, hurting small businesses, and attacking Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security — all while billionaires and big corporations get tax breaks. Now they want to change the rules to stay in power, even if voters want to reject them. While they try to rig the game, we’re focused on winning the future — we’re working to protect Medicare and Social Security, lower costs for families, and defend the right to vote. But to fight back, we need to build the grassroots momentum that powers this campaign. Thank you for standing with me — and for standing up for fair elections. Chris New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: some bad news, some good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
The Senate map this cycle is brutal, and Democrats have no path to retaking the Senate majority in 2026 without defending seats like Colorado’s.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93101?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V)
I have to share some bad news with you: **the Senate map this cycle is brutal, and Democrats have no path to retaking the Senate majority in 2026 without defending seats like Colorado’s.**
Just let that sink in for a moment, folks.
**If we lose this seat, there goes our best chance of rebuilding our Democratic Senate majority to halt Trump and Republicans’ extreme agenda and continue making progress for working people** — like expanding access to health care, keeping jobs here in America, tackling the sky-high cost of living, _and more._
Now here’s the good news. **I’ve got one heck of a card up my sleeve: an incredible grassroots team.**
Look, National Republicans have been eyeing this seat ever since we won in 2020 and flipped Colorado blue. But this seat has a history of flipping back and forth, so we can’t afford to get complacent and let the GOP tighten its grip on Congress.
**Peter, that means it’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026.[If you’re up for that fight, please, take a moment to split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots and help us prepare for the long road ahead. →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93101?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V)**
If you have stored your info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution to John Hickenlooper and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93102?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93102?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93102?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93102?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93102?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93102?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93101?refcode=em20250805-9226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9226%2E614464%2ES7cD0V)

Thanks for everything, it means a lot to me.
Let’s win this thing,
John

We’re going to Paint it Red this summer and every summer until we have solid, conservative, Republican Red, everywhere – I hope to see you there to join in the fun August 17th! | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203 | | | | | | | | You can or | |

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Tell our idiot president not to destroy essential satellites just because they can measure global warming
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell our idiot president not to destroy essential satellites just because they can measure global warming](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c15fb4b-c643-44fc-b584-3caf254285a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88b85c61-ce82-4b79-a6df-f2d429fc51a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The satellites are state of the art, expected to last for many years, and provide data that is critical to farmers, scientists, and anyone else with a need to measure carbon levels. But it looks like our idiot president may be [destroying them](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26844928-094f-4c43-bd10-4fda5bfc602c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) because they were initially made to track global warming: _" The Trump administration has asked NASA employees to draw up plans to end at least two major satellite missions, according to current and former NASA staffers. If the plans are carried out, one of the missions would be permanently terminated, because the satellite would burn up in the atmosphere. The data the two missions collect is widely used, including by scientists, oil and gas companies and farmers who need detailed information about carbon dioxide and crop health. They are the only two federal satellite missions that were designed and built specifically to monitor planet-warming greenhouse gases." ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bfdd343-3a86-446b-9174-7ff3d6d0cffa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ Making this action even stupider, shutting down a satellite properly is very expensive, while keeping it running is relatively cheap when it's already in orbit. So it's not a money saver, it's likely just another step in Trump's war on science and logic, and his unilateral disarmament in the battle against climate change. [**Fight back against the stupidity. Tell Trump not to destroy essential satellites just because they measure global warming**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2953ef74-d11b-49d9-8658-6c95ab9add7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T498c571d-8979-409e-81a5-6afa0aa9416f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e25ded5-ad8e-4285-9239-6b6ff2c406fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2c1785c-de72-46f0-b060-136a20193070/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/texas-democrats-go-into-hiding-at-st-charles-hotel-amid-arrest-threat-from-gov-abbott.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=65ad2540c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
The Q Center Hotel and Conference Center in St. Charles, Illinois, a suburb in Kane County once considered a conservative stronghold.
By Illinois Review

Texas Democratic lawmakers have taken refuge at a secure hotel in St. Charles, Illinois, after Governor Greg Abbott ordered their arrest in response to their dramatic departure from the state – a move intended to block a Republican-backed redistricting bill.

The lawmakers are staying at the Q Center, a 95-acre hotel and conference facility nestled along the Fox River in suburban St. Charles. On Monday evening, security personnel were seen stationed at the entrance, controlling and restricting access to the gated property.

subject: I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Hey, it’s Jon Ossoff. Before you close this email, hear me out:

I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, and MAGA is pouring millions into Georgia to take me down.

I’m the number one target in the country for Trump’s GOP.

So if you are upset with what's happening to our country right now and you're ready to fight back, please split a donation between John Hickenlooper and my campaign here in Georgia today.

Here’s a link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-hickenlooper? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-hickenlooper?]I promise you: together, we will win in Georgia. We will save the Republic.

Thank you so much for your support.

Jon
Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add hello@hickenlooper.com to your address book.
Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe: https://action.hickenlooper.com/p/cTrdfv93Ski9KUzCx_WudA2?unsubscribedata=Eqeh%2FXg4D%2BO16lIdBo%2BD1uP1Vy%2BQITNKXpzthDXcMudpqhVJ3C5KnKnozIpLN8VqEFF7gEWXxhAih7QDgRXNV%2Fu5INkkkIqjBqZCCwdiEsSKYPMMtFTOpkUHRzngcGyjgEJAFeOseHhZ%2FZY9L9PPE3VI7WLkMISV4l2oTky01yyRN1Ce6Hqhfm7qpqrE1l0ezfor9AVzFkdjoAMtBb1rWOEzk03394s1FrXAZeC0J6P9NxqsFtvGylaobF84dzF5H34jch%2FLGzUGk3N9H%2FFDLP5VLoVEZdDVxaFoQDmZHrUMaWLxqr%2F%2BzGQl4LdsKf%2F0sv0oMD98Zztg5j36uebCR0rI63aeKCwFd2571RzsT7PQzHNux07ALR%2FibdXv3M9bey9XvVtM3M6HFXYmoUyoNGVW5yp0zf1BEi82WwmD%2BpA%3D .

name: Heidi Hall
subject: Friend, healthcare is a human right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250805_em_fr_b1_HH_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250805_em_fr_b1_HH_initial]
Friend, it's Heidi.
I'm excited to announce that we can now add the largest Democratic healthcare workers PAC in the country, Healthcare for Action , to the list of groups endorsing our campaign for Congress.
Dedicated to patient-centered and equitable political change, Healthcare for Action is a group that's run by people who we couldn't live without— healthcare workers.
Friend, my brother is an ER nurse, and he loves his job.
But I know that our healthcare workers are facing challenges previously unheard of and that they are only getting worse. With cuts to Medicare and Medicaid, threats to rural hospitals, and attacks on science based medicine, we need someone in Congress who understands that the healthcare workers who love their jobs shouldn't have to worry about being paid fairly or being protected.
And we need someone who will listen when the people we trust in situations that deal with acute care to prevention start to ring the alarm on harmful political threats that are putting our lives in danger.
Friend, healthcare is and always should be a human right, and I am committed to fighting for healthcare for all in Congress. But doing so means going up against entrenched interest groups, and I need your help. Will you help my campaign by donating what you can to help us fight to expand healthcare access and affordability in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250805_em_fr_b1_HH_initial]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250805_em_fr_b1_HH_initial]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250805_em_fr_b1_HH_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250805_em_fr_b1_HH_initial]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250805_em_fr_b1_HH_initial]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Becca Balint
subject: Stacking wood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112799163/561657515/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYyY2RhNC0zYjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R21mxInEK7v0kixjyDT-WDtjy8zjRezAsY42PO6STqY=)
---
Peter — Congress is in recess, which means I’m back home meeting with Vermonters, holding events, checking in with local organizations and businesses, and also taking some deep breaths. The August recess means I don’t have to fly down to D.C. each week. It means I won’t be away from my family or my dog. **And for me, the August recess also means I will be stacking three cords of wood. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112799164/561657516/-289842851?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYyY2RhNC0zYjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R21mxInEK7v0kixjyDT-WDtjy8zjRezAsY42PO6STqY=) We heat our house with a woodstove in the fall, winter, and early spring, and the green logs need to be stacked so that they dry out before the snow comes. Stacking wood is meticulous, straightforward, and purposeful. I feel a sense of satisfaction as I see the stacks held back from collapse. I’m in control. And it feels good to hold on to that feeling when so much feels out of control in our country right now. The reality is that being in the minority party in Congress means that we have very little tangible power. Until we flip the House, that’s just the cold, hard truth. The good news? The American people overwhelmingly oppose cuts to SNAP. They don’t want giveaways to billionaires. They want a government that works for them. Our job now is to show people exactly what their representatives are doing in Washington and offer a better path forward. That’s what I’m in this fight to do. I’ll keep showing up, speaking out, and standing up for working families. **[But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in today to help us flip the House and elect Democrats who will stand up for working people, not billionaires?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112799165/561657517/-289842851?amount=10&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYyY2RhNC0zYjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R21mxInEK7v0kixjyDT-WDtjy8zjRezAsY42PO6STqY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112799166/561657518/-1075723345?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYyY2RhNC0zYjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R21mxInEK7v0kixjyDT-WDtjy8zjRezAsY42PO6STqY=)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: America doesn’t suffer from scarcity, we suffer from greed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Rep. Flood says we don’t have the money to fund food assistance or health care research.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1747%2E791427%2EORa0nb)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4590?t=2&akid=1747%2E791427%2EORa0nb)
Friend, I’ve said it before and I’ll say it now — **America doesn’t suffer from scarcity, we suffer from greed.**
Republican Rep. Mike Flood says we don’t have “unlimited money” to fund food assistance (SNAP) or health care research.
So why did he vote to cut taxes for the top 1% to the tune of **_$1 trillion?**_
If Republicans like him really care about government spending, why did they just vote to add almost **_$4 trillion**_ to the national debt?
The truth is, programs like SNAP are drops in the bucket compared to these huge billionaire tax breaks. But Republicans cut them anyway because they’re cruel. They don’t think working families deserve a helping hand.
And when their own constituents have questions about why their healthcare coverage and food assistance are being cut, Republicans turn out their pockets, shrug their shoulders, and say dumb things like “well we don’t have unlimited money!”
So let me amend Rep. Floods’ statement for him. What he means to say is that we don’t have unlimited money for healthcare, housing, food, and education for the American people, but **we do** seem to have unlimited money for tax cuts for billionaires, endless wars, and subsidizing mega-corporations.
I’m running for reelection because I know that in the richest nation in the history of the world, we have more than enough to take care of our own. We just have to choose to prioritize working families over billionaire donors.
**[If you agree, chip in to my reelection fund today. $5 or whatever you can afford helps us continue to go on offense and hold Republicans accountable for their disastrous agenda that is hurting Americans in every state and every district across the country.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250805-1-90&t=3&akid=1747%2E791427%2EORa0nb)

In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: Haley Stevens
subject: why I love Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
in 60 seconds, you can help our campaign a lot

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=415%2E49239%2Et0Zjt3)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4018?t=2&akid=415%2E49239%2Et0Zjt3)
---
Hi null, it’s Haley Stevens – and I want your input.
**
[Will you take 60 seconds to complete my official campaign priorities survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=415%2E49239%2Et0Zjt3)**

**But before you respond, I want to tell you why I love Michigan – and why I’m running for U.S. Senate.**
**FIRST** , I was born and raised right here in Michigan. My parents ran a landscaping business, so I grew up surrounded by grit, grease, and hard work. That upbringing shaped me – it truly taught me the value of hard work – and it’s why I’ve made it my life’s calling to fight for Michigan’s working families.
**THEN** , I served as chief of staff on President Obama’s Auto Rescue Task Force during the Great Recession – helping save more than 200,000 Michigan jobs. And in 2018, I flipped a red House seat blue and helped Democrats take back the majority in a crucial midterm year.
**NOW** , I’m running for Senate, and the stakes couldn’t be higher: Michigan’s open seat will determine who controls the Senate, and multiple polls show I’m the only Democrat consistently beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers. But this race is still considered a pure Toss Up, and we need grassroots momentum to win.
**[null, I need your input to help guide our winning strategy. We still need 63 responses from 18326 – will you take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=415%2E49239%2Et0Zjt3)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=415%2E49239%2Et0Zjt3)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

With grit and gratitude,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. name: NEED A JOB?
subject: The White House wants you to deport, not rebuild.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Have you seen the White House’s latest ICE job posting?
It’s not just a recruitment ad — it’s propaganda .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/Screenshot%202025-08-05%20141128.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/Screenshot%202025-08-05%20141145.png]
They’ve plastered Uncle Sam’s face across a dark, dystopian call to action:
“ America has been invaded by criminals and predators. We need YOU to get them out. ”
No degree required.
$50,000 signing bonus.
$60,000 in student loan repayment.
25% premium pay.
All to rip families apart.
Meanwhile
🚨 There’s “not enough money” to raise teacher salaries.
🚨 No funding to shore up our cities before the next hurricane or flood hits.
🚨 But ICE ? They’ve somehow got a blank check and $75 billion to burn.
The GOP says this is patriotism. We say it’s a police state in the making.
And if we don’t stop them — if we let this new deportation army rise unchecked — then we are complicit in the cruelty.
Fight back. Fight smarter. Fight now.
Pitch in today to help us expose the lies, protect our communities, and elect leaders who know that security doesn’t start with fear — it starts with dignity.
→ CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]

subject: One of our opponents is already spending $1.4M+ on TV ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Anything can happen with this self-funding opponent propping up his campaign with his immense personal wealth.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39980%2E3422442%2EvHi7RP)
This weekend, Katie Porter’s billionaire opponent attacked her in an interview, saying: _“She’s a school teacher. What does she know about running anything?”_
**Now, he’s spending $1.4 million on TV ads. Take a look:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250805_1_ak?refcode=em20250805-39980&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39980_3422442_vHi7RP&akid=39980%2E3422442%2EvHi7RP)
Candidates don’t normally spend on TV ads this far out from an election, but because our opponent is a billionaire, he can spend unlimited amounts of his own money (he’s already cut himself a $10 million check!) to influence this election.
Katie is a single working mom who’s spent her entire career standing up for working families. She isn’t bankrolling her own campaign; she’s doing the hard work of listening to Californians and earning their votes. That’s the kind of leadership California needs, and that’s why Katie has consistently been the top Democratic candidate in the polls.
**But anything can happen with this self-funding opponent propping up his campaign with his immense personal wealth.**
**[We’re counting on Porter Supporters to power us to victory. Can you donate $5 to help Katie win next year and defeat this out-of-touch billionaire?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250805_1_ak?refcode=em20250805-39980&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39980_3422442_vHi7RP&akid=39980%2E3422442%2EvHi7RP)**

name: Team Cooper
subject: They killed public media.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
They want to keep you uninformed, so they shut down public media. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112799647/561659018/823540626?refcode=ea.b364ad99-3d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.b364ad99-3d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzY0YWQ5OS0zZDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXzwXDFoQP8C4fFM6JJf2qgHTlR6wlIn9V34XakoUiI=&emci=767fabe6-1d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b364ad99-3d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
**_The New York Times:_
Corporation for Public Broadcasting Will Shut Down** This is unacceptable, Peter. Washington Republicans have succeeded in essentially killing public media as we know it in America. This is what happens in authoritarian regimes. It should give us all pause. After cutting all funding for public media from the federal budget, the GOP is one step closer to their long-held goal of ending access to public media. **The Corporation for Public Broadcasting — which distributes federal funds to PBS and NPR — is shutting down.** **[Peter, if you’re angry, too, please add your name to our petition demanding the federal government restore public media funding >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112799651/561659020/134880036?refcode=ea.b364ad99-3d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.b364ad99-3d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzY0YWQ5OS0zZDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXzwXDFoQP8C4fFM6JJf2qgHTlR6wlIn9V34XakoUiI=&emci=767fabe6-1d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b364ad99-3d72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)** **Americans across the country rely on PBS and NPR for reliable, factual, and _free_ information** — especially folks in rural areas, where a local NPR station might be the sole provider of community news. Republicans would rather you not have that information. But Peter, it’s not only the news that will get cut. From educational programs for children to shows highlighting what’s happening in our communities, all the programming that PBS and NPR provide is on the line now. It may seem like a trivial matter in the face of so many other concerns, but the effects are real and will be felt by families across the country. PBS Kids shows help teach math and literacy skills alongside social-emotional development. They have a tangible impact on the youngest learners. Public media is a public good, and we have to save it. **[Please — join us and speak up for public media. clean_body: They want to keep you uninformed, so they shut down public media. | The New York Times: Corporation for Public Broadcasting Will Shut Down This is unacceptable, Peter. Washington Republicans have succeeded in essentially killing public media as we know it in America. This is what happens in authoritarian regimes. It should give us all pause. After cutting all funding for public media from the federal budget, the GOP is one step closer to their long-held goal of ending access to public media. The Corporation for Public Broadcasting — which distributes federal funds to PBS and NPR — is shutting down. Americans across the country rely on PBS and NPR for reliable, factual, and free information — especially folks in rural areas, where a local NPR station might be the sole provider of community news. Republicans would rather you not have that information. But Peter, it’s not only the news that will get cut. From educational programs for children to shows highlighting what’s happening in our communities, all the programming that PBS and NPR provide is on the line now. It may seem like a trivial matter in the face of so many other concerns, but the effects are real and will be felt by families across the country. PBS Kids shows help teach math and literacy skills alongside social-emotional development. They have a tangible impact on the youngest learners. Public media is a public good, and we have to save it. | Thank you for being with us in the fight. Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. name: Kevin Kijewski for Michigan Attorney General
subject: 🇺🇸 Invitation to Join Kevin Kijewski, Republican for Michigan AG, in our Fight to Restore Freedom and the Rule of Law 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/invitation-to-join-kevin-kijewski-republican-for-michigan-ag-in-our-fight-to-restore-freedom-and-the-rule-of-law-kzdxhqid3w?e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7dcfb3865e&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=f6b2b3255d&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend and Patriot, I hope this letter finds you well as we navigate these challenging times for our great state of Michigan. As a lifelong Michigander, husband, father, practicing attorney, and former school superintendent, I am writing to introduce myself and share why I am running for the Republican nomination for Michigan Attorney General in 2026. **Our state is at a crossroads, and we need strong, principled leadership to restore public safety, protect our constitutional rights, and rebuild trust in our government and elections.** Over the past few years, we've seen an alarming erosion of the principles that make Michigan strong. The current Attorney General, Dana Nessel, has wasted taxpayer resources on politically motivated lawsuits – [filing 28 against President Trump in just eight months](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=b904bcfb29&e=4b10910eed) – while ignoring escalating crime rates and failing to enforce laws fairly. Governor Gretchen Whitmer's administration has overreached, from tyrannical COVID mandates that crippled small businesses and families to[ delaying special elections, leaving districts like the 35th Senate without representation for over 200 days](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=bfd07ff943&e=4b10910eed). This isn't justice – it's Democrat partisanship run amok, undermining our freedoms and the rule of law. As an attorney, I've been fighting for Michiganders' rights. I am currently defending the Trump alternate electors from the 2020 election against [Dana Nessel's improper, unjust, and politically tainted charges – prosecutions that are nothing more than lawfare](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=d6ad626565&e=4b10910eed) designed to silence political opponents. [I've even recently petitioned the U.S. Supreme Court to end this bad faith pursuit, arguing that it violates constitutional rights and constitutes retaliation against those who dared to question the election results](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=970af9242b&e=4b10910eed). We cannot allow our Attorney General's office to be weaponized for partisan gain. [As your next AG, I'll put an end to such abuses and ensure justice is blind, not biased](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=33826c0d92&e=4b10910eed). During the Whitmer/Nessel COVID lockdowns, as Vice Chair of the Michigan Association of Non-public Schools (MANS), [I built a statewide coalition and organized federal litigation that successfully kept tens of thousands of students in reopened high schools](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=f7526a7626&e=4b10910eed). Thousands of elderly died alone, separated from family, and our public school children suffered setbacks in their education and socialization because of these unnecessary and oppressive mandates. I fought back to protect our kids and families from government overreach, and I'll do it again as Attorney General. [I've also defended clients like those in Flint who were unjustly arrested simply for exercising their First Amendment rights](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=3186230e20&e=4b10910eed) at a city council meeting, speaking out against corruption. [I've stood up against red flag laws that are ripe for abuse, stripping law-abiding citizens of their Second Amendment rights without due process](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=1766ecff52&e=4b10910eed). And I've advocated for election integrity, [supporting initiatives like the citizen-only voting amendment that would require proof of citizenship and photo ID to register to vote](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=515fd6f8ba&e=4b10910eed): common-sense measures to secure our elections and restore confidence. **If elected Attorney General, my priorities will be clear:**
1. **Restore Security and the Rule of Law** : I'll crack down on crime, [support our law enforcement officers](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=58cca42aa2&e=4b10910eed), and ensure violent offenders are held accountable, not released prematurely under soft-on-crime policies.

2. **Restore Freedom and Protect Constitutional Rights** : From defending the Second Amendment against gun grabs to stopping government overreach that silences free speech, I'll fight to safeguard the liberties that define us as Americans – including pushing back on mandates and overregulation that harm our farmers, hunters, and families.

3. **Restore Trust in Government and Elections** : No more political prosecutions or selective enforcement. [I'll investigate corruption, enforce laws impartially, and work to prevent fraud, ensuring every legal vote counts and our democratic process is secure](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=fe08dc707e&e=4b10910eed).

[Michigan deserves an Attorney General who puts people over politics, who prioritizes justice and security for all](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=f3900c90b6&e=4b10910eed), not just those who align with a radical agenda. I've appeared on national platforms to call out the lawfare in our state, and I've joined grassroots efforts across Michigan to build the momentum we need to win. **But to make this vision a reality, I need your support**. Running a statewide campaign against well-funded Democrats requires resources, and every contribution helps us spread our message, mobilize voters, and fight back against the left's destructive policies. **Whether it's $25, $50, $100, or more, your donation will make a difference in restoring Michigan to the prosperous, free state we all love**. You can donate by mailing a check to: Kevin Kijewski for Michigan115 W Allegan St, Ste 900Lansing, MI 48933 Or securely online at [kevinformi.com](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=0964ad43cf&e=4b10910eed) and click on contribute. I look forward to connecting with you in the months ahead at local events, on X (formerly Twitter) [@KevinKijewski](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=573df91910&e=4b10910eed), or through my website [kevinformi.com](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=48060bcf3d&e=4b10910eed). Together, we can take back our state and ensure a brighter future for our families. Thank you for your consideration and support. Let’s make Michigan red again! Sincerely,Kevin KijewskiRepublican Candidate for Michigan Attorney General
---

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] Team, The fight to take back the House and protect our democracy won’t be won overnight. It’ll take grit, persistence, and long-term investment — starting right now. Jason Crow flipped and held a Republican seat — the first Democrat to do so in Colorado in decades. He knows that supporting strong, principled leaders across the country requires more than a last-minute push. That’s why we’re asking you to be part of something bigger: Will you start a monthly donation today to power Jason’s work, bringing a new generation of leadership to Congress, and help us prepare for the fights ahead? [] START A MONTHLY DONATION [] From now through November 2026, every month matters. Extremists are already raising millions to cling to power and keep putting special interests over everyday Americans. But we’re building something better, and it starts with you . To do that, we need a team and resources we can count on. Monthly donations help us plan ahead, invest where it counts, and stay ready for whatever might come our way. If you’re in this for the long haul (like Jason is), please consider committing to a monthly recurring contribution today. [] START A MONTHLY DONATION [] Thanks for being on this team, — Crow for Congress Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: Would you ban Congressional stock trading?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Straight from Politico: " A Senate committee voted to advance a bill that would ban stock trading by lawmakers, presidents and vice presidents — over objections from most Republicans and with a limited carve-out for President Donald Trump."
Sen. Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) introduced a bill barring members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks. Hawley joined every Democrat on the Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee, voting to send the bill to the full Senate. It is unknown when, or if, Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) will bring it up for a vote on final passage.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should the President, Vice President, members of Congress, and their families be banned from trading stocks?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=080525_2&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=080525_2&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080525_2&amount=20]
