### _Folks, The Number of New Paid Subscribers Dramatically Slowed Last Week. Without You, We Can 't Continue to Expand The Soundcheck Fund--Just as Trump Kills PBS & NPR. Please Consider a Paid Subscription to Support Independent Media_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.QKoGdygVH5lw6qBh908WpX07ymwGuBOfU3DW6pE2A4M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170209211)
**By David Shuster**
Once upon a time, the American public rightfully believed that numbers--cold, pitiless, and fully immune to the whims of politicians--could be trusted.
On our worst days (and best) of war, peace, prosperity, financial implosion, and mother nature, U.S. government statistics were the one thing that could be counted on to deliver empirical sanity.
The Bureau of Labor Statistics, in particular, was a heavy granite marker of such sanity. Now, it has been toppled and crushed by a man who would make [Jeffrey Epstein blush](https://substack.com/redirect/075c641e-d233-4a44-b357-3540d4376e35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and P.T. Barnum bow in reverence - Donald J. Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c56feed5-f03b-4203-bd7e-37b7ee2d429d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yes, in a fit of characteristic petulance akin to a spoiled child denied a happy meal, Trump has fired the commissioner of the BLS. The crime? Not corruption, nor incompetence, nor scandal.
_**No, something far worse in the warped court of MAGA**_**: the commissioner told the truth.**
Yes, the actual honest labor numbers upset His Orange Excellency. They refused to dance to the infantile tune of Trump's ego ([as polling numbers have also refused to do recently, also is giving Trump a fit](https://substack.com/redirect/6345eb53-3753-42e0-a58a-b4f37c1c0e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
Unemployment figures--measured by dull but diligent statisticians armed with nothing more lethal than survey data and Excel spreadsheets--had the temerity to contradict Trump's promises. And by contradict, I mean his job creation absolutely nosedived.
Delivering yet another blow to both Trump and his predilection for predicting his success at...well, anything.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8137d3c9-c8bf-43be-97b5-f260fc8f17d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So, with the theatrical flourish of**a despot whose understanding of governance begins and ends with applause meters at his rallies and financial payoffs for his corruption, Trump axed the BLS commissioner.**
In saner times, a president tampering with labor statistics would be tarred, feathered, and sent back to his tower to count his gold toilets. [A functioning non-monopoly media](https://substack.com/redirect/40bd36da-083b-40c6-b4b8-f4d6c1bf046a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) might remind people--as we have--that blaming census takers and not himself for a shrinking Russia due to economic self-sabotage and the resulting famine [was the playbook of some guy named Stalin](https://substack.com/redirect/7367da40-420c-414a-a551-6c86875f12ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
You've probably heard of him.
But [in this new Gilded Age of Trump, truth is treason, arithmetic is an affront, and independent institutions are but props](https://substack.com/redirect/5328fc3e-ca4a-4db9-ba70-4132188d36ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to be smashed when they cease to flatter the Don's imperial vanity.
Perhaps we shouldn't be surprised. After all, Trump, has long waged war against expertise and knowledge. Scientists, economists, PhD's -- he regards them all with the same sneering contempt Trump reserves for the facts themselves. [Or fair play](https://substack.com/redirect/5328fc3e-ca4a-4db9-ba70-4132188d36ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Trump is not a man who embraces enlightenment](https://substack.com/redirect/f3e1a713-6c10-4e10-b9c5-91e1e2001b45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or literacy, let alone intellectual humility. To expect this man to respect the integrity of labor statistics is like asking a deaf donkey to appreciate opera.
This firing is not merely a tantrum; it is a warning. It says, loud and clear that no civil servant is safe if he or she fails to genuflect before the gospel of Trump. Today, it is a statistician; tomorrow, [it will be the census taker](https://substack.com/redirect/7367da40-420c-414a-a551-6c86875f12ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the weather forecaster, the high-school math teacher who dares to teach percentages.
The only permissible numbers will be those scribbled on the back of a cocktail napkin by some inebriated or Kool-Aid drinking Trump White House aide. Then blared from Truth Social--or those Karoline Leavitt lips Trump is so creepily consumed with--like commandments from on high.
Let's be clear. [Trump is not a reformer, or economic crusader, or trade war virtuoso. He is a vandal](https://substack.com/redirect/657aa458-6503-42d5-9a50-4de5ed0f5760?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He is a swaggering pompous, uninformed, self-absorbed jackass in fancy suits and extra-long ties who destroys or damages literally everything he touches. And now, Trump is trampling on and shredding basic arithmetic.
Some math, though, cannot be erased. In 2024, The U.S. Senate confirmed Dr. Erica McEntarfer as commissioner for the Bureau of Labor Statistics by an overwhelmingly bipartisan vote of 86-8. Her predecessor, who also worked under Trump, excoriated Mango Mussolini for [engaging in the actions of a tin-pot tyrant](https://substack.com/redirect/b62e68ec-0b5e-4647-8964-6468ad4a7860?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Even J.D. Vance, an Ohio Senator at the time, voted in favor of her confirmation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a9302b99-69b0-4c3f-8160-2b73ebf325a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**In the ledger of our national decline, let the record show that at the start of August 2025, Dr McEntarfer was cast aside not for lying, but for failing to lie.** Meanwhile, the man who did it, Donald Trump, is not fit to run a lemonade stand, let alone our republic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/12fd0fa8-44ab-423f-923c-452a311a7398?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Go ahead and Google the recent economic and financial histories of Greece and Argentina if you want to see where Trump is now taking us. International investors have already started bailing on the United States of America.
And analysts are predicting that [it will get significantly worse](https://substack.com/redirect/2dafafd0-ab9e-43c7-97f0-75f0b097ad2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Give Trump an ass-kissing tweet or a million-dollar purchase of his merch or crypto scam, and he'll give you fantasy. Give Trump a fact and he'll fire you.
God help us all.
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and[ co-host of our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."](https://substack.com/redirect/51e07dc9-96bd-4e5d-8440-df77792e2b30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: A beacon of hope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history.
Derek, I don't just want to win this November — **I want to win big.**
Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we'll send about the 2026 midterms. Voters are furious about the chaos coming out of Washington, and our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history.
_And can I be honest for a minute?_ That's a lot of weight on my shoulders.
But I'm ready to seize the moment. There is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going and win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond.
**[I can't do it without you! Will you split a donation between Adam Schiff and my campaign for Governor today to make sure we have what it takes to win big this November?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-spanberger.F4SKTz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250805_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=3&akid=8858%2E5257348%2E4mkNlb)**

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Battleground
body:
| |
---
Hi friend, **This is real: NJ-09 is one of the most competitive congressional districts in the entire country. And that means our race could decide who controls the House of Representatives.** Here’s how Punchbowl News put it: _**“[NJ-09 is] now freshly competitive.”**_ We won this seat last year, even as Donald Trump made major gains in New Jersey and won this district himself. But now, national Republicans are all-in on flipping this seat. Their path to keeping the House majority runs through districts like mine. They’ve launched multiple dark money false attack ads against me, and this is only the beginning. But I’m not scared. I won this district because voters know me, trust me, and have watched me fight and deliver for working families throughout my career. And that will never change. **[We need to defend this seat and take back our House majority. clean_body: | | Hi friend, This is real: NJ-09 is one of the most competitive congressional districts in the entire country. And that means our race could decide who controls the House of Representatives. Here’s how Punchbowl News put it: “[NJ-09 is] now freshly competitive.” We won this seat last year, even as Donald Trump made major gains in New Jersey and won this district himself. But now, national Republicans are all-in on flipping this seat. Their path to keeping the House majority runs through districts like mine. They’ve launched multiple dark money false attack ads against me, and this is only the beginning. But I’m not scared. I won this district because voters know me, trust me, and have watched me fight and deliver for working families throughout my career. And that will never change. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Winsome served our country as a Marine and is currently serving Virginia as Lieutenant Governor. She's already the first black female Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, and with your help, she'll be the first black female Governor in the country! However, polls are TIED and her liberal opponent is using dark money donors like George Soros to outraise Winsome by MASSIVE amounts! supporting Winsome Earle-Sears, and I need you to join me. God bless,Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. body:
Trump is separating our families, ripping Medicaid away from millions, and forcing through the biggest health care cuts in history
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112801245/561664363/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=virginia_medicaid_fundraiser_8_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTc3MDRhMS00MjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ASFytKqKn5lB7GxO88CQ9pheKqDPMldOvLD0gJPMlL8=&emci=9099e207-2a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0a7704a1-4272-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Peter,
Care communities across our country are under attack. **Trump is separating our families, ripping Medicaid away from millions, and forcing through the biggest health care cuts in history** , taking away the livelihoods of countless careworkers.
**But right now, we have our first opportunity to show Trump and his Republican backers that our communities will hold them to account at the ballot box.**
Statewide elections are quickly approaching in Virginia – and together **WE are going to make the election a referendum on what Republicans have done to our communities**. Our team is *already* mobilizing – hiring organizers and planning events in key cities and districts to spread our message far and wide to domestic workers and care voters across the state.
National headlines are already calling Virginia the “bellwether” for 2026. **If we win here, it sends a signal: attacking caregivers and our healthcare is a losing strategy, everywhere.**
[**Can you chip in $10 or $25 to fuel Care in Action’s work to hold Republicans and Trump accountable for the pain they’ve caused, starting in Virginia NOW?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112801246/561664364/1818386542?refcode=20250805&amount=25&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=virginia_medicaid_fundraiser_8_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTc3MDRhMS00MjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ASFytKqKn5lB7GxO88CQ9pheKqDPMldOvLD0gJPMlL8=)
[Add Your Name](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112801247/561664365/1818386542?refcode=20250805&amount=25&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=virginia_medicaid_fundraiser_8_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTc3MDRhMS00MjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ASFytKqKn5lB7GxO88CQ9pheKqDPMldOvLD0gJPMlL8=)
Strategists say that Virginia’s elections will be a referendum on Trump’s first months in office – and will give us a clear indication of what’s to come in next year’s midterms. **So our team has made it our mission to put everything we have into showing Trump and other Republicans that our communities will not stand by while our care is ripped away.**
Because one thing is certain: Trump’s cruel cuts are going to mean real human suffering. Almost one in four Virginians currently relies on Medicaid. Thousands will lose access to essential care or jobs that keep their families afloat. But **Trump, his backers in Congress, and Republican candidates running in Virginia this year are hoping that our communities don’t connect the dots.**
[**Together we’re going to make sure they do.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112801248/561664366/1818386542?refcode=20250805&amount=25&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=virginia_medicaid_fundraiser_8_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTc3MDRhMS00MjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ASFytKqKn5lB7GxO88CQ9pheKqDPMldOvLD0gJPMlL8=)
With your donation today, we’ll reach thousands of key voters – hitting the streets in strategic neighborhoods, sending our organizers door-to-door, and working the phones to make sure the people of Virginia understand what Trump has done. **We’ll host town halls, train volunteers, and make sure voters know how to hold Republicans accountable at the ballot box.**
[**Our team is rapidly scaling up to reach as many VA voters as possible, but we need to urgently raise the funds to expand our efforts to reach all the communities where Medicaid cuts will hit hardest. Will you donate today to fuel Care in Action’s election work, including in Virginia, and help us send a message Republicans can’t ignore?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112801249/561664367/1818386542?refcode=20250805&amount=25&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=virginia_medicaid_fundraiser_8_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTc3MDRhMS00MjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ASFytKqKn5lB7GxO88CQ9pheKqDPMldOvLD0gJPMlL8=)

As always, thanks for all you do,
The Care in Action Team

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: MAGA meddling in blue districts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
Hi Peter,

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida have been fighting for working
families — and calling out the Trump administration’s BS — since day one.

That doesn’t sit well with Republicans, and now it’s clear that they’re
trying to silence and intimidate those of us leading the fight for justice
and equality.

Hear us loud and clear when we say this – we will not back down.

Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib didn't back down when a MAGA congressman
claimed they were "terrorists" and said some of our Squad members
"shouldn't be Americans."

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ayanna Pressley didn't back down when Trump
and his cronies relentlessly mocked them and attacked them online.

And we’re certainly not backing down now – while MAGA billionaires and
dark money groups are meddling in Democratic districts, trying to force
progressives like our Squad out of office.

Hateful attacks won’t stop us.

Because while they resort to fearmongering and smear campaigns, we’re
focused on what really matters: standing up to injustice, delivering
results, and building a more equitable tomorrow for everyone.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250805-svf?refcode=em20250805-36905&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&refcode2=36905_1203867_rP89hs&akid=36905%2E1203867%2ErP89hs ]MAGA Republicans want to silence us, and we need your help to make sure
they don’t succeed. Will you split a donation between Justice Democrats
and the Squad Victory Fund to help us fight back against MAGA hatred and
extremism?

Unapologetically,

The Squad Victory Fund

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I have a few special stories to share with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
These stories explain exactly why we can't give up.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112801492/561665297/1328794144?refcode=ea.6c3aed2d-4372-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.6c3aed2d-4372-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjM2FlZDJkLTQzNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D2m2oQU2xSaM6WGZ66MjCB7wyZqnVXRy7mbQ-cKqfXQ=&emci=d1fca1f1-2272-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c3aed2d-4372-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
**$267 million.** That's how much the Trump administration clawed back from national park staff funding through his "Big Beautiful" law. This is happening in the middle of the summer, when parks are packed and staff are already stretched to their breaking point. These places have been part of my life for decades. When I got lost deep in the mountains at Sequoia National Park in 1989, it was park workers who saved my life. I think about that now, and I wonder: If it happened today, would anyone even be left to look for me? While these devastating cuts feel like a gut punch to so many of us, what they can't cut is our stories. Our memories. And they damn sure can't cut our determination to fight back. I was so moved to hear from so many of you after I asked folks to share what our national parks meant to them. **I want to share just a few of the touching stories we received:** | “In the last years of their life, while my partner was dying of cancer, we were able to travel all over the continental US together by car. We went to every national park and I have many wonderful memories of the things we did there.” — Emily M.
---
“My happiest memories are of family trips to national parks where we camped and took in the beauty of the star-filled skies at night and hiked through meadows covered with wildflowers during the days.” — Leslie M.
---
“I was fortunate as a young woman to travel by car across the US. My greatest memories are from the many parks where we camped. From Yellowstone, Glacier Park, Yosemite, and Muir Woods, giant Redwoods and more left me in awe of our country. The staff who guided us, warned us of bears, and protected the parks were wonderful people, caring and committed to the amazing parks they managed.” — Patricia A.
---
This is why we fight. Not just for the precious land, though that matters. But for what these places mean to us, and for the people who protect them.
**There is no denying that Trump is gutting our National Park System piece by piece and leaving our most treasured places defenseless. But I've spent my whole life refusing to back down from bullies, and I'm not about to start now.**
**[Every climate champion we elect is another nail in the coffin of Trump's destructive agenda and another step toward the future our parks deserve. clean_body: These stories explain exactly why we can't give up. | $267 million. That's how much the Trump administration clawed back from national park staff funding through his "Big Beautiful" law. This is happening in the middle of the summer, when parks are packed and staff are already stretched to their breaking point. These places have been part of my life for decades. When I got lost deep in the mountains at Sequoia National Park in 1989, it was park workers who saved my life. I think about that now, and I wonder: If it happened today, would anyone even be left to look for me? While these devastating cuts feel like a gut punch to so many of us, what they can't cut is our stories. Our memories. And they damn sure can't cut our determination to fight back. I was so moved to hear from so many of you after I asked folks to share what our national parks meant to them. I want to share just a few of the touching stories we received: | “In the last years of their life, while my partner was dying of cancer, we were able to travel all over the continental US together by car. We went to every national park and I have many wonderful memories of the things we did there.” — Emily M. “My happiest memories are of family trips to national parks where we camped and took in the beauty of the star-filled skies at night and hiked through meadows covered with wildflowers during the days.” — Leslie M. “I was fortunate as a young woman to travel by car across the US. My greatest memories are from the many parks where we camped. From Yellowstone, Glacier Park, Yosemite, and Muir Woods, giant Redwoods and more left me in awe of our country. The staff who guided us, warned us of bears, and protected the parks were wonderful people, caring and committed to the amazing parks they managed.” — Patricia A. This is why we fight. Not just for the precious land, though that matters. But for what these places mean to us, and for the people who protect them. There is no denying that Trump is gutting our National Park System piece by piece and leaving our most treasured places defenseless. But I've spent my whole life refusing to back down from bullies, and I'm not about to start now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

👋 To all of our supporters,
We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end.
Here's the key point: **Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate.**
That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. _And that's precisely what they've done._
Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.
_And when we say small donations, we mean it._
This month, our average gift is around $30. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion.
But now, with less than three months until Election Day, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election.

clean_body: Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. = 👋 To all of our supporters, We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end. Here's the key point: Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate. That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. And that's precisely what they've done. Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. And when we say small donations, we mean it. This month, our average gift is around $30. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion. But now, with less than three months until Election Day, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election. = = = = = = = We appreciate your support! 💙 Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

clean_body: I want to organize a boycott if American Eagle PULLS this ad | Peter, Wait, Sydney Sweeney is supposed to apologize for being hot? Man, America... I'm so glad we're finally catching on to this nonsense. I want to organize a boycott if American Eagle PULLS this ad. We're done with this garbage. It's all a distraction. The real eugenicists we're told to trust and let spray our crops, dropping condoms off in Africa to stop population growth. That's Eugenics! This is just a hot girl selling jeans! And if they meant "genes", her genes are good too. Pretty people are pretty people of any race. You know what ticks me off, every race-baiting pissant that's a part of this psyop! Where they act like this has anything to do with racism or caring about "poor minorities". You people just want the government fat as an elephant seal, squeezing the life out of us. Barack Obama... biggest wealth transfer in history, show me where they ever went after the top 1 percent? Don't insult our intelligence with the woke woo woo. We like Sydney Sweeney! She's fine as a frog's hair. You people are embarrassing me! Stop with all the snowflake buffoonery. | I’m running for Senate to END the woke woo woo. But the same people throwing a hissy fit over Sydney Sweeney are working against me. They have BILLIONS of Deep State dollars, while all I have is YOU. Royce White for U.S. Senate MN 2026 Remember Normal? Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. name: Ami Bera
subject: Your voice matters, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

In Washington, too many are focused on political drama and partisan games. Trump and the GOP are dedicated to spewing damaging rhetoric to distract from their goal to slash taxes for billionaires. But I’ve always believed that public service should be about one thing: **putting people over politics to deliver real results for the people I represent.**

That’s why I’d be grateful if you’d take a few minutes to complete my **Constituent Issues Survey.** Your feedback helps me stay focused on the issues that matter most to folks back home. **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112801830/561666115/-1675752115?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250804_SV_Priorities_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2I0YWYwZC00NDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NdoCmMoNDCNRluZxOIyrcTrR2Wmf4eS5wt4LEL3chM=&emci=c1dfc106-4472-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f3b4af0d-4472-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32394541)**
Whether your top priorities are affordable healthcare, strengthening our economy, tackling climate change, or protecting our democracy — your voice helps shape my work in Congress.

Thanks for sharing your thoughts and for the opportunity to represent you.

Warm regards,

Ami Bera

name: Saikat for Congress
subject: You are not 'null'!
body:
I'm really sorry for calling you 'null' yesterday!

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=7a074f1a44&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | | Yesterday I said that on our campaign we don’t have an “email program.”
I also called several thousand of you “null.” As in:
Dear null,
It was supposed to replace blank names with “Friend”! But I did something wrong in Mailchimp — which is our _email program_!
This led at least one supporter to believe they had caught me in a lie:
---
|
---
| I appreciate the vigilance! But please allow me to explain. Yes, we have a program that sends our mass emails. (Well, we do now! — one I’m still learning to use.)
What we do not have is an _email program_. Typical campaigns internally refer to their operation around mass emails (mainly for fundraising) as their “email program.” They usually hire a company to run it. The company generates a flood of fundraising emails — usually with no involvement from the candidate even though they’re all being sent in the candidate’s name.
On Saikat’s campaign, we see email as a powerful tool that can allow us to include thousands of supporters almost as though you’re right in the office with us.
So I really promise you — Friend — (and hopefully that said your name or ‘Friend’ and not ‘null’!) — that while, yes, we have a program that sends emails, we do not have an _email program_ run by some company that treats you like an ATM.
And speaking of being in the office with us, it looks like we’re going to have at least 50 volunteers on Saturday door knocking with Saikat and our field team. As incredible as that is a full year before the election, I would really love to make it 60!
---
| [Sign up for Saturday canvassing](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=08baeeaa19&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| Sign up, and join us this Saturday, 11:00AM, 800 Irving St.
Looking forward to seeing you there! (And I’ll really try not to call you ‘null’ in any future emails.)

clean_body: I'm really sorry for calling you 'null' yesterday! | | | | | | | | | | Yesterday I said that on our campaign we don’t have an “email program.” I also called several thousand of you “null.” As in: Dear null, It was supposed to replace blank names with “Friend”! But I did something wrong in Mailchimp — which is our email program! This led at least one supporter to believe they had caught me in a lie: | | I appreciate the vigilance! But please allow me to explain. Yes, we have a program that sends our mass emails. (Well, we do now! — one I’m still learning to use.) What we do not have is an email program. Typical campaigns internally refer to their operation around mass emails (mainly for fundraising) as their “email program.” They usually hire a company to run it. The company generates a flood of fundraising emails — usually with no involvement from the candidate even though they’re all being sent in the candidate’s name. On Saikat’s campaign, we see email as a powerful tool that can allow us to include thousands of supporters almost as though you’re right in the office with us. So I really promise you — Friend — (and hopefully that said your name or ‘Friend’ and not ‘null’!) — that while, yes, we have a program that sends emails, we do not have an email program run by some company that treats you like an ATM. And speaking of being in the office with us, it looks like we’re going to have at least 50 volunteers on Saturday door knocking with Saikat and our field team. As incredible as that is a full year before the election, I would really love to make it 60! | | Sign up, and join us this Saturday, 11:00AM, 800 Irving St. Looking forward to seeing you there! (And I’ll really try not to call you ‘null’ in any future emails.) Zack ExleyCampaign ManagerSaikat for Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Saikat for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: My America First Priority Survey
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206v05wshzoje9n5ps0lgvrw7yzbgzv9i0v367bj2oxaj1k4agzkglpx6f3lwf0pe3nevb24m2hcg2gnrjt&__stmp=t0jitu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0jitu&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1dlp0y74nw2xcuk7iz2ybokqbkftb7hlm40d98e2n7ftwf7sq57djjh1nsr7s6edra2rgs67jioezttve6dp5b54kw8kp7o5tpxn5omvln54g7fk6c54qwckbwg5q6ffhrfelropbm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0jitu&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0jitu&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0jitu&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0jitu&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1dlp0y74nw2xcuk7iz2ybokqbkftb7hlm40d98e2n7ftwf7sq57djjh1nsr7s6edra2rgs67jioezttve6dp5b54kw8kp7o5tpxn5omvln54g7fk6c54qwckbwg5q6ffhrfelropbm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0jitu&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0jitu&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jena Griswold
subject: fwd: Kicking into high gear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Hi,
I wanted to personally forward you this message from my campaign team because this new month allows us to set bold goals. We’re more determined than ever to make this the best month of our campaign so far.
This race isn’t about me—it’s about protecting Colorado’s rights, our freedoms, and the future we owe the next generation. We’re up against powerful forces who want to roll back progress, but I know we can win when we stand together.
If you’re able, please take a moment today to help us kick off August strong. Every dollar, every show of support, helps us reach more voters and build the campaign we need to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email]
Thank you for always being in this fight with me.
— Jena
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email]
Peter –
It’s the first Monday in August – the perfect time to kick things into high gear.
As we head into the final stretch of summer, our campaign is hitting a critical point. Jena’s not backing down from the fights ahead. She’s ready to stand up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists, defend reproductive freedom, and protect the Colorado way of life.
Let’s match her energy—starting today. This month is about building on everything we’ve done so far—and going even further.
Can you chip in $25 or more to help us kick off August strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250805-email]
Thanks for being part of this team. Let’s make it a month to remember.
— Team Jena
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.

Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Derek Tran
subject: I’m not on vacation. I’m working for you.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802270/561667794/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0NzcwNzYtNDc3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pgeLKCF0CqlN9-QU5Azdueo5RbTv78myBxn0S1_Z8PQ=)
I hope you are enjoying your summer.

While Republicans forced the House into recess for the month, I’m not using it as a vacation. I’m back at home in CA-45 connecting with my constituents and the issues that they care the most about.

I’m covering a lot of ground, but it’s impossible for me to reach everyone. **[So today, I’m sending you our August issues survey: Will you take a minute to complete it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802271/561667796/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0NzcwNzYtNDc3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pgeLKCF0CqlN9-QU5Azdueo5RbTv78myBxn0S1_Z8PQ=&emci=5212426f-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5477076-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**
| **[Begin the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802273/561667797/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0NzcwNzYtNDc3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pgeLKCF0CqlN9-QU5Azdueo5RbTv78myBxn0S1_Z8PQ=&emci=5212426f-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5477076-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**
---

Democrats across the country are refusing to stand down while the MAGA agenda continues to chip away at our democracy.

Texas House Democrats left the state to stop their Republican counterparts from passing new maps that would redraw the lines in the state – handing the GOP FIVE seats in Congress to secure their majority.

**It’s inspiring, and it’s exactly what we should be doing right now: Fighting the good fight for the millions of Americans whose lives are at stake.**

That’s no exaggeration. Republicans’ so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” will strip millions of their health care, food assistance, and make life harder for the working class – all to give their billionaire donors a tax break.

As the son of Vietnamese refugees, I know firsthand that this country _can_ do better – it’s what helped my family survive and thrive as small business owners, and inspired me to join the Army to give back.

We need to stay focused on what matters to move forward. **[That’s why instead of asking for your donation, I’m asking for your participation in our latest survey to inform my next steps in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802275/561667799/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0NzcwNzYtNDc3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pgeLKCF0CqlN9-QU5Azdueo5RbTv78myBxn0S1_Z8PQ=&emci=5212426f-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5477076-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**
**[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802276/561667800/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0NzcwNzYtNDc3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pgeLKCF0CqlN9-QU5Azdueo5RbTv78myBxn0S1_Z8PQ=&emci=5212426f-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5477076-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**
---

Thank you,

Derek

Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. # Standing for Truth
### Faith, Family, and Freedom: Standing for Truth in a Compromised Culture!!
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Aug 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
In an era when truth is under attack, this video explores the vital connection between politics, the church, and the family. We discuss why believers must boldly stand for biblical values, defend our freedoms, and raise the next generation with truth and conviction. From government overreach to moral decline, this is a wake-up call for Christians to engage, lead, and refuse to stay silent. Truth still matters. 📖 "...having done all, to stand." - Ephesians 6:13 #FaithAndFreedom #ChristianConservative #FamilyMatters #ChurchAndState #StandForTruth

subject: 40,000 messages in a year. I want yours:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802449/561668427/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNlNzk4NC00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBYB4_UrRPI9a3OAZJQvoDjZmv5RqU3Nwi-KrenHYRc=)
Peter, Last year, our team answered over 40,000 messages from constituents – that’s more than 110 a day. And I still want more. Whether serving you as your local community meteorologist or as your Congressman, **your voice matters.** This relationship should always be a back-and-forth conversation. And in that spirit, I want to know what’s keeping you up at night – and what we can do. [**Can you let me know here?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802450/561668431/-29403877?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNlNzk4NC00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBYB4_UrRPI9a3OAZJQvoDjZmv5RqU3Nwi-KrenHYRc=&emci=ab63952e-2c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=be3e7984-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858) | [Ask Eric Anything](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802452/561668432/-29403877?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNlNzk4NC00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBYB4_UrRPI9a3OAZJQvoDjZmv5RqU3Nwi-KrenHYRc=&emci=ab63952e-2c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=be3e7984-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858)

I entered Congress on the promise I would represent the needs of my home district and working families across Illinois and the country.
Because nothing I do in Washington is just about me — it’s about we.
You can ask me anything: about my campaign, the issues that matter most to you, my favorite places across the district, or even what it’s going to take to flip the House through the Midwest.
I’ll read every question submitted, and I’ll answer as many as I can.
[**So if you have a moment, send in your question, Peter. I truly can’t wait to hear what’s on your mind.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802455/561668435/-29403877?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNlNzk4NC00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBYB4_UrRPI9a3OAZJQvoDjZmv5RqU3Nwi-KrenHYRc=&emci=ab63952e-2c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=be3e7984-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858)

-Eric

President Biden created an immigration disaster in this country and now President Trump has brought illegal border crossings to an all-time low. The brave men and women of ICE are tasked with the job of finding, catching and removing the dangerous individuals that Biden let into the country. As President Trump and his administration enforce our immigration laws, the media has been painting ICE and its agents in an awful light. Because of the media and Democrat officials, violence towards ICE agents has gone up 837 percent. ICE agents are arresting the worst of the worst, enforcing the law and rescuing children from trafficking operations in dangerous and hostile environments. We here at the Sean Spicer Show salute these brave men and women and Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons is here to give you the truth about their operations. It’s important to us that supporters like you stay up-to-date with Senator Warner’s reelection campaign, so keep reading to get the inside scoop on what we’ve been up to!

Even just a $5 recurring donation made today will have a much greater impact than a larger one-time donation made right before election day._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802511/561668561/314569660?recurring=true&amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=)

**As a small sign of our appreciation, everyone who starts a recurring donation today will receive a free sticker with our NEW LOGO!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802512/561668562/314569660?recurring=true&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=) ****[CLAIM YOUR STICKER NOW WITH A MONTHLY DONATION>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802513/561668563/314569660?recurring=true&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=)**** ______________ **Out and About in Richmond:** Senator Warner joined May Nivar in Henrico County to knock doors in support of her campaign for the House of Delegates. This competitive race will help decide control of the Virginia House, which is why Senator Warner also enlisted the help of our Team Warner Fellows to canvass and energize voters. **With less than 100 days left until Election Day in Virginia, it’s more important than ever to get out in your community and support Democrats up and down the ballot.**

Later in the day, Senator Warner sat down with the Team Warner Fellows for a roundtable discussion, where he heard about the issues keeping their generation up at night. From abortion rights to climate change, the discussion made it clear that the pressing issues facing our country require bold leadership. Senator Warner is confident that we’re in good hands with these young leaders at the helm.

[_**Click here to watch Senator Warner’s recap of his day in Richmond >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802514/561668564/-803653937?v=r8ChR4tLDkY&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802515/561668565/-803653937?v=r8ChR4tLDkY&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237) ______________ **Your questions, answered:** Last week, we asked our Instagram followers: What questions do YOU have for Senator Warner? We got a lot of thoughtful questions from supporters and voters online:
* Jackson asked what folks can do to urge the current administration to listen to us. [**_You can watch Senator Warner’s response here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802516/561668566/-861199566?igsh=MXd3enh6Z3VtcWR1bg==&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237)
* Owen shared his concern for Trump’s cuts to education funding. [**_On this topic, Warner had some good news to share._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802517/561668567/883307918?igsh=MTNwcXAzd3ZwNnhwcg==&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237)
* And Andrea asked about the SAVE Act – which Senator Warner has called one of the most discriminatory pieces of voting rights legislation he’s ever seen. [**_You can hear more of his response here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802518/561668568/1706345693?igsh=NHpobnRrZ3ptaXBx&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237)

**Do you have a question for Senator Warner? Follow our campaign Instagram account and stay tuned for our next Ask-Me-Anything!** ****[Follow Team Warner on Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802519/561668569/-1954703598?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237) **** ______________ **Rescissions Package:** Last month, Congressional Republicans voted to cancel $9 billion in previously-approved, bipartisan funding for public broadcasting and foreign aid.

Republicans slammed this partisan mess through the Senate with just 51 votes. Senator Warner tried to work with his Republican colleagues to convince them to do the right thing, but almost all of them bent to Donald Trump and his reckless agenda.

That’s why it’s so important to speak out and hold your Republican representatives accountable. And it’s why Democrats must back the Senate next year. We know we’re in a tough moment, but stay in the fight, we need you in it more than ever. ****[READ MORE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802520/561668570/1761553318?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237)**** ______________ **More Ways to Get Involved:** Senator Warner is committed to meeting Virginians wherever they are – whether that’s in communities across the Commonwealth or online through social media. That’s why last month, our campaign launched new accounts on Threads, Bluesky, and Substack.

Be sure to follow us and share with your friends to keep them up to date with the campaign! ****[Follow Senator Warner’s campaign on Threads>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802521/561668571/-1108035695?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237) **** ****[Follow Senator Warner’s campaign on Bluesky>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802522/561668572/1476573248?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237) **** ****[Follow Senator Warner’s campaign on Substack>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802523/561668573/1771701404?r=5o9m4z&utm_medium=ios&utm_source=profile&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=&emci=b5f0f753-1072-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a76eda92-4772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4568237) **** Stay in the fight, we need you in it now more than ever.

– Team Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802524/561668574/-764466773?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Newsletter_250805_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZlZGE5Mi00NzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pID6G9mBsicMDGoYZn9qQzTWE6449xJJ3mA3wkJRAek=)****

name: Lizzy Duncan, LCV
subject: TAKE ACTION: Tell the Trump administration to STOP poisoning our communities with mercury and other hazardous pollutants.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI3ODcwMjUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI4MDA3MTMzMwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Tell the Trump administration to STOP poisoning our communities with mercury and other hazardous pollutants

The Trump EPA is once again putting polluters ahead of our families’ health by
attempting to weaken the Clean Air Act. Lower standards for power plants would
increase rates of dangerous pollutants like mercury, arsenic, and other heavy
metals.

Our communities’ health is at stake: show the Trump EPA how unpopular this
attempt is. Please take action right now — it only takes a moment to help us reach our 5,000 signature goal >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XBdvveVS~ TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. Peter, The Trump EPA is once again putting polluters ahead of the health of our
families by attempting to weaken Clean Air Act standards for power plants, also
known as the Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS) Rule. We know how dangerous this is. Increased rates of mercury, arsenic, and other heavy metals from fossil
fuel-fired power plants lead to increased rates of asthma, cancer,
cardiovascular disease, lung disease, brain damage, and developmental delays in
children. There is a comment period open now, but it’s going to close soon. We need to
show Trump and his EPA how unpopular this is with the public. Sign the petition and tell the Trump administration to STOP poisoning our communities with mercury and other hazardous pollutants! https://links.messages.lcv. Since the MATS rule was first adopted in 2012, mercury emissions from power plants have decreased 90%, cleaning up our air and
improving the health of our communities.The 2024 MATS rule aimed to build on the initial rule’s success and further
reduce pollution from mercury and other toxic chemicals. Weakening these critical clean air safeguards and pollution reduction measures
would be extremely detrimental to public health. Pollutants like mercury, arsenic, and other heavy metalslead to increased cases of asthma and cancer, as well as brain damage and
developmental issues for children, both for frontline communities and for people
living hundreds of miles from these facilities. We are ALL at risk. Trump’s EPA is deliberately ignoring science and putting our lives in danger —
just to further enrich polluters. This is despicable, and we CANNOT let them get
away with it. The comment period is closing in a matter of days, and we need to rally all our
supporters before the deadline. Sign your name and urge the EPA NOT to weaken the Mercury and Air Toxics Standards Rule. https://links.messages.lcv. Thank you for all you do, Peter. Lizzy Duncan
Government Affairs Advocate, Healthy Communities
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12787025&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDA3MTMzMwS2&spReportId=MjI4MDA3MTMzMwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12787025&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDA3MTMzMwS2&spReportId=MjI4MDA3MTMzMwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTK88m~

name: Team Bynum
subject: Have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
The data doesn’t lie. This bill puts millions of Americans’ healthcare and food assistance at risk.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802865/561669642/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM3NzkyNWItNDg3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=miJgmv22UEJugP6Foj-agh2-Wf5JGctmrlwwBRSn1-Q=) Have you seen this? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112802866/561669643/-629675555?refcode=email_080525_headline&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM3NzkyNWItNDg3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=miJgmv22UEJugP6Foj-agh2-Wf5JGctmrlwwBRSn1-Q=) The Congressional Budget Office released its final prediction for how the GOP’s trash bill will affect the national debt and Americans. And it’s appalling. Over the next decade, the bill will cause 10 MILLION people to be kicked off their health insurance — and it will increase the national deficit by $3.4 TRILLION. Not to mention, millions of Americans — including 90,000 Oregonians — are at risk of losing their access to SNAP. _All of this just to give tax breaks to billionaires._ **The data doesn’t lie. This bill puts millions of Americans’ healthcare and food assistance at risk.** That’s why Janelle Bynum is continuing her fight to ensure Oregonians have access to the critical programs they rely on. She’s doing everything she can to elevate our voices and show the harm these cuts are causing — and she needs you standing with her. **[If you want to fight back against this trash bill and stand up for hard working Americans and critical programs like Medicaid, will you donate now to support Janelle’s fight in Congress? name: Response Requested via Team MGP
subject: LED headlights are too bright
body:
| | Peter, you’ve probably experienced this before: You’re driving along when suddenly, extremely bright headlights flood your field of vision – best case scenario, leaving you momentarily stunned, or worst case scenario, leaving you unable to see the road ahead.

**It’s not just a temporary annoyance, Peter. Overly bright LED headlights present a real danger to drivers, including rural Americans, older Americans, law enforcement, and more. The average headlights have become _twice as bright_ in recent years, with no regulation on maximum levels currently on the books.**

Marie is working to change that. She’s calling for maximum brightness standards that will preserve driver visibility while keeping others on the road safe.

**Let Marie know where you stand on this issue:**

clean_body: | | Peter, you’ve probably experienced this before: You’re driving along when suddenly, extremely bright headlights flood your field of vision – best case scenario, leaving you momentarily stunned, or worst case scenario, leaving you unable to see the road ahead. It’s not just a temporary annoyance, Peter. Overly bright LED headlights present a real danger to drivers, including rural Americans, older Americans, law enforcement, and more. The average headlights have become twice as bright in recent years, with no regulation on maximum levels currently on the books. Marie is working to change that. She’s calling for maximum brightness standards that will preserve driver visibility while keeping others on the road safe. body:
#

_A quick update on Georgia’s critical U.S. Senate race..._
**First, the bad news:**
_There is a real chance that a far-right MAGA loyalist may raise their right hand and take the oath of office as Georgia's next United States Senator._
Jon’s Republican opponents are already competing to see who can suck up to Trump the most to try to win his endorsement, and right-wing Super PACs are _already_ spending MILLIONS on TV and digital ads attacking Jon.
That is the bad news. _And it is bad._

**But here’s the good news: If we fight back together, we will win.**
_Elections are not something to sit back and witness, they are something we can — and will — shape._
But winning Georgia and taking back the Senate is going to take ALL of us getting involved. For some, that means volunteering. Others, posting on social media or talking to their friends about what’s at stake with a MAGA takeover of Georgia.
But probably the most important thing you can do at this moment to ensure Jon is ready for the campaign ahead is to make a contribution. It doesn’t have to be a lot — even a few dollars makes a big difference and lets us know you’re on our side.
**[If you give $5 to Jon Ossoff’s campaign today, we’ll put your donation directly to work building the foundations of a campaign that will defeat any challenger — and keep another MAGA extremist out of the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250805-1-full&t=1&akid=616%2E5691347%2EVtisFB)
