name: America First War Room
subject: Chelation: There will be side effects, truly amazing ones...
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e44434653/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRkV5WnFOSGRVZw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDU/LbmNsWWxxU21FQQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNMRVlJWDhOc2w2cHlscw/gaJKGEg/s8t9d6951e6)
Dear Friend, Artery plaque could have been a death sentence for John — and a catastrophe for his grieving family.

Cholesterol in his artery walls was clogging his circulatory system, restricting blood flow to vital organs, and setting the stage for a disaster.

Left alone, it had the power to turn John — a living, breathing human being — into a fading memory — another heart statistic.

Who knows? John might have been one of the fortunate ones. His plaque might just have triggered a mild heart or brain problem, leaving him diminished, but still alive.

Or, if he was really lucky, he might have escaped with a lifetime sentence of doctor visits and drugs that may cause skin rashes, insomnia, depression, kidney damage, and even rob him of his sexuality.

But now, this once-savage killer is as harmless as a teaspoon of sugar.

Because a few hours ago, John swallowed three, tiny capsules containing an amino acid so safe that the United States Food and Drug Administration has approved it as an additive to baby food.

It entered his bloodstream, seeking out the rogue calcium deposits that had glued plaque to his artery walls.

Then, in an act of supreme irony, the very blood that this plaque had once blocked swept it to his kidneys where it was unceremoniously evicted from John's body as a component of urine.

**There will be side effects.**
**Truly _amazing_ ones!**

This remarkable amino acid did not just help remove plaque from John's cardiac arteries, it also helped scrub every one of the 75,000 miles of arteries, veins, capillaries, and microscopic arterioles in his body.

Now, nutrient-rich, life-giving blood is coursing to places it hadn't reached in years.

And suddenly, cells throughout his body are being nourished including...

**> >** The brain cells that control learning, reasoning, coordination, and memory

**> >** Nerve endings and painful joints

**> >** Entire organs — from his eyes and ears... to his heart, lungs and liver... to his stomach, pancreas and intestines — and even his sexual organs

**> >** Extremities — arms and hands, legs and feet are now being warmed by supplies of life-giving blood...

**> >** Skin that was thinning and weakening with each passing year is regaining the smoothness, elasticity, and youthful glow it had 10, 20, even 30 years ago...

**> >** As his body rallies, even the fatigue that began plaguing him after age 50 is giving way; replaced by vibrant new energy.

**Four little letters are changing John's life.**
**They should be changing YOURS!**

So what is this miracle of nature? This 23-cent capsule that works such heart wonders?

Scientists call it "ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid." But please don't be put off by the hard to pronounce name. The rest of us refer to it with four little letters: "E–D–T–A."

EDTA, first synthesized in Germany in 1935, is a simple amino acid, very similar in composition to common household vinegar.

In medical studies, EDTA has been shown to be extremely safe. In fact, EDTA is so safe for humans, the American Heart Association recommends large direct intravenous injections as treatment for people who have been exposed to toxic levels of lead, mercury, aluminum, and cadmium.

More than 200,000 children in the U.S. have undergone chelation therapy as treatment for lead poisoning.

Both the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) approve it for use in foods that are enjoyed by everyone from our youngest babies to our oldest seniors.

EDTA is used every day to help stabilize fats, oils, and vitamins... to keep potato products from turning brown... to keep fish and shellfish looking fresh in the supermarket... to preserve the flavor and consistency of milk products... to preserve canned vegetables... to keep beer from exploding in your face when you open the can... to preserve the flavor of soft drinks... and much, much more.

When a doctor administers intravenous EDTA, the procedure is called "chelation therapy." The word "chelation" is taken from the Greek word for "claw" — the EDTA grabs and dispatches toxins in your body like an eagle's claw grabs its prey.

In 1955, research conducted at the Providence Hospital in Detroit, Michigan, found that EDTA can help claw away rogue calcium in your joints, kidneys, and the bones of your inner ear. And that which glues cholesterol deposits to the inner walls of your arteries.

In fact, scientific tests have shown that EDTA can eliminate calcium from plaque, help clogs to soften, let go, and be flushed away!

Put simply, chelation therapy is widely known to be a viable remedy for heart, joint, kidney, and even hearing problems!

U.S. medical associations — including the American College for Advancement in Medicine (ACAM) are dedicated to training doctors in the use of chelation therapy to improve hardening of the arteries and other chronic degenerative issues.

As a result, 1,526 U.S. doctors enthusiastically recommend EDTA chelation therapy to their patients. And chelation therapy is given to more than 1 million Americans and 3 million patients in Canada, Europe, Australia, and South America every year.

**A healthier circulatory system**
**is the secret to a healthier body**

As millions of Americans and others around the world continue to use I.V. chelation therapy to remove toxic metals from their bodies and plaque from their circulatory systems, something else is happening — something truly miraculous:

As toxins are removed... as circulation is improved... and as life-giving blood begins surging throughout their bodies... both patients and doctors report that scores of chronic and painful health problems are helped:

****** Blockages in the arteries feeding the heart and brain are reduced...

****** Cholesterol, homocysteine, and blood pressure — key risk factors for heart and brain problems are normalized...

****** Irregular heart beats and palpitations are regulated...

****** Angina and general chest pains are eased...

****** Edema (swelling of the lower legs and ankles) is alleviated...

****** Chronic shortness of breath is eased...

****** Cold, numb, and painful extremities are warmed and soothed...

****** Infections due to poor immune health are less frequent...

****** Enlarged prostates reduced...

****** Varicose and spider veins fade...

****** Insomnia is replaced by deep, restful sleep...

****** Low energy is replaced by deep wells of new energy...

****** Vision problems and "floaters" melt away, eyesight is improved...

****** Male sexual problems improved...

****** Sciatica and back pain is relieved...

****** Sexual sensation intensifies in both men and women...

****** Hearing loss due to calcium deposits in the ear improved...

****** Age-related cognitive decline, memory loss, and fading mental powers are eased or improved...

****** Skin problems and ulcers are cleared...

****** And much, much more!

**_Remarkable scientific breakthrough_ :**
**The astonishing power of chelation therapy
is now in your hands!**
Until recently, getting the full benefits of chelation therapy was uncomfortable, time consuming and expensive.

You had to take time out of your busy day... drive to the nearest chelation clinic... plop down into a chair... get poked with an I.V. needle... and sit there for up to three hours while the EDTA was pumped into you.

When it was over, the nurse would hand you a bill for up to $300 — and then tell you that you still had nine more treatments... 27 more hours in the chair... and another $2,700-worth of treatments to go.

And as if the $3,000 bill for your first set of treatments wasn't enough to break you, you discovered that you needed to come back in six months for another six treatments, another 18 hours in the chair and another $1,800 invoice!

The high price and inconvenience of chelation therapy put it out of reach for many Americans. But now, those days are gone for good — thanks to **Peak Chelation+ Resveratrol TM.**

Now, you can experience the life-changing benefit of chelation...

**•** With three small, easy-to-swallow capsules...

**•** Without needles...

**•** In the comfort and privacy of your own home...

**•** And for just pennies a day! **Can you name a single nutrient that can boast of successes like these? ... For pennies a day and ZERO negative side effects?**

I'm talking about Resveratrol... and it's no secret this revolutionary nutrient is hailed by Harvard University as "the most phenomenal discovery since antibiotics"...

And scores of other prestigious universities and scholarly journals have uncovered numerous ways this landmark nutrient can help PROMOTE heart, circulatory, and blood sugar health... and help SUPPORT cell activity and cell health! That's because...

...Resveratrol is giving anti-aging and longevity researchers a powerful tool to help...
* Support the health of cells and cell life!
* Support cell turnover and keep cells healthier longer!
* Support healthy aging so you can maintain a youthful appearance!
* Support "old-age" health concerns — including cholesterol, memory, and blood sugar just to name a few!

**This amazing nutrient can help enhance and improve your life — starting RIGHT NOW!** In the late 1980s researchers at the _University of California's Irvine and San Francisco campuses_ and at the _Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT)_ made a series of molecular breakthroughs.

They uncovered specific sets of genes in laboratory animals that kept cells from wearing out... from being overwhelmed by free radical damage... and from self-destructing after the reproductive phase.

**Scientists were amazed when it soon became evident that a single gene could literally alter the rate of aging.** They called it the "survival gene."

Later the gene was named "SIR2" or "Sirtuins" — short for "Silent Information Regulator 2 Proteins."

**Resveratrol supports the health of the "Survival Gene"!**

Scientists discovered resveratrol helps "turns on" Sirtuin genes to:
* Support healthy DNA!
* Promote healthy cell activity!
* Help lengthen cell life!
* Help speed cell turnover!
* Help support insulin balance in cells!
* Help maintain normal cholesterol levels!

It's no doubt resveratrol is a powerful breakthrough in anti-aging and important protection for your heart. That's why resveratrol is the perfect complement to the EDTA in **Peak Chelation+ Resveratrol** TM.

Since EDTA doesn't remove aluminum, malic acid helps provide critical brain support.

If you're taking an oral chelation supplement that doesn't contain malic acid for soft metal removal, you're not getting optimum chelation protection.

**Betaine (Trimethylglycine)** — helps support liver function, normal homocysteine levels and heart and brain health.

**Folate** — this ultimate homocysteine supporter helps promote healthy blood flow and normal blood clotting.

Thanks to **Peak Chelation+ Resveratrol TM** you now have at your disposal the safest option available to help support clear, healthy arteries! And you can do it in the privacy of your own home!

With **Peak Chelation+ Resveratrol** TM — your in-home chelation remedy — you get help for both clear, healthy arteries and whole heart support.

It entered his bloodstream, seeking out the rogue calcium deposits that had glued plaque to his artery walls. Then, in an act of supreme irony, the very blood that this plaque had once blocked swept it to his kidneys where it was unceremoniously evicted from John's body as a component of urine. There will be side effects. Truly amazing ones! This remarkable amino acid did not just help remove plaque from John's cardiac arteries, it also helped scrub every one of the 75,000 miles of arteries, veins, capillaries, and microscopic arterioles in his body. Now, nutrient-rich, life-giving blood is coursing to places it hadn't reached in years. body:
I’ve made it my mission to fight for public education, good jobs, affordable health care, retirement security, and safe, welcoming neighborhoods.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112803638/561672238/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzkwY2FkMS00YjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T207Qf4ZvoD86luYLLwN2kYdMW2qKbHZhJSBfi2tkc8=)
---
| | | _Below is a longer email from Linda. We hope you’ll take the time to read until the end, but if you don’t have the time you can[ _**contribute here:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112803639/561672239/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzkwY2FkMS00YjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T207Qf4ZvoD86luYLLwN2kYdMW2qKbHZhJSBfi2tkc8=)_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112803640/561672240/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzkwY2FkMS00YjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T207Qf4ZvoD86luYLLwN2kYdMW2qKbHZhJSBfi2tkc8=)
---
I was born in Southern California, the sixth of seven children raised by Mexican immigrant parents who worked hard, believed in education, and gave everything to give their kids a better future.

My dad was an industrial mechanic. My mom became an elementary school teacher, but not before going back to school herself to earn her college degree. They didn’t have much, but they made sure that all seven of their children went on to become college graduates.

I learned early what it meant to work hard, stay grounded, and serve your community.

After earning my law degree, I started my career practicing civil rights and employment law. I fought for workers as a labor lawyer with IBEW Local 441 and NECA, then went on to lead the Orange County Central Labor Council, AFL-CIO.

I’ve always believed in fairness, opportunity, and standing up for people who deserve better.

That’s why I ran for Congress in 2001. When I won, my sister Loretta and I became the first pair of sisters in American history to serve together in Congress.

And I’ve been “kicking ass for the working class” ever since.

I’m proud to represent California’s 38th Congressional District — a vibrant, diverse region of hardworking families across communities like Norwalk, Whittier, La Mirada, Diamond Bar, Pico Rivera, and more. I’ve made it my mission to fight for public education, good jobs, affordable health care, retirement security, and safe, welcoming neighborhoods.

In Congress, I’ve taken on everything from tax fairness to trade policy to ethics reform. I dedicate my work to helping shape policies that affect working families.

I’m also proud to serve as Chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus. It’s the first time a woman has held this role, and I take it seriously. Together, we’re working to elect more progressive Latino leaders across the country — because representation matters.

We have a lot of work to do.

Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are determined to keep control of the House so they can rip away health care, slash taxes for the ultra-wealthy, and undermine our democracy one law at a time.

I’m not going to let that happen.

[_**But I can’t do it alone. I hope you’ll consider making a contribution today to join me in this fight:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112803641/561672241/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzkwY2FkMS00YjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T207Qf4ZvoD86luYLLwN2kYdMW2qKbHZhJSBfi2tkc8=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112803642/561672242/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzkwY2FkMS00YjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T207Qf4ZvoD86luYLLwN2kYdMW2qKbHZhJSBfi2tkc8=)
---
I know this was a long email and I really appreciate you reading until the end. I hope it gives you a little more insight into my background and why I am in the fight for justice.

Thank you for being a part of this campaign,

Linda

I’m not going to let that happen. = | = I know this was a long email and I really appreciate you reading until the end. I hope it gives you a little more insight into my background and why I am in the fight for justice. Thank you for being a part of this campaign, Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. If you do not wish to receive emails about her campaign, please

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I will keep public lands in public hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
With over 22 million acres of them across our state, public lands are what make Colorado, Colorado.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112804004/561673444/-2054079050?refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBkMjcxZS00ZDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s5ZAWnooa-GdheqNkXzgEV7NOJCDMF2FLJws5emHLg=)
---
Friend,
**With over 22 million acres of them across our state, public lands are what make Colorado, Colorado. **
They serve as the bedrock of our state’s geography, economy, culture and history. People from across the country and around the world flock to the Rocky Mountain state to enjoy the freedom to hunt, fish, hike, camp and just get outside among some of the most beautiful landscapes America has to offer — **and I’m running for governor to ensure it stays that way. **
**[Please, will you join me in the fight to keep our public lands in the public’s hands as Colorado’s next governor by pitching in a gift of any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112804006/561673445/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBkMjcxZS00ZDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s5ZAWnooa-GdheqNkXzgEV7NOJCDMF2FLJws5emHLg=)**
During the summer Senate recess, I do my best to enjoy quality time outdoors with my family. After years of exploring every corner of Colorado, one thing is clear: Coloradans care deeply about protecting our public lands and confronting climate change head‐on.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112804007/561673447/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBkMjcxZS00ZDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s5ZAWnooa-GdheqNkXzgEV7NOJCDMF2FLJws5emHLg=)
Throughout my time in the U.S. Senate, I’ve passed bills to protect our forests, address the Colorado River's water crisis, and bolster clean energy. The responsibility to protect our outdoor landscapes for future generations is a core conviction of mine.
**Sadly, it seems Donald Trump and his followers do not share the same values. **
Republicans in Washington are pushing a reckless agenda that would auction off public lands to developers. Once sold, these lands are nearly impossible to reclaim. While I helped stop their most recent attempts, future attacks are guaranteed.
**That's why I need your urgent support.[Will you please rush a contribution of $5 or more now to help me keep up the fight for our Rocky Mountain values and treasured landscapes at every turn?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112804009/561673448/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBkMjcxZS00ZDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s5ZAWnooa-GdheqNkXzgEV7NOJCDMF2FLJws5emHLg=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112804010/561673449/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBkMjcxZS00ZDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s5ZAWnooa-GdheqNkXzgEV7NOJCDMF2FLJws5emHLg=)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m officially in the race for U.S. Senate.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=080525_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=080525_3]
Hi, Peter,
I’m Roy Cooper, and I am running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. I believe that our brightest days are still ahead, but we have to work together to fix what’s broken in Washington.
Politicians in DC are running up our debt, ripping away our health care, disrespecting our veterans, cutting help for the poor and putting our Medicare at risk — just to give tax breaks to the very rich. I’ve had enough.
We have to change things, but I need you with me. Together, we can win this Senate race and help Democrats take back the majority. Will you split a contribution of $20 or another amount that’s right for you between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to get us started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=080525_3]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=080525_3]
These are no ordinary times, Peter . I believe elected leaders should work to create safety, prosperity and opportunity for every American. Republicans in Washington don’t seem to share that sense of duty.
When I look at what’s happening in Washington now, lawmakers are tearing down our middle class to put even more money in billionaires’ pockets. They’re cutting critical jobs at agencies that help keep our country running. Not even our National Parks or Weather Service are safe.
They’re punching down — attacking the most vulnerable among us — to make themselves seem strong. Something has to give.
There’s another path, Peter. When I was Governor of North Carolina, we expanded Medicaid. We passed pay raises for public school teachers and we built a strong economy by investing in clean energy and investing in our people.
Washington can look like this, too. It’s time to elect leaders who are ready to do the hard work of strengthening our middle class, restoring voting rights and reproductive rights, protecting our environment and ensuring every child has the excellent education they deserve.
If this is the America you believe in, this campaign is for you, Peter .
We’re in for a tough election here in North Carolina, but with the help of committed supporters, we’ve won the toughest races before. I’m grateful to have The Real Texas's support in this crucial race, and I’d like to have yours, too. Your donation today will help us take on the challenge of the most competitive Senate campaign in 2026. Please give whatever is right for you and split a donation between our team and The Real Texas today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=080525_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=080525_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=080525_3&amount=25]
Let’s do this together,
Roy Cooper
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=080525_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=080525_3]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=yzjqniZNCji95M4KyZaM5RYvKJvYLry9lXi57bAOrXrtvbaU%2BBHJ7MlitsUVqultoSz314DN2pb%2BDOgYL2Mbju4cTK%2FBPE5YrVNtpW2s469MbZDUzxhpY%2BZntwlLy0DtkFyP9hn81lRwk0AHEx0%2F6kcVsLXNqnwmv7ujFetcBA9m%2BP%2BLudvnxNf7imAlrqKKtWEm%2BY%2B%2FwdnkD%2FFr6N3Qu2bFvckxWlSuXO%2B3DzxhzBMg%2F5wcQHpPDWWQ%2BaYMMz%2FANbkiaU8hxivozqs9Pn2%2BJJpWr3k9zoJGIIYrx7002UIqBMLBwu%2FOB873QyXEj8Cx8ZgwaSdZLzxmAl1UGgyYhpCHEO2d3xBKU%2FE%2Bc9j2N3Vu1aEsK0yCjDIrRZb8Eu0VlZzuCLJAQcuBCnPMu0GooMAZFWliO1Ch8IRyujkRRGo%3D .

name: Citizen Action Team via Our Revolution
subject: We’re taking on the oligarchs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1012&refcode=email-20250805_v&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

A handful of billionaire oligarchs have seized our democracy, bought our
government, and now they’re coming after our rights.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?source=email-20250805&t=1062&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]Bernie tweet about the greed of the billionaire class

As Bernie sounds the alarm, Our Revolution is stepping up to fight.

Today, we hit the streets in NYC to confront Antonio Gracias – the shadowy
architect behind the DOGE immigration task force who is weaponizing Social
Security data to hunt down immigrant families. At every turn, Gracias and
his firm, Valor Equity Partners, are siphoning our tax dollars to bankroll
AI-powered surveillance against everyday people on American soil.

We’re NOT going to let them get away with it – so we’re taking the fight
straight to the streets to stop billionaire companies from destroying our
democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1058&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250805nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]We can’t let up – not even for a day. Will you rush a donation today to
power our next actions and stop oligarchs like Gracias from turning public
money into private profit?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250805nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1044&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250805nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250805nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250805nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1048&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250805nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1049&amount=9&refcode=email-20250805nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?source=email-20250805&t=1061&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]Photo from the NYC Gracias protest

Today’s powerful action is just the beginning. Here’s what’s next on our
list:

1. We’re coming after Palantir. Right-wing billionaire Peter Thiel’s
Palantir Technologies has an alarming track record of invasive
surveillance and sweeping privacy violations. His AI-based platform
already allows military and law enforcement to analyze our personal
data – but now Trump has ordered ALL government agencies to share our
data with Palantir.
2. We’re bursting the billionaire bubble by showing up to protest in
places like the Hamptons where the oligarchs are taking refuge, hoping
to avoid the spotlight in their mansions while they spend OUR money.
3. We’re going after corporations like Avelo Airlines that are making a
killing off of secretive deportation flights – profiting from family
separations in plain sight. We already helped force them out of
Burbank, and now we’re taking the fight to airports across the
country.
4. We’re fighting to ban dark money from Democratic primaries, stopping
billionaires from drowning out the voices of working people and
grassroots candidates to buy power and influence.

Make no mistake: Our Revolution is the ONLY grassroots movement in America
organizing at this scale to *defund the oligarchy* and kick their money
out of our politics. But our work is powered by small-dollar donations –
not billionaire paychecks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1055&amount=22&refcode=email-20250805nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9131%2E5885482%2EMA7Zti ]Please chip in whatever you can to fuel this movement and show the
oligarchs we won’t be intimidated.

We’ve just sent a clear message to Gracias and Valor Equity: We’re

giants before. With your support, we’ll do it again.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, A handful of billionaire oligarchs have seized our democracy, bought our government, and now they’re coming after our rights. [ ]Bernie tweet about the greed of the billionaire class As Bernie sounds the alarm, Our Revolution is stepping up to fight. Today, we hit the streets in NYC to confront Antonio Gracias – the shadowy architect behind the DOGE immigration task force who is weaponizing Social Security data to hunt down immigrant families. At every turn, Gracias and his firm, Valor Equity Partners, are siphoning our tax dollars to bankroll AI-powered surveillance against everyday people on American soil. We’re NOT going to let them get away with it – so we’re taking the fight straight to the streets to stop billionaire companies from destroying our democracy. [ ]We can’t let up – not even for a day. Will you rush a donation today to power our next actions and stop oligarchs like Gracias from turning public money into private profit? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT [ ]Photo from the NYC Gracias protest Today’s powerful action is just the beginning. Here’s what’s next on our list: 1. We’re coming after Palantir. Right-wing billionaire Peter Thiel’s Palantir Technologies has an alarming track record of invasive surveillance and sweeping privacy violations. His AI-based platform already allows military and law enforcement to analyze our personal data – but now Trump has ordered ALL government agencies to share our data with Palantir. 2. We’re bursting the billionaire bubble by showing up to protest in places like the Hamptons where the oligarchs are taking refuge, hoping to avoid the spotlight in their mansions while they spend OUR money. 3. We’re going after corporations like Avelo Airlines that are making a killing off of secretive deportation flights – profiting from family separations in plain sight. We already helped force them out of Burbank, and now we’re taking the fight to airports across the country. 4. We’re fighting to ban dark money from Democratic primaries, stopping billionaires from drowning out the voices of working people and grassroots candidates to buy power and influence. Make no mistake: Our Revolution is the ONLY grassroots movement in America organizing at this scale to defund the oligarchy and kick their money out of our politics. But our work is powered by small-dollar donations – not billionaire paychecks. [ ]Please chip in whatever you can to fuel this movement and show the oligarchs we won’t be intimidated. Now we need your support to take the fight to Palantir, to the Hamptons, and to every backroom where oligarchs plot to steal our democracy. This is a David vs. Goliath fight – but grassroots power has toppled giants before. With your support, we’ll do it again. When we organize, we win. name: New Dems
subject: The difference between New Dems and Trump’s GOP couldn’t be more stark:

name: Team Shontel Brown
subject: Trump is tanking our economy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
He fired this Labor Dept. official because he didn’t like what he had to say.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112804839/561676254/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250806Tank_N_YSB_90DO_4_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDNmOTZlNi00ZjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JTdt6pn6epCYLT0_R-zvalonCV8GB3qK708gN5CNQK8=) **Trump’s policies aren’t working.**

Peter, Trump is making the economy weaker. He’s making the unemployment rate higher. And he’s making life more expensive.

Despite Trump and his cronies laying off thousands of federal employees, enacting tariffs that are raising the costs of everyday goods for Americans, and slashing funding, Republicans are *surprised* by the latest job numbers report.

**In fact, Trump has gone so far as to FIRE the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics over it, stating that data showing a slowdown of our economy is “rigged” and designed “to make the Republicans, and ME, look bad.”**

Yikes.

Republicans can bury their heads in the sand all they want, but we will not forget the work that they are doing to sink our economy while, at the same time, giving massive handouts to the rich. **Our message is clear: Come after our families, we’re coming after your seats.**

[**Democrats are determined to hold Republicans accountable and take back the House so we can end this chaos. Republicans can bury their heads in the sand all they want, but we will not forget the work that they are doing to sink our economy while, at the same time, giving massive handouts to the rich. Our message is clear: Come after our families, we’re coming after your seats. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Together, Team Shontel Brown Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ****=** ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

**➤➤ BREAKING: Texas Democrats flee to block Trump‐backed redistricting — GOP retaliates** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805044/561677067/-1866925329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODNmOTZlNi00ZjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lN03kePfJeZu-gY-vTz5J6im8T1CPFxB-wOTXtmpQRA=&emci=6a5159a0-0472-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=083f96e6-4f72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26828920)**
* * *
Dozens of Texas House Democrats have fled the state – traveling to Illinois, New York, and Massachusetts – to deny Republicans the quorum needed to pass a mid-decade redistricting plan backed by Donald Trump. In response, Governor Greg Abbott and GOP leaders are threatening to remove those lawmakers from office, fine them $500 per day, and even arrest them if they return to Texas. Here’s what’s at stake: a new congressional map designed to add five more Republican seats in 2026. That means silencing minority communities, cementing partisan control, and undermining the democratic process. **Democratic Secretaries of State across the country are watching.** They are on the front lines – protecting ballot integrity and ensuring that no party can override the voice of voters. But these threats aren’t just happening in Texas. The same authoritarian playbook is being used nationwide. We need to show the country: The public stands with the lawmakers who stand up for free and fair elections. [**Add your name now to stand with the Texas Democrats risking everything to defend our democracy:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805045/561677071/-1866925329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODNmOTZlNi00ZjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lN03kePfJeZu-gY-vTz5J6im8T1CPFxB-wOTXtmpQRA=&emci=6a5159a0-0472-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=083f96e6-4f72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26828920) | | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805046/561677072/-1866925329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODNmOTZlNi00ZjcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lN03kePfJeZu-gY-vTz5J6im8T1CPFxB-wOTXtmpQRA=&emci=6a5159a0-0472-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=083f96e6-4f72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26828920)**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: ICE dodged all my questions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=665ezKCXzPUewkB0SMK5DnKnXaDUrhph30g3waoN9DXQu8Y%2FgaZtwLiTKgi9WSGn%2FQCx8FpgymRE1njYfL2nZvD5gBwHUWcH5EdB0v1IB8qIasEYxKAs3AbgDntwJEyFRGfppWtQKz4oG4zQqKlWSLcRK2EtWwpnPvYdAp7enRitITq2YkvVZCiAOguhxnRjn3AN%2BKs2Mag8tAKcZBgN%2B1uh%2Bj1oGhp%2BCgxSD57r6VFTm8Z0K9Dz4cPSw2g5CcIvf9ht6loxyoYElDx9NpgGT3dZkpwrGWubWA0a0fNfkcH8epk58rGbK1Q8udbYOV7gYqThNl1ZlYdTr%2Bwebgy9jE6cBpNX%2FxfP1NPIqXsxaNOacfrqqO4YVPQyd0OsFe9%2F%2FHgx1Rx1v%2BPQ%2B3eNSieOs7qi20fHPL7lDlZdSHiHorQ%3D)
---
| |
---
It’s Gabe. I want to tell you about something I saw last week that really stuck with me. As part of my job in Congress, I visited one of the ICE detention facilities right here in New Mexico. I went there to do what every Member of Congress should be doing: asking questions, getting answers, and making sure taxpayer dollars are being used responsibly. But from the moment I walked in, it was clear ICE didn’t want much scrutiny. I wasn’t allowed to speak with a single person being detained. The staff told me it was because of “changing policies,” but no one could show me those policies — and no one seemed willing to explain what’s really going on. And that was just the start. The phones that people rely on to call their lawyers and families were broken. The toilets weren’t working. The medical team was dangerously understaffed. And the ICE officials on site consistently dodged straightforward questions, offering few clear answers about the treatment of the people in custody. And here’s what hit me the hardest: **more than 80% of the people in that facility have no criminal charges or convictions at all.** These aren’t threats to public safety. These are moms, dads, local employees — people just trying to make a life. Let me be clear: I support secure borders. But what I saw isn’t about safety. It’s about cruelty, mismanagement, and a complete lack of transparency. **And it’s happening on your dime.** That’s why I’m continuing to push legislation like my _Humane Accountability Act_ — to bring real oversight to ICE, set actual standards for how people are treated, and make sure there’s transparency around every dollar being spent. Because when the government detains people in our name — and with our money — we have a right to know what’s going on. And right now, we’re not getting the truth. Every person deserves dignity, and every system funded by taxpayers deserves scrutiny. With your help, I'll keep fighting for oversight and real, long-lasting reform. Thanks for being in this with me, Gabe Vasquez | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805273/561677787/-2084511163?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_080525_DETENTION_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWNiNTdhZi01MDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eSJgcUxEm8_13M31osSoPbFumHb-IKYlwnwnGPggBA=)
---
* * *

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Gabe. I want to tell you about something I saw last week that really stuck with me. As part of my job in Congress, I visited one of the ICE detention facilities right here in New Mexico. I went there to do what every Member of Congress should be doing: asking questions, getting answers, and making sure taxpayer dollars are being used responsibly. But from the moment I walked in, it was clear ICE didn’t want much scrutiny. I wasn’t allowed to speak with a single person being detained. The staff told me it was because of “changing policies,” but no one could show me those policies — and no one seemed willing to explain what’s really going on. And that was just the start. The phones that people rely on to call their lawyers and families were broken. The toilets weren’t working. The medical team was dangerously understaffed. And the ICE officials on site consistently dodged straightforward questions, offering few clear answers about the treatment of the people in custody. And here’s what hit me the hardest: more than 80% of the people in that facility have no criminal charges or convictions at all. These aren’t threats to public safety. These are moms, dads, local employees — people just trying to make a life. Let me be clear: I support secure borders. But what I saw isn’t about safety. It’s about cruelty, mismanagement, and a complete lack of transparency. And it’s happening on your dime. That’s why I’m continuing to push legislation like my Humane Accountability Act — to bring real oversight to ICE, set actual standards for how people are treated, and make sure there’s transparency around every dollar being spent. Because when the government detains people in our name — and with our money — we have a right to know what’s going on. And right now, we’re not getting the truth. Every person deserves dignity, and every system funded by taxpayers deserves scrutiny. With your help, I'll keep fighting for oversight and real, long-lasting reform. Thanks for being in this with me, Gabe Vasquez | | = | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

subject: This is what voter suppression looks like.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
At the direction of Donald Trump, Texas Republicans are rushing to redraw the state’s congressional maps right before the midterm elections.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112805456/561678410/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjYjlkMWRhLTUxNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SfSB12zB8zrFGHrppbrn-VPX7Qzu5EVasQIoP0-Exbk=)
---
| Peter,

At the direction of Donald Trump, Texas Republicans are rushing to redraw the state’s congressional maps right before the midterm elections. Trump did this because he knows his policies are unpopular and he is afraid of losing control of Congress in the midterms.

Let me be clear: this is not how redistricting is supposed to happen. States typically redraw their maps once every 10 years after the census. The next time this process should begin is after the 2030 census.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112805457/561678411/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjYjlkMWRhLTUxNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SfSB12zB8zrFGHrppbrn-VPX7Qzu5EVasQIoP0-Exbk=)
Right now, Republicans hold 25 of Texas’s 38 House seats. With their new proposed maps, they’re gerrymandering five more seats to favor themselves, locking in control of 30 out of 38 seats.

**Gerrymandering is just another form of voter suppression, plain and simple.**

These new maps would target Black and Brown communities, pushing them into single districts where their votes matter less.

**So what can we do? We fight back.**

And that’s exactly what Texas Democrats are doing. This weekend, more than 50 Texas House Democrats fled the state to break quorum and block the vote on these unconstitutional maps. It’s a bold move to protect democracy, and it’s the kind of leadership this moment demands.

**Emerge alum State Senator Molly Cook is one of the women leading the fight.** She and her colleagues are pushing back against this blatant power grab, and they’re not backing down.

This is what we were built for. When our democracy is under attack, Emerge women rise to defend it.

In solidarity,
A’shanti F. Gholar
President & CEO, Emerge

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Trump would rather shoot the messenger than solve problems
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
His firing of the BLS Commissioner is autocratic and cowardly.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805463/561678419/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWI5ZDFkYS01MTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk-niuQVvJvCUZkkQ0s7LROTrSPhIPkZImUXrJOKfmU=&emci=f3a3dd58-4172-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8ab9d1da-5172-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **Donald Trump's policies have been a wrecking ball to our nation's economy. Prices are rising, and as of last week, it turns out even hiring has slowed on the job market.** But instead of owning up to the harm he's inflicted on hard-working families, Trump is choosing to shoot the messenger, manipulate the facts, and gaslight the American people. On Friday, we got a jobs report showing a massive downturn in hiring across the country. It was so bad that they even had to go back and revise job reports for the last two months to reflect even more losses. This is an unmistakable referendum on the tariffs and economic policies Trump has implemented in the first seven months of his presidency, and the reckless cuts to the federal workforce his administration has made. Trump's response? **He posted a long rant on social media accusing the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) Commissioner of making up the data,**_**and then fired her****.**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805464/561678420/-2044921950?refcode=2025-08-05-bls&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8ab9d1da-5172-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWI5ZDFkYS01MTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk-niuQVvJvCUZkkQ0s7LROTrSPhIPkZImUXrJOKfmU=) Commissioner McEntarfer is an honest public servant. She was confirmed by a big margin – then-Senator J.D. Vance was among the many Republicans who voted for her. **Accusing her of cooking the books – just because the facts are politically inconvenient – is cowardly and autocratic behavior.** The American people will have no reason to believe him the next time he touts a government report he _likes._ He's rigging the system and cooking the books to try and convince the American people that his presidency is a success, when the reality is, his policies have wreaked havoc on our economy and will only continue to get worse. **His administration has broken the public trust time and time again, and our country's going to suffer for it.** I'm going to fight like hell in the Senate to block any yes-man nominee to be confirmed as the next head of BLS. But it's on Senate Republicans to stand up to Trump's authoritarianism once and for all by rejecting what's sure to be another lackey, hand-picked to rubber-stamp his agenda and whitewash the consequences. clean_body: His firing of the BLS Commissioner is autocratic and cowardly. | | | | Donald Trump's policies have been a wrecking ball to our nation's economy. Prices are rising, and as of last week, it turns out even hiring has slowed on the job market. But instead of owning up to the harm he's inflicted on hard-working families, Trump is choosing to shoot the messenger, manipulate the facts, and gaslight the American people. On Friday, we got a jobs report showing a massive downturn in hiring across the country. It was so bad that they even had to go back and revise job reports for the last two months to reflect even more losses. This is an unmistakable referendum on the tariffs and economic policies Trump has implemented in the first seven months of his presidency, and the reckless cuts to the federal workforce his administration has made. Trump's response? He posted a long rant on social media accusing the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) Commissioner of making up the data,and then fired her. = Commissioner McEntarfer is an honest public servant. She was confirmed by a big margin – then-Senator J.D. Vance was among the many Republicans who voted for her. Accusing her of cooking the books – just because the facts are politically inconvenient – is cowardly and autocratic behavior. The American people will have no reason to believe him the next time he touts a government report he likes. He's rigging the system and cooking the books to try and convince the American people that his presidency is a success, when the reality is, his policies have wreaked havoc on our economy and will only continue to get worse. His administration has broken the public trust time and time again, and our country's going to suffer for it. I'm going to fight like hell in the Senate to block any yes-man nominee to be confirmed as the next head of BLS. But it's on Senate Republicans to stand up to Trump's authoritarianism once and for all by rejecting what's sure to be another lackey, hand-picked to rubber-stamp his agenda and whitewash the consequences. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805528/561678602/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBlMDVmZi01MTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OwfRmLYjnBknHOU2Prfs4Fd4LqLjltplhUqBGtIz0wo=&emci=e74ef4de-9a6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=640e05ff-5172-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

We recently asked you to share your feedback with us via a survey. We know we ask for your input a lot, but the environment is constantly in flux and it's really helpful for Chrissy to know where people are. We are grateful that you take the time to complete these surveys so we wanted to share what we heard from you:
* **What are the issues you're most concerned about?** Over 74% of you said assaults on our democracy, cuts to Social Security/Medicare/Medicaid, and outright canceling programs for environmental protection, education, and scientific research.
* **What issues should Chrissy prioritize in the second half of the year?** The top three responses were holding the Trump administration accountable, protecting Medicare and Social Security, and fighting the climate crisis and protecting the environment.
* More than **86% said you do NOT approve** of the policy choices of this current administration. Honestly though, given the audience for these surveys, we were a little surprised that number wasn't higher. Interesting...
* Nearly **90% of you believe it's important** to support leaders who are fighting to hold Trump accountable, and to help Democratic candidates so we can retake the House of Representatives.

Your concerns and your priorities are always at the center of everything Chrissy does. That's what makes your input so meaningful – and it's why she's in this fight to secure progress for you, your family, and our communities.
Derek, she's committed to fighting back against the most reckless and dangerous actions of this administration while delivering for you and your loved ones.

**[Please, will you chip in $5 right now so Chrissy can continue to protect our democracy, hold the Trump administration accountable, and flip the House blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805529/561678603/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1149-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBlMDVmZi01MTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OwfRmLYjnBknHOU2Prfs4Fd4LqLjltplhUqBGtIz0wo=)**

clean_body: | | | Derek, We recently asked you to share your feedback with us via a survey. We know we ask for your input a lot, but the environment is constantly in flux and it's really helpful for Chrissy to know where people are. We are grateful that you take the time to complete these surveys so we wanted to share what we heard from you: What are the issues you're most concerned about? Over 74% of you said assaults on our democracy, cuts to Social Security/Medicare/Medicaid, and outright canceling programs for environmental protection, education, and scientific research. What issues should Chrissy prioritize in the second half of the year? The top three responses were holding the Trump administration accountable, protecting Medicare and Social Security, and fighting the climate crisis and protecting the environment. More than 86% said you do NOT approve of the policy choices of this current administration. Honestly though, given the audience for these surveys, we were a little surprised that number wasn't higher. Interesting... Nearly 90% of you believe it's important to support leaders who are fighting to hold Trump accountable, and to help Democratic candidates so we can retake the House of Representatives. Your concerns and your priorities are always at the center of everything Chrissy does. That's what makes your input so meaningful – and it's why she's in this fight to secure progress for you, your family, and our communities. Derek, she's committed to fighting back against the most reckless and dangerous actions of this administration while delivering for you and your loved ones. = | | = If you didn't complete the survey but still want to, you can do so . If you want to complete it but can't contribute at this time, that's fine, too (giving is not required to express your opinions!). name: Team Jayapal
subject: Trump and MAGA Republicans are panicking about the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to make sure Texas House Democrats have the support they need to continue denying a quorum for as long as it takes.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250805-5310-footer&t=1&akid=5310%2E420207%2EXz2jKo)
Peter — Since Donald Trump re-entered the White House, _millions_ have joined protests in cities all over the country, more than 10,000 people from all 50 states have participated in our Resistance Lab trainings, and his poll numbers have cratered.
It’s safe to say Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress are panicking about the midterms right now. **It’s why they’re trying to rig the rules by gerrymandering five more Republican seats in Texas.**
But Democrats in Texas aren’t giving up without a fight. They just made one of their boldest moves yet by leaving the state to deny the state House the quorum it needs to pass redistricting legislation:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250805-1?refcode=em20250805-5310&refcode2=5310_420207_Xz2jKo&akid=5310%2E420207%2EXz2jKo)
These Democrats know what it means to fight fire with fire and stand up for our democracy — and we need to have their backs. Coordinating an effort like this takes a considerable amount of resources, without which they could be forced to return home.
**We need to make sure Texas House Democrats have the support they need to continue denying a quorum for as long as it takes.[That’s why we’re asking you to split a donation between the Texas House Democratic Campaign Committee and Pramila’s campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250805-1?refcode=em20250805-5310&refcode2=5310_420207_Xz2jKo&akid=5310%2E420207%2EXz2jKo)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250805-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250805-5310&refcode2=5310_420207_Xz2jKo&akid=5310%2E420207%2EXz2jKo)**
We can’t let Trump and Greg Abbott rig the midterms through unconstitutional, racist gerrymanders. Not when there’s so much at stake for working people across the country.
But if this effort fails, that’s exactly what could happen.
[**So please, split a donation of any amount you can today and help Texas House Democrats keep up their fight to defend our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250805-1?refcode=em20250805-5310&refcode2=5310_420207_Xz2jKo&akid=5310%2E420207%2EXz2jKo)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250805-5310-footer&t=2&refcode2=5310_420207_Xz2jKo&akid=5310%2E420207%2EXz2jKo)**

name: Team Powered by People
subject: How we’re fighting for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
You may have heard about the courageous stand Texas lawmakers are taking to defend our democracy. Here is what’s happening, and why it matters:
**FIRST:** Donald Trump asked Texas Republicans to redraw our congressional map to help him cling to control of the U.S. House of Representatives – because he knows the midterms won’t go their way.
**THEN:** Greg Abbott called a special legislative session to force through a new map designed to flip 5 Democratic-held seats from blue to red.
**NOW:** _Texas Democrats have left the state to deny Republicans the quorum they need to ratify their map_ , while Abbott responded by threatening to arrest them and remove them from office.
Donald Trump thinks he can get away with a power grab like this out in the open. He thinks he can act like a king and no one will stop him.
**But Trump is wrong.** Texas Democrats are holding the line to protect our democracy and ensure representation for millions of Texans. _We all have to have their backs._
[**Can you chip in $3 to Powered by People to help us support these courageous lawmakers and organize support for them on the ground right here in Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250805-2.kvaXjD&refcode=ema20250805-240282&t=2&akid=240282%2E444211%2Ej_RACP)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250805-2.kvaXjD&refcode=ema20250805-240282&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240282%2E444211%2Ej_RACP)**
Thank you,
Team Powered by People

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I refuse to take the bait
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Nice try.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)
Thanks to one of Donald Trump’s executive orders, National Parks gift shops are looking at removing books about slavery, the Civil War — and me.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250805_2_nps?refcode=em20250805-3625&refcode2=3625_400544__C5PaS&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)
That’s right. On their list is a children’s picture book about the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior. That day, I honored my Pueblo pride by wearing my white moccasins and a handmade ribbon skirt adorned with butterflies, stars, and corn.
Here’s what I have to say to Donald Trump...
_Nice try._
Think about it. While Americans everywhere are struggling with an affordability crisis, Donald Trump is raising prices, ripping away healthcare, and taking food off their tables.
**Trump’s not just failing to fix the crisis — he’s actively making Americans’ lives more expensive.** _Just look at this NBC headline from last week._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250805_2_nps?refcode=em20250805-3625&refcode2=3625_400544__C5PaS&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)
A Parks book ban is the Trump playbook in action: _distract, distract, distract_. Whether you’re cheering on or booing the censorship, Trump wants us arguing about what’s on the shelves of the National Parks gift shops — _not_ his administration’s assault on working families.
**I refuse to take the bait.** The stakes are just too high.
As a 35th-generation New Mexican, I know firsthand the struggles that New Mexicans face. I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, struggling to keep a roof over your head.
My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state.
I’m running to focus on the issues that matter. **Our leaders shouldn’t waste time on anything else.**
So if you’re tired of the endless culture wars that do nothing to lower our bills...I need you with me today:
[**My campaign relies on grassroots donations of just $5 or $10 at a time. I am humbly asking if you’ll make your first donation today to elect a governor who will fight for the people of New Mexico.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250805_2_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250805-3625&refcode2=3625_400544__C5PaS&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250805_2_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250805-3625&refcode2=3625_400544__C5PaS&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)**
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. Just because I’m not falling for the distractions doesn’t change who I am. No matter where I go, I am a proud Pueblo woman first. I look forward to rocking my mocs at my next inauguration as the first Native American governor in the United States of America. [**Chip in now to help win this race and make history again.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250805_2_nps?amount=5&refcode=em20250805-3625&refcode2=3625_400544__C5PaS&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250805_2_nps?refcode=em20250805-3625&refcode2=3625_400544__C5PaS&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)
_My inauguration as the first Native American Secretary of the Interior_
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250805-2&t=2&refcode2=3625_400544__C5PaS&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3625%2E400544%2E_C5PaS)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: AOC
subject: There are consequences for taking away people's healthcare.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I want Republicans running for dogcatcher to be challenged next year.
#
Every single Republican at every level of government must be challenged. Point blank, period.
And they should not be challenged with old ideas. They need to be challenged **fighting for healthcare as a human right for _every_ American**. Every single one.
Don't give any of them an easy walk, this year or next.
I want Republicans running for _dogcatcher_ to be challenged next year.
**Every single one of them**.
Let them know we will not forget what they did.
There are consequences for fighting and taking away people's healthcare.
There are consequences to voting against a living wage.
There are consequences for ripping up law-abiding, dutiful, undocumented people from their country.
There are consequences for fighting against LGBT rights, and taking away our right to choose.
And they need to know it.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250805.4Q-Ug1&refcode=em20250805-9481-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9481%2E2526796%2EmKOjIX)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: bar tour is on tap 🍺
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112805780/561679401/1362877131?refcode=em-8.5.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzRlZTYxNy01NDcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvW8OwnCt5JEL7gBTysUH5-0yRidVgF--vwmDCbsoO8=) Folks, I’m a sucker for an ice cold beer. But even more than that, I’m a sucker for a good conversation – especially the kind that happens in your favorite hometown bar. Congress may be on August recess, but my work continues here in Mid-Michigan. I’m using these next few weeks to do what matters most: listen to folks here in Michigan’s 8th District. Since it’s my first recess as your Congresswoman, I wanted to do something a little different. Something a bit more relaxed – and a lot more real. **So I’m going to dive bars across the district and having real talk with our community. Because it’s important I sit down with folks and hear what’s on their minds. No formal speeches, just good conversation in the kinds of places where people gather and speak honestly. ** I hope I’ll see you out there. And if there’s a hometown spot you think we should visit, let me know by replying to this email! name: Lily Tang Williams for Congress
subject: FIRST QUARTER REPORT, LILY IN THE NEWS, UPCOMING EVENTS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/first-quarter-report-lily-in-the-news-upcoming-events?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# FIRST QUARTER REPORT, LILY IN THE NEWS, UPCOMING EVENTS
First Quarter Fundraising Report Thanks to my donors, my campaign raised $253,145 with cash on hand of $318,084 during the quarter, ending June 30, 2025. My opponent, Rep. Maggie Goodlander (D), raised four times more, with $762,996 cash on hand. Of course, she has Soros’, Clinton’s, and Obama’s cash because of her husband, Jake Sullivan, who was National Security Advisor under President Biden. Most of my donors are small donors from New Hampshire and across the country - link here at [FEC New Hampshire](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=ad3655b044&e=c338950e03). I appreciate your contribution from the bottom of my heart, and I am counting on your continued support. Please consider signing up with a monthly contribution at _[www.lilytangwilliams.com](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=aec67ca2ed&e=c338950e03)_. The mailing address for checks is: Lily4Congress Committee PO Box 406 Weare, NH 03281 Lily in the News I was recently interviewed by Fox Business, Blaze, and Tomi Lahren on her Fearless podcast. You can read about me in the news and watch the interview on my website: _[Campaign Blog - Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=079011afed&e=c338950e03)_ I continue to make a huge impact on X with viral short videos like this one on socialism (1.7 million views). Please share and follow me on X: _[https://x.com/i/status/1947767021954908388](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=31a9934138&e=c338950e03)
[https://x.com/i/status/1947087781534335170](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=59048702a4&e=c338950e03)_ (734K views on Chinese foothold in Nashua) Upcoming Events **8/9 – Epsom Old Home Day**
PARADE ONLY
_Parade at 9:00 AM; parade lineup at 8:30 AM Webster Park, Epsom_ _****_

**8/12 – Nashua Alderman Meeting – 7:30 Pm**
Nashua City Hall
229 Main Street, Nashua, NH Aldermanic Chambers, located on the 2nd floor
_Come voice your concern regarding the recent purchase by Chinese beverage company, Nongfu Spring, of a critical site impacting Nashua’s Pennichuck water system. (Nongfu Spring, the largest Chinese bottled water company, owned by the richest man in China, Zhong Shanshan, purchased the site in Nashua on January 31, 2025, for $67 million, over four times the appraised value at $15 million, for a beverage plant that will draw significant water from Nashua’s Pennichuck water system. The plant site borders Pennichuck Creek upstream of Pennichuck Water Works critical infrastructure, is in the flight path of Nashua Airport, and is also near the Nashua FAA Control Center and defense contractors such as BAE.)_ **8/16 – Dunbarton Old Home Day – 10:00 AM – 4:00 Pm**
_Parade at 10:00 AM; Parade lineup at ~9:00 Am_ **8/23 – Pembroke/Allenstown Old Home Day – 11:00 AM – 5:00 PM** We are actively recruiting volunteers for my exciting campaign in NH02. If you are interested in helping, please sign up here to be a Team Lily member: _[Volunteer – Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=abda4756b3&e=c338950e03)_
In Liberty,

*Source: _China’s Richest Man Buying Water Supply of New Hampshire Town Sparks Alarm –_ [Newsweek](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=932b82c0bb&e=c338950e03)

| Peter, it’s Maritza, Maxwell’s mom. [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Ub_TRG9FzbMAcTg-SzpHOA~~/AAPPABA~/-XsB-ULJhe97g2MHfWW7IXmwTncCgEG0GdaKWlMOahbcqBjb4KCMrBZY3lTVv3ThSEGXUBlpve4l306nKDKyYyfmpgGH6ypP8Lh0Yxw6L8qg4Ao-IwqAJwjpr3H4Eeq0F9GAMusYuDPYyvchXK1gCrXZ8pcoWiDwf4fbJVQLlyCfpGcxCCXTqhPCd_ZdsuAPROtDJOplxZxTHe2q8CwNsBYHRiIvi9MAUoNgd9mXiZZKbnzP2-1YM278msnPpeJuuwvYBlbxJaDFBY4_sbFGwrHAN7-dW5wxaUIjJyRhNH2MRdGpjzzWM_zPQK3ZzvEvd1lHaT69_0LBbb0atxvHbg6oXgyet1SPm0TI3ydxIng~) I’ve been so proud to watch Maxwell fight tooth and nail to build a better future for our community and the most vulnerable people in this country, first as a young organizer and now, a member of Congress. But that hasn’t come without challenges. As a mom, it’s really hard to see your child become a target of attacks from far-right billionaires. And as a retired special education teacher, it’s really hard to see the attacks on our education system – like Trump dismantling the Education Department. I’ve seen firsthand how underfunded our schools already were. I’m scared to see how much worse it will get. But it gives me so much hope to see young people like my son demanding change. And I’m so proud that Maxwell and his team are fighting back for working people everywhere. **Peter, while he’s out there on the frontlines speaking up and taking action, it’s his supporters behind the scenes, like you and me, that make the fight for progress possible.** [**_The less time Maxwell spends worrying about funding his campaign, the more time he can spend keeping this movement for change and progress going. clean_body: | ~ | Peter, it’s Maritza, Maxwell’s mom. ~ I’ve been so proud to watch Maxwell fight tooth and nail to build a better future for our community and the most vulnerable people in this country, first as a young organizer and now, a member of Congress. But that hasn’t come without challenges. As a mom, it’s really hard to see your child become a target of attacks from far-right billionaires. And as a retired special education teacher, it’s really hard to see the attacks on our education system – like Trump dismantling the Education Department. I’ve seen firsthand how underfunded our schools already were. I’m scared to see how much worse it will get. But it gives me so much hope to see young people like my son demanding change. And I’m so proud that Maxwell and his team are fighting back for working people everywhere. Peter, while he’s out there on the frontlines speaking up and taking action, it’s his supporters behind the scenes, like you and me, that make the fight for progress possible. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you for supporting my son, Maritza Maxwell's mom | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. | | Team, Every day, the news is full of the Senate’s latest destructive and cruel decisions. **Now that the Republicans hold a majority, the Senate is simply a rubber stamp for the Trump Regime’s most dangerous and extreme ideas.** But don’t be fooled: **Extremist Republicans are also playing a long game to abuse their power and use it against the will of the people.** From attacking voting freedoms on the state and federal levels to passing horrendous legislation that will have generational effects, the GOP has cemented a dangerous grip on our institutions. With Senator Ossoff’s re-election in Georgia coming up in 2026, we need to establish the foundation to ensure that he and other pro-voter Democracy Champions cross the finish line. [**Long-term influence is built from grassroots power, not hastily assembled in the month before an election. Dangerous legislation that GOP majorities have passed will cause immense damage to communities across the entire country.
Health coverage. Food assistance. Climate change. Reproductive rights. Voting freedom. _It’s all on the table._
**But we’ve flipped Georgia blue in the past thanks to determination, planning, and strategizing that started long before Election Day.**
In the 2020 and in the 2021 runoffs, we helped elect two new Democratic senators, including the first Black senator to represent Georgia. It’s those wins that inspire our work now to prepare for the 2026 Georgia Senate race, and in other battleground states like North Carolina and Mississippi.
**By laying the groundwork for victories now, we can take back majorities and finally add a check to the Trump Regime’s efforts to destroy the foundations of American democracy.**
