clean_body: We’re breaking down why we are preparing NOW for fights yet to come: | | | Team, Every day, the news is full of the Senate’s latest destructive and cruel decisions. Now that the Republicans hold a majority, the Senate is simply a rubber stamp for the Trump Regime’s most dangerous and extreme ideas. But don’t be fooled: Extremist Republicans are also playing a long game to abuse their power and use it against the will of the people. From attacking voting freedoms on the state and federal levels to passing horrendous legislation that will have generational effects, the GOP has cemented a dangerous grip on our institutions. With Senator Ossoff’s re-election in Georgia coming up in 2026, we need to establish the foundation to ensure that he and other pro-voter Democracy Champions cross the finish line. = | = Dangerous legislation that GOP majorities have passed will cause immense damage to communities across the entire country. Health coverage. Food assistance. Climate change. Reproductive rights. Voting freedom. It’s all on the table. But we’ve flipped Georgia blue in the past thanks to determination, planning, and strategizing that started long before Election Day. In the 2020 and in the 2021 runoffs, we helped elect two new Democratic senators, including the first Black senator to represent Georgia. It’s those wins that inspire our work now to prepare for the 2026 Georgia Senate race, and in other battleground states like North Carolina and Mississippi. By laying the groundwork for victories now, we can take back majorities and finally add a check to the Trump Regime’s efforts to destroy the foundations of American democracy. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- In solidarity, Fair Fight = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: This is a blatant power grab
body:
---
**Shameful.** Just shameful... Derek, Republicans are conspiring **_right now_** to steal the 2026 midterm elections. They know how unpopular their agenda is, especially after passing a budget bill that will hurt millions of families. So Donald Trump has demanded that Texas Republicans call a special session to design a further gerrymandered map — _in the hopes that it could net them four or five seats next fall._ **I’ll be frank: If the GOP is able to remain in power despite the will of the people, it will be an outrageous violation of our democracy.** Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are afraid of voters who are rightfully furious with their far-right agenda. Instead of changing the way they govern, they’re deciding to cheat — manipulating district lines to cling to illegitimate power. And Derek, **that’s not democracy. That's the kind of discrimination that we all should stand against.** At the National Democratic Redistricting PAC, we’re working tirelessly in Texas and around the country alongside the Democratic National Committee to end gerrymandering by electing fair maps champions, advancing redistricting reform, and growing a grassroots movement for free and fair elections. **This is a fight we’re built to win.** [Politicians shouldn’t choose their voters — voters should choose their representatives. Split a donation between the NDR PAC and the DNC to defend democracy against Republicans’ coordinated, anti-democracy efforts in Texas and across the country >>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the National Democratic Redistricting PAC and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ)**
---
****
One of the most shameful parts about this is that Governor Greg Abbott announced that he added mid-decade redistricting to the agenda on July 9 — just days after deadly flooding devastated parts of the state, in the middle of recovery efforts and amidst communities searching for loved ones.
Derek, it’s moments like these that this batch of Republicans are showing their true colors. Communities in Texas needed their governor to lead in a moment of tragedy and crisis. **Instead, he prioritized a partisan scheme to cling to unearned power.**
Keep in mind: The current map is already being challenged by voters because it violates the Voting Rights Act with a clear-cut racial gerrymander. Now, the state wants to double down on this illegal map — seizing an opportunity to manipulate maps even further in a blatant power grab simply because they cannot win fairly. And now, they could manufacture power for themselves for **years to come** in Texas.
[We, the American people, still control our fate — and with the stakes so high, we cannot allow ourselves to be resigned or tired. Split a contribution today between the NDR PAC and the DNC — and let’s fight back together with everything we’ve got.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ndrc-split?refcode=em_20250805_4185_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4185_22930333_LCJeVQ&akid=4185%2E22930333%2ELCJeVQ)
In service,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
